The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

| **Democrat Kim Bernice Nguyen is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation.** The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant, Kim's story is the quintessential California tale of sacrifice, hard work, and dedication to community. At just 25, she became the youngest person ever elected to the Garden Grove City Council. body:
Will you help me protect our Democratic majority?
#
Let me be frank with you, Peter:
Once again, we’re at the end of the month and we’ve got a bit of a shortfall to make up for our July fundraising goal. That’s why I am turning to _you_ and this grassroots team, because I know you will always have my back when it counts.
MAGA Republicans are watching and waiting for us to stumble and lose our momentum. They want nothing more than to take back the Senate and White House next year. But we’re showing them each and every month that we are ready to defend our Senate majority.
**[Your donation before July 31 will help me protect our Democratic Senate majority and keep making progress in Washington. name: Moms for Katie Porter
subject: Peter, 3x your impact!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Peter,
We hope you’re enjoying your weekend. We know it’s precious downtime, so we’ll keep this brief.
July has been a challenging month for our fundraising efforts, and as we near the end of the month, we find ourselves facing an important fundraising deadline. However, we have an exciting opportunity - a generous supporter has stepped forward to triple match any donations we receive for the remainder of this month.
Yes, you heard it right - every dollar you give will be tripled, but only if we reach our goal of $5,000. We are incredibly close, but we need your help to unlock this matching gift and make three times the impact. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
With your support, we can do something remarkable. We can help elect a mom, like Katie Porter, to the US Senate. Katie is passionately committed to working on behalf of moms and families everywhere, and your contribution can make a significant difference in achieving this goal.
So, will you help us unlock this incredible opportunity? Every contribution, no matter how small, will help us reach our goal and propel us forward in our mission to prioritize the needs of working moms and families. Please chip in what you can right now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
Thank you for standing with us. Your support means everything.
Your $25=$75 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]

clean_body: [] Peter, We hope you’re enjoying your weekend. We know it’s precious downtime, so we’ll keep this brief. July has been a challenging month for our fundraising efforts, and as we near the end of the month, we find ourselves facing an important fundraising deadline. However, we have an exciting opportunity - a generous supporter has stepped forward to triple match any donations we receive for the remainder of this month. Yes, you heard it right - every dollar you give will be tripled, but only if we reach our goal of $5,000. We are incredibly close, but we need your help to unlock this matching gift and make three times the impact. [] With your support, we can do something remarkable. We can help elect a mom, like Katie Porter, to the US Senate. Katie is passionately committed to working on behalf of moms and families everywhere, and your contribution can make a significant difference in achieving this goal. So, will you help us unlock this incredible opportunity? Every contribution, no matter how small, will help us reach our goal and propel us forward in our mission to prioritize the needs of working moms and families. Please chip in what you can right now. [] Thank you for standing with us. Your support means everything. Your $25=$75 [] Your $100=$300 [] Your $500= $1500 [] Your $1500=$4500 [] Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office #momsforkatieporter TRIPLE YOUR IMPACT! [] [] [] [] Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . clean_body: Your response represents every Republican in your state | The most important thing our Party must do is elect a REPUBLICAN to the White House AND elect a REPUBLICAN Majority to the United States Senate, Fellow American. The chaos and ineptitude of Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and their cronies in the Senate have devastated our once GREAT country. Loyal grassroots supporters like you can be the difference between putting CONSERVATIVES back in charge to restore American greatness or potentially losing the Senate to Chuck Schumer, Adam Schiff and other radical Socialists forever. That’s why I’m asking if you will take one of the most important surveys to date: I don’t think I can stress to you just how important this is, Fellow American. We have ALL felt the horrible effects of the Biden-Harris “agenda,” and this may be our LAST CHANCE to correct it. Senate Republicans asked me to review responses from our top patriots in every state across the country, and YOUR answer via the Presidential Canvass has been selected for review for your state. Please don’t wait too long before I’m forced to move on to the next patriot in your state. Thank you, Kellyanne Conway If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Peter, Here’s what’s stressing me out: tonight at midnight, everything that we’ve raised to make Brandon Presley the next governor of Mississippi is going to be locked in to go public. Tate Reeves, reporters, and national pundits are all going to be watching to measure our strength. **But our fundraising numbers are dropping dangerously low. Take a look at our last few days:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67274477/419193888/960250762?amount=25&refcode=ea.6d35f9ea-7c2e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ms=ea.6d35f9ea-7c2e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmQzNWY5ZWEtN2MyZS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=w1KCCFj4PLBjxlMCeZErfJUT0PtkwQADWyzATU7Fhac=) [**We’re in serious danger of falling behind if we aren’t able to reverse this trend and raise $40,000 before the end of the day. Can I count on you to help turn our numbers around by rushing $25 before our midnight public filing deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67274478/419193889/960250762?amount=25&refcode=ea.6d35f9ea-7c2e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ms=ea.6d35f9ea-7c2e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmQzNWY5ZWEtN2MyZS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=w1KCCFj4PLBjxlMCeZErfJUT0PtkwQADWyzATU7Fhac=) | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67274479/419193890/960250762?amount=25&refcode=ea.6d35f9ea-7c2e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ms=ea.6d35f9ea-7c2e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmQzNWY5ZWEtN2MyZS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=w1KCCFj4PLBjxlMCeZErfJUT0PtkwQADWyzATU7Fhac=)**
---
I’ll be blunt: our campaign does not have as much money as Tate Reeves’ does. He’s spending millions of dollars on TV ads and spreading lies on the internet – but we don’t rely on billionaires and lobbyists to bankroll our team.
Our team is powered by small-dollar donations from grassroots supporters. That’s the right way to run a campaign, but it means we need to work even harder to keep up with Tate’s fundraising numbers.
It all comes down to this: If we see a surge of donations right now, we will have the resources to engage voters, train volunteers, travel to every corner of the state, and push back against Tate Reeves’ lies.
[**Please, can you chip in right now? I hope you’ll be a part of the surge of donations we need to crush our midnight fundraising goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67274480/419193891/960250762?amount=25&refcode=ea.6d35f9ea-7c2e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ms=ea.6d35f9ea-7c2e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmQzNWY5ZWEtN2MyZS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=w1KCCFj4PLBjxlMCeZErfJUT0PtkwQADWyzATU7Fhac=)
I’m so grateful you’re in this fight with us.
Isaac Lampner
Finance Director, Brandon Presley for Mississippi

name: American Defense News
subject: Who controls whom?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn1m567dnhimblck1hptpr8qm38a09jslsad3tco_rp22sh2s8i66p70cti68oj5cph2bs)
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3djrh71su64mtnefepuus7ki4mo9gm7u9j6526g_rp22sh2s8i66p70cti68oj5cph2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3sgkub5eeo50pvqu75euttlf46pubfk2jm8acag_rp22sh2s8i66p70cti68oj5cph2bs) [NO](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlqoki61j8koqjut9nbk5hebe28btc1j9uddhbv8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cti68oj5cph2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlbe4uajolu69jfa9ksp1moktcka4jv5cbgdhhb8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cti68oj5cph2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj8oiftftlig6h7bkse3gvp8bdu3f29g89o26mm0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cti68oj5cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chgm2pj1cph2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6u60tdgfbavlcevgbq3u23bibbmbrt1svenrsmg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cti68oj5cph2bs)_

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 American Defense News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
]
I'm at my wits' end

|
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo9sb0tctvu2091ljhnv85ckfrbojpuajr0lvgmo_rp22sh2s8i66p70cti68oj5cph2bs "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqs9nlohju2pd02hlpljtekfjgc7sdm71l4s31f0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cti68oj5cph2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm4iee8e5gip7an4jivanskaijjj2toafs8pqg2g_rp22sh2s8i66p70cti68oj5cph2bs "DONATE TODAY")
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zntd1eb03sgss7424mppjd53baacu38fir5hk400_rp22sh2s8i66p70cti68oj5cph2bs "DONATE TODAY")

name: Mark Robinson
subject: My story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
I wasn’t born with a silver spoon in my mouth.

| |
---
| | | | | I grew up as the 9th of 10 children in Greensboro. My father was an alcoholic who beat my mother. He died when I was in the fifth grade, and I was terrified. He had been the sole provider for our household. I remember sitting on the porch wondering where I’d be in five years.

Would I be in a shelter?

In foster care?

Would I be separated from my brothers and sisters?
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663893%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2iiG7xH3RSt7WJJYcn3P2g&sysid=1)
---

A few days after my father died, my mom’s friend came by. She explained that now that her husband was gone, my mother could kick her feet up and relax because the government would take care of everything.

But that wasn’t my mom.

As soon as her friend left, she got up and walked over to the local university and got a job as a janitor. She had a fifth-grade education and five kids to provide for. She chose to clean up for other kids to provide for her own. **She didn’t just rise to the challenge, she excelled. **

She gave a sense of calm and purpose to us. From that point on, we always had what we needed... _very little of what we wanted, but always what we needed. _

My mother was and always will be my hero. She showed me what strength and perseverance looked like first hand, and she taught me that with faith and hard work, I could achieve anything.

Those early years of hardship were just the beginning of my struggles.

My wife and I have endured a lot. I lost not one, but two jobs due to NAFTA.

We lost homes, cars, and were even forced into bankruptcy.

I remember lying awake at night wondering how I was going to pay the bills.

_**But I never forgot what my mother taught me, and we never gave up. **_

Together, my wife of over 30 years and I persevered and raised two incredible children. Now we have two amazing grandkids.

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663893%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2iiG7xH3RSt7WJJYcn3P2g&sysid=1)
---

In 2018, my life changed when I gave a speech to the Greensboro city council that went viral.

A year later, I launched my campaign for Lieutenant Governor, and when I was elected in 2020, _**I became the first black Lieutenant Governor of North Carolina. **_

As Lieutenant Governor, I have had the privilege to work on a lot of issues, but my main focus has been on education.

It is a passion of mine, and the reason I ran for Lieutenant Governor. I have been a vocal proponent of parents knowing what their children are being taught. I have supported providing opportunities for all students to have an education that best suits them, whether that’s in a private school, charter school, home school, or public school.

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663893%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2iiG7xH3RSt7WJJYcn3P2g&sysid=1)
---

Now, I’ve thrown my hat in the ring to be the next Governor of North Carolina. Not because I want to be Governor.

My campaign for Governor is not about want. _**IT’S ABOUT SERVICE.**_

Some day, you and I will be gone. And I don’t want my family to see a picture of me and wonder why I didn’t fight for them. I want my children and grandchildren to know that I did everything I could. That’s what I’m fighting for. And that’s why I’m running for Governor.

Now, I’m asking for your help.

_**This is going to be the most contested and most expensive governor’s race in the country.**_ As North Carolina goes, the nation goes. So I hope you will consider making a contribution to my campaign today. _**[Whether it’s $500 or just $5, every single donation will get us one step closer to making history.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663894%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0ccVZ0cQ7lyrs8eRvpn5HQ&sysid=1 "Whether it’s $500 or just
$5, every single donation will get us one step closer to making history.")**_
---
| | | **[Donate Now](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663805%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rNNHb0yB5I%2bELFfVsTybbA&sysid=1)**
---
Thanks in advance for your support, donations, and prayers.

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663893%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2iiG7xH3RSt7WJJYcn3P2g&sysid=1)
---

subject: Thousands have gotten their copy -- will you claim yours?
body:
Are you ready to take the fight to save America to the next level? If so, I have a special offer for you.
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWnzHaxDN3)
| | | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62074338:WnzHaxDN3:m:1:2532013465:9A1E0269C5160AE43ACC7A4A90BEAB1A:r)

| | Fellow Patriot, Are you ready to take the fight to save America to the next level? If so, I have a special offer for you. **I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book,_How We Win!_** Thousands of patriots have already gotten their copy, and now it's your turn. The book is yours when you make a generous gift of any amount to Turning Point USA.
---
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62074338:WnzHaxDN3:m:1:2532013465:9A1E0269C5160AE43ACC7A4A90BEAB1A:r)
---
| | **That 's right - _ANY AMOUNT!_ Even a gift of $10 will cover the cost of shipping.** [**Click here to get yours before we run out of copies!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62074338:WnzHaxDN3:m:1:2532013465:9A1E0269C5160AE43ACC7A4A90BEAB1A:r)
---
[Get Your Copy >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62074338:WnzHaxDN3:m:1:2532013465:9A1E0269C5160AE43ACC7A4A90BEAB1A:r)
---
Until now, we have only sent this book to TPUSA supporters who make gifts of $100 or more. But frankly, I think the mission is too important to be that selective. As far as I'm concerned, if you care about this movement even a little -- even enough to give just $10 -- then I need you on board, and I need to get this valuable book into your hands. [**If that 's you, then grab your copy today by clicking right here.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62074338:WnzHaxDN3:m:1:2532013465:9A1E0269C5160AE43ACC7A4A90BEAB1A:r) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come. You see, after _ELEVEN YEARS_ at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... _ELEVEN YEARS_ criss-crossing the country... ... _ELEVEN YEARS_ engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... **... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen.** We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** But to do it, we need to rally an army of informed, motivated, and equipped patriots who are ready to take action -- which is why I want to arm you with this book today.
---
[Get Your Copy >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62074338:WnzHaxDN3:m:1:2532013465:9A1E0269C5160AE43ACC7A4A90BEAB1A:r)
---
And remember -- when you make a generous gift to TPUSA today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. Turning Point USA is inspiring the next generation to love America again so we can defeat the radical Left and WIN the American Culture War. With over 600,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just talking about saving America...we're DOING IT! But we can't do it alone. We need your support to continue our mission. That's why I'm offering you this special gift when you make a donation of any amount to Turning Point USA. [**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone! Even a gift of just $10 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62074338:WnzHaxDN3:m:1:2532013465:9A1E0269C5160AE43ACC7A4A90BEAB1A:r)
---
[Get Your Copy >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62074338:WnzHaxDN3:m:1:2532013465:9A1E0269C5160AE43ACC7A4A90BEAB1A:r)
---
Please, don't miss out on this opportunity to join our team and become a part of the movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right. Claim your copy of _How We Win_ today and help us secure victories for American Greatness! For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: Help me teach our children the bravery of WWII veterans
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDE1NDAifQ/ItyplnMCHBq4K-SXfOrzig)
---
Fellow American, Our schools used to teach every child about D-Day. Among the thousands of heroes of the longest day were the 12 soldiers who received the Medal of Honor for their courage and valor... but that's no longer the case. WAs our Greatest Generation has passed, we have failed to teach our children the legacy of service, honor, and sacrifice of the men who fought their way into Hitler's Fortress Europe. In a recent poll of High School Seniors:
* 72% Didn't know we fought Hitler during World War II.
* 87% Didn't know we entered WWII because of the attacks on Pearl Harbor.
* 60% Didn't know which countries we fought in WWII
* 13% Thought General Dwight Eisenhower was a general from the Civil War

Fellow American, American kids are not being taught our nation's history. According to 'The Nation's Report Card,' America's high schoolers' proficiency in U.S. History and Civics is at its lowest level in nearly 30 years. They know little of the immense courage our troops displayed fighting for their freedoms in the Second World War, and they know little of the heroes who gave their life in service to our country. In fact, most Americans these days know next to nothing about World War II and the millions of young soldiers who put their lives on the line to serve their country in the war, let alone in Korea or Vietnam. To help educate young Americans about the selfless, patriotic, and courageous heroes in WWII, the American Veterans Center created a limited-edition booklet - **_A Mighty Endeavor: Operation Overlord through the Eyes of D-Day's Greatest Heroes._** [**For the next 24 hours, I'm holding a copy of this brand new, one-of-a-kind booklet for you, Fellow American. With your gift of any amount today, a copy of _A Mighty Endeavor_ will be yours to share with family and friends.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDE1NDAifQ/5Xbm0_tDBi2gMlcwKrU2fA)
---
[Claim your copy of **_A Mighty Endeavor_**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDE1NDAifQ/z_7U-nYSA-YxVA_SDl7xvw)
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDE1NDAifQ/JL0AgohUE2VE24iWeuXrBQ)
---
Every one of the 156,000 men who stormed the beaches of Normandy on that bloodyday is a hero in my book. It took real guts to run head-first into a hailstorm of bullets and mortar rounds. We all hope nobody ever needs to experience something like it again. But it is essential we remember, and learn. The AVC is devoted to preserving their history, so that today's young Americans - and those in generations to come - can learn from the heroes you and I grew up idolizing. The 12 heroes who received the Medal of Honor showed so much courage and valor in the invasion of Normandy, that they were individually chosen to receive our nation's highest honor. All Americans should read the stories and know of these heroes who have been all but forgotten. The [**American Veterans Center is committed to bringing the legacy of the greatest generation to the latest generation, and with your gift today, we can preserve the legacy of America's World War II veterans.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDE1NDAifQ/NwewgBlhA-7OtjVYD8pxHA) As a token of my thanks for your support, I'll send you a limited-edition copy of **_A Mighty Endeavor_**. When you receive it, I have just one request; please share it with a loved one. Show them these stories and talk about how important their legacy is to our history. But, please let me know in the next 24 hours if you're claiming your copy! It is my hope that you'll share this booklet with your children, grandchildren, and neighbors and tell them all about D-Day.
---
[Claim your copy of **_A Mighty Endeavor_**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDE1NDAifQ/qjPSQMNoAjmCevzxhaFGpA)
---
Fellow American, we must share the TRUTH about American WWII veterans with America's youth - we cannot fail them any longer. We must educate our nation's children with messages of the D-Day heroes who were up against a battle-hardened enemy, whose very actions preserved the freedoms we enjoy today. [**Please support American Veterans Center's mission to fight the historical ignorance plaguing today's culture and teach America's young people what real service meant during WWII.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDE1NDAifQ/G0qSXDPr9_KVSfkl10vfYg) Whether you can afford to donate $15, $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or any other amount - I'll send along your copy of **_A Mighty Endeavor: Operation Overlord through the Eyes of D-Day's Greatest Heroes_** as a "thank you" for your support of our bravest Americans. Thank you and God bless,
---
Tim HolbertAmerican Veterans Center
---
[**Support American Veterans Center**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDE1NDAifQ/C8Vt2znr2Sf3esaiKhVLxQ)
---

A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | Fellow American, Our schools used to teach every child about D-Day. Among the thousands of heroes of the longest day were the 12 soldiers who received the Medal of Honor for their courage and valor... but that's no longer the case. WAs our Greatest Generation has passed, we have failed to teach our children the legacy of service, honor, and sacrifice of the men who fought their way into Hitler's Fortress Europe. In a recent poll of High School Seniors: 72% Didn't know we fought Hitler during World War II. 87% Didn't know we entered WWII because of the attacks on Pearl Harbor. 60% Didn't know which countries we fought in WWII 13% Thought General Dwight Eisenhower was a general from the Civil War Fellow American, American kids are not being taught our nation's history. According to 'The Nation's Report Card,' America's high schoolers' proficiency in U.S. History and Civics is at its lowest level in nearly 30 years. They know little of the immense courage our troops displayed fighting for their freedoms in the Second World War, and they know little of the heroes who gave their life in service to our country. In fact, most Americans these days know next to nothing about World War II and the millions of young soldiers who put their lives on the line to serve their country in the war, let alone in Korea or Vietnam. My name is Eli Crane - you might not know me, but I'm a Navy SEAL, a businessman, a husband, a father, and a humble servant of God.

I'm also the Pro-Trump, Pro-America conservative who represents AZ-02 - the biggest race on the map.

The Democrats hate me & want me silenced. Hell, many of the Republicans want me silenced too. **_The Establishment and anti-Trump haters will do ANYTHING to destroy me. There is no time left._**

name: ICYMI News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3qkg83if5sp7rgch7b7cm0t1qatfn8pc6u679e8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cti61ob2c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zolj3gjfnd9vg8i47cp8c30isss5afgqojohq828_rp22sh2s8i66p70cti61ob2c1h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfn1cl8qg3ucca67pu2rsulm0vks7gsvtfqq2bag_rp22sh2s8i66p70cti61ob2c1h2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Protect Your Bank Account with THESE 3 Simple Steps
body:
Discover these 3 simple steps here.

| | | | | Dear Reader, Starting as soon as a few months from now, the United States government will make a sweeping change to bank accounts nationwide. It will give them unprecedented powers to control your bank account. They could closely track every transaction. They could even freeze it. Unless you protect yourself today. name: Anna Kaplan
subject: Peter, Congressman George Santos claimed:
body:
Defeating George Santos
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te1ef9cb1-9dfe-4355-b237-687a629900d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Congressman George Santos claimed he was Jewish. He claimed his grandparents survived the Holocaust and that his mother survived the September 11th terrorist attacks in New York City. He claimed he graduated from college as a star volleyball player, worked for Goldman Sachs, and ran a foundation that rescued 2500 dogs and cats. These claims were lies — all of them. And that doesn’t even scratch the surface of the web of brazen lies Santos told to get elected. George Santos is a disgrace. He’s an embarrassment to our district, state, and country. And now, he’s facing 13 federal charges for crimes including money laundering and fraud. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T16b8c686-9136-42d3-aafb-afed63229f11/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) That’s why I’ve announced my run for Congress to replace him. [DONATE NOW >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T671d7d12-5ddb-4b68-9266-cd9c14ad4feb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T428b4840-6501-455f-b3fe-28e5de53a105/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I was born in Iran to a Jewish family. My family faced religious persecution, so at age 13, my parents put me on a plane, not knowing when -- or if -- they’d see me again. I landed in New York and found a place where women had real rights and could determine their futures. I graduated from college and law school and met my husband, Darren. I ran for Town Council and won. And when our state legalized gay marriage, and the town clerk refused to perform the ceremonies, I proudly stepped in to perform them. Next, I ran for New York State Senate, unseated a well-funded Republican, flipped the seat, and flipped the chamber to give Democrats control for the first time in decades. In the Senate, I sponsored and passed bills codifying Roe v. Wade and banning untraceable ghost guns. Now, I’m running for Congress to provide real representation to the people of New York because the truth is, Santos’ lies aren’t even the worst thing about him. Santos is a Trump-supporting, election-denying, anti-choice, and pro-assault rifle disgrace to our district. He doesn’t represent our values, and I’m committed to defeating him next November. [But that’s only going to happen with your support. So today, I’m asking: Will you split $25 between Blue Amp Action](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taeeecbcf-a803-44ce-93e9-7f8991603e72/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ and my campaign to help me defeat George Santos?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te7d6c259-6466-4cb0-a495-b01de8eb6c6f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [DONATE NOW >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T563953c4-6311-4043-84e2-3159af3a4974/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) My husband and I have spent 30 years here. We’ve raised our daughters here. It’s our home. This district voted for Joe Biden in 2020, and it’s time this district’s representative in Congress reflected our values Let’s win this thing, Anna Kaplan
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T342214e6-c2d8-4eb9-868f-9b21f86a1a95/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/yyz_90do_annakaplan_23073018?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T42f72670-d42c-4712-b5a2-11783946acbb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Santos is a Trump-supporting, election-denying, anti-choice, and pro-assault rifle disgrace to our district. He doesn’t represent our values, and I’m committed to defeating him next November. My husband and I have spent 30 years here. We’ve raised our daughters here. It’s our home. This district voted for Joe Biden in 2020, and it’s time this district’s representative in Congress reflected our values Let’s win this thing, Anna Kaplan | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | or

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m at my wits’ end

|
---
| | |
I’m at my wits’ end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don’t do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump’s Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I’m also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL’s that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I’m one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can’t beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29379%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0Ly6%2b%2bmGzzEZZ7xLTy0%2blg&sysid=1 "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I’m going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29370%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UQ2h5Sx04ekVU89IGP%2bmDQ&sysid=1 "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden’s plan to destroy our nation.

I’m humbly asking you, as a warrior who’s fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29371%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TvGdXKU7JRrvtET9TIM5tQ&sysid=1 "DONATE TODAY")
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29371%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TvGdXKU7JRrvtET9TIM5tQ&sysid=1 "DONATE TODAY")

name: American Briefing
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zptc9hce8j5di4dhpkq12jvagvkii45vh6vp5rh0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cth64p72c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z049vip2lttgonfc1rlo5bo1galt2vat31vn8v10_rp22sh2s8i66p70cth64p72c5h2bs) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z869qoe9cfgt9otufjrjrqr3t1rn6vkd633eohc0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cth64p72c5h2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
It’s time to act and help to support these families.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqbuit7jm26fnbe3o2q99dbd1o548t1tah6e955g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65shkmkp77c31c1rb9cb2m4qb5chielo63d1icdh34opkeepn8djme8o78c3ge4oefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1rm0phhe2pm2ptmc9j38o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhm9o37c9h60oj0c8iv0)
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zpu6vrhft478ib890kmpfl7e496fubnqbaf0f7bg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cth64o32c1h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the decfwdhs of the D.C. gulag.

We cacfwdured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zcrg1gun9052ugp204k6rjp402avqt62ph3o56hg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cth64o32c1h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zsj6qoehas0h59dvahr1rub8svlun4827ugrcrao_rp22sh2s8i66p70cth64o32c1h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Friend,

After we delivered the historic upset to Biden & Pelosi in the TX-34 special election last summer, the liberal media & woke Democrats immediately sunk to disgusting lows to defeat me in the November midterms.

My opponent hired a twisted left-wing pervert to attack me & sexually degrade me. The liberal journalists called me a "white nationalist Latina" and a "self-hating Latina."

To sum it up- the woke liberals in America showed their true colors.

They truly hate free-thinking Hispanic women who don't buy what their party is selling.

My existence, my story, and my firm adherence to the values of God, Family, Country drives them completely nuts.

But they'll spend, say, and do whatever it takes to punish me for not falling in line & they won't stop until they permanently destroy me. They're leaving no stone unturned in this election & the polls are already tied- making it the closest race in America right now & your support today will give us the extra inch to take the lead & never look back.

_**But everything is on the line in this election & I mean EVERYTHING. **_

Mayra Flores

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=88d0bae366804942b14d2568a5b36120&_e=p3p6tWFciXejG90xeRlzx26wNbUOjYYnmDzszlI0h-_79PUzU5C8XPZWngSB2gtMP_Ia20PAe3D2ZjnqvJi2Ah9In_80SkrFo271ppIzNRozECtJoLTbruB4CkVloBnmj9FLismorhaEbyRf6erpAKP-aVqnqeUgz3dcNkw5V922FSKRcTCLa3Rbu9_UdgsxYtmQX_kIbYiIt5UGLLvkeXrR2dqTze0nxsKAiOzAobMMNaKpiW_ijV1T__7kUmkeTA2XJS-wVGPj0Bety81SFoI-oerH6OR7Rhz_MphJLv4tebx07AVqsIh5gUu8y62WOJYalOkqoKdacxvaRjpqcjZJYM3JNWhy8PMKf4cf0YU1K6kW6SOzuIje0HM0A3Gcl12kBuWE4g_UhGWmp3q1XJ0DvJklj2TYtHKLhm0O2Nc%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=88d0bae366804942b14d2568a5b36120&_e=p3p6tWFciXejG90xeRlzx26wNbUOjYYnmDzszlI0h-_79PUzU5C8XPZWngSB2gtMP_Ia20PAe3D2ZjnqvJi2Ah9In_80SkrFo271ppIzNRozECtJoLTbruB4CkVloBnmj9FLismorhaEbyRf6erpAKP-aVqnqeUgz3dcNkw5V922FSKRcTCLa3Rbu9_UdgsxYtmQX_kIbYiIt5UGLLvkeXrR2dqTze0nxsKAiOzAobMMNaKpiW_ijV1T__7kUmkeTA2XJS-wVGPj0Bety81SFr6kXQIwhFtXLJWv2hMCZL4QPzjdByoT1IacDO90sbHCRAAVwr34wWXXrZJpekq4FApP1T57W_mOriLgTr00pF62nz3uI1pGvF-QF6xh3Nxy7jwfdZ9a3zmdL3C6lITd0UTUDn44-5YHiCAFs6SkcQE%3D).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=88d0bae366804942b14d2568a5b36120&_e=p3p6tWFciXejG90xeRlzx26wNbUOjYYnmDzszlI0h-_79PUzU5C8XPZWngSB2gtMP_Ia20PAe3D2ZjnqvJi2Ah9In_80SkrFo271ppIzNRozECtJoLTbruB4CkVloBnmj9FLismorhaEbyRf6erpAKP-aVqnqeUgz3dcNkw5V922FSKRcTCLa3Rbu9_UdgsxYtmQX_kIbYiIt5UGLLvkeXrR2dqTze0nxsKAiOzAobMMNaKpiW_ijV1T__7kUmkeTA2XJS-wVGPj0Bety81SFkwB3u72oF-xpPZzJYJObNEBA6NFLN6_OhByG_-y8zkWgR5ldKqu4knYPCzswrqJ8v3Tz3qxIu6Uic3-AoK81Jvm0YWyhGedzpC7nJq7mwNFQMkJJqQJ0O6ANhTMjEtzx390lAQG2kifzQNXIz3sq5I%3D) [NO](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=88d0bae366804942b14d2568a5b36120&_e=p3p6tWFciXejG90xeRlzx26wNbUOjYYnmDzszlI0h-_79PUzU5C8XPZWngSB2gtMP_Ia20PAe3D2ZjnqvJi2Ah9In_80SkrFo271ppIzNRozECtJoLTbruB4CkVloBnmj9FLismorhaEbyRf6erpAKP-aVqnqeUgz3dcNkw5V922FSKRcTCLa3Rbu9_UdgsxYtmQX_kIbYiIt5UGLLvkeXrR2dqTze0nxsKAiOzAobMMNaKpiW_ijV1T__7kUmkeTA2XJS-wVGPj0Bety81SFjVWXlis7TQXsBbnOwb2NsUPjfK7TiIyRmpGII0AhZVjPTh-6mHx-FPkQal4h-XrFQn6l5QBf0isE9qHldPyesc2U59VZPQZKge7pUoe6Jqu_6JCFh_VwsYG_sa_WvxqpPi458lqQaj1yxNu1mneP1k%3D) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=88d0bae366804942b14d2568a5b36120&_e=p3p6tWFciXejG90xeRlzx26wNbUOjYYnmDzszlI0h-_79PUzU5C8XPZWngSB2gtMP_Ia20PAe3D2ZjnqvJi2Ah9In_80SkrFo271ppIzNRozECtJoLTbruB4CkVloBnmj9FLismorhaEbyRf6erpAKP-aVqnqeUgz3dcNkw5V922FSKRcTCLa3Rbu9_UdgsxYtmQX_kIbYiIt5UGLLvkeXrR2dqTze0nxsKAiOzAobMMNaKpiW_ijV1T__7kUmkeTA2XJS-wVGPj0Bety81SFvSTsoo9CxXdvHSTzdCF05IcTQ7A54YIQsyc_SWHPZK3DWKloL2LHj9NC6nP8FC-nBWZh-VDpNsD3ZEqSXQxD9SaOamjR_Q3RKWhsP1ndMxpU-4GlCq23kA3Te19GeapOFfudTrLhPE4d1UMh5HHMK0%3D)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Stand with Jason Aldean via House Republicans
subject: The Radical Left is trying to cancel small towns!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Claim your small town proud T-shirt before they turn your town into Chicago.

|
---
| | | |
Friend, Jason Aldean recorded a song praising small-town values, and the Radical Left has canceled him for it.

body:
Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling.

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b057e0e7a8748029c57bac3aefbe85d&_e=LAS9XxM3YOiYwWXmnXzI6tq3m8MXgf3gtW3moSM00U43JydwF6QzWBqgeYzkwSOLO4mtaT69sbMo7r1d7dZJu9tfSrQX2W6JcYMtaP1-FZu6dGhwFbBNJtwKIHUSgfh5VqXwIxIJTCQv48Z69I2DKLmy9RMltPo0-vgJJkKbb68oxQyx8boFQp1clLqUqPSYbE9uDyobh2e_Uv50rlNYxPAH8B-peWPzD87txUVgMmtsrt6-LN2uL-04PruJj5JlATXP_u5xyAJxF_xt1X3iUkOK_AtMp3fhNUFezbYBJw1YRwn_csYrF2cOQ4NA-g1dWHSRIEwHCqmVKWUNFxKJ14GvrjF4IoZYpUy1QFaRRSkPW-rBKbOz4-y764_7Sz3_EsBQApQm4FNjbaHN11hlVg%3D%3D)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b057e0e7a8748029c57bac3aefbe85d&_e=LAS9XxM3YOiYwWXmnXzI6tq3m8MXgf3gtW3moSM00U43JydwF6QzWBqgeYzkwSOLO4mtaT69sbMo7r1d7dZJu9tfSrQX2W6JcYMtaP1-FZu6dGhwFbBNJtwKIHUSgfh5VqXwIxIJTCQv48Z69I2DKLmy9RMltPo0-vgJJkKbb68oxQyx8boFQp1clLqUqPSYbE9uDyobh2e_Uv50rlNYxPAH8B-peWPzD87txUVgMmtsrt6-LN2uL-04PruJj5Jl_ymb2i7YflFdyz7tljnDZ02P_obOlZkD-MGKNHrFdl1arkoUl8DTtyGovDaJrfL4GLQA1F-w59pGhT7uUhlc5NcjTdFgP2cvUzOa7bhsG4F5W3hHQgt_eGoIFSnB8i8sxYFGSJYDa9z8DzR7PUt_gw%3D%3D)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b057e0e7a8748029c57bac3aefbe85d&_e=LAS9XxM3YOiYwWXmnXzI6tq3m8MXgf3gtW3moSM00U43JydwF6QzWBqgeYzkwSOLO4mtaT69sbMo7r1d7dZJu9tfSrQX2W6JcYMtaP1-FZu6dGhwFbBNJtwKIHUSgfh5VqXwIxIJTCQv48Z69I2DKLmy9RMltPo0-vgJJkKbb68oxQyx8boFQp1clLqUqPSYbE9uDyobh2e_Uv50rlNYxPAH8B-peWPzD87txUVgMmtsrt6-LN2uL-04PruJj5JlfLHLAQiS9Kjl_4TXkqa2gsZztmLsV5khInA1nqIke1k5Q4JpHm0j46orTb_lVzz5knT-Lio0S2FZGlFcoPQPZHbFbqLIZLZdqkDv0prBd7MTBJFD2_5lOw8cFFN2WlQo2Ao9CSTWRObKegd2-KGAYg%3D%3D)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b057e0e7a8748029c57bac3aefbe85d&_e=LAS9XxM3YOiYwWXmnXzI6tq3m8MXgf3gtW3moSM00U43JydwF6QzWBqgeYzkwSOLO4mtaT69sbMo7r1d7dZJu9tfSrQX2W6JcYMtaP1-FZu6dGhwFbBNJtwKIHUSgfh5VqXwIxIJTCQv48Z69I2DKLmy9RMltPo0-vgJJkKbb68oxQyx8boFQp1clLqUqPSYbE9uDyobh2e_Uv50rlNYxPAH8B-peWPzD87txUVgMmtsrt6-LN2uL-04PruJj5Jl763a2JoevxD4QHrEcrM_sl-320PqsEtkv2uXPzHmpMKxgobdMce2SajK4DYzXxa4r9IWkS6zoJC1JtCqr0OYc7FccK14RVK2Wx1NzWQC1lqYcTIYU8b7E6HghZUYIzpkPFwe20RjzgTHip32U_PU2g%3D%3D)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b057e0e7a8748029c57bac3aefbe85d&_e=LAS9XxM3YOiYwWXmnXzI6tq3m8MXgf3gtW3moSM00U43JydwF6QzWBqgeYzkwSOLO4mtaT69sbMo7r1d7dZJu9tfSrQX2W6JcYMtaP1-FZu6dGhwFbBNJtwKIHUSgfh5VqXwIxIJTCQv48Z69I2DKLmy9RMltPo0-vgJJkKbb68oxQyx8boFQp1clLqUqPSYbE9uDyobh2e_Uv50rlNYxPAH8B-peWPzD87txUVgMmtsrt6-LN2uL-04PruJj5JlRm3Mde4rsiUr4gpocvtX6oSdB3MC_GQABz6obRl-e6y0BswaiCDX-oNm9Vi6937r1Qn5ZeF58m4NlllbMXR4Rpt1owB2QMRfY20zS5Pma2Qap1Lb3iq5fl5lZdHBThw948zOYODvmvzp2aEiXNKs3w%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT ->**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b057e0e7a8748029c57bac3aefbe85d&_e=LAS9XxM3YOiYwWXmnXzI6tq3m8MXgf3gtW3moSM00U43JydwF6QzWBqgeYzkwSOLO4mtaT69sbMo7r1d7dZJu9tfSrQX2W6JcYMtaP1-FZu6dGhwFbBNJtwKIHUSgfh5VqXwIxIJTCQv48Z69I2DKLmy9RMltPo0-vgJJkKbb68oxQyx8boFQp1clLqUqPSYbE9uDyobh2e_Uv50rlNYxPAH8B-peWPzD87txUVgMmtsrt6-LN2uL-04PruJj5JlMENyIsDqY0UySh1tKTDRidvrxgzad1IytivsuqIwZQKZCZf3G8CRPl4rJ510mcgZYuGo6YOU6aLddogUmAH7X5KLcOVonsjMX_glsLePJ3ERDfORwez6Ay4VkecnnL7bN8buCn6rzLTJbCrrGmW3aw%3D%3D)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling. | BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND Vivek Ramaswamy - 12% Ron DeSantis - 12% Fellow American - people are waking up. People are hungry for a cause. People want to hear COLD HARD TRUTHS. People are ready for a REVOLUTION. I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina. But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington. I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU. With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement. I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today. But this gives me hope for our future. We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. That's what makes America itself. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence**. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | ---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9bf03ecd45324198897fc3d14fa0aa1d&_e=4NGS2j8SWWmgdf9A_Jdfrabjyn3CjcWfSCFBMqD2e_PnICdt6QKvXhIDjF5XydU4HS4en9F5Pnipj6wZ2MeBP7xZE3IA2Ba5e938siGtCKHj9xZuPcmzVqOChd0glCAqnQUNL-kvCw_PaDH3uNMIusHY0yUo7KMm_r1OMLBaFU3XAIeg_sBQfH0WyAdXcirPve9TtSO9lzZNbiQDmYmD6BDbnCcBCFKKwA3AAgyRzQ-JgrjBwhbXVFCuf0WP2532_oveIekL6gTGeT28CRsod5268p2qE0R-Lr2R0GneXQhM5MNrFKlbQWhwJUnwoL71PJm4bRHXXDoCqTUdKIWYQrq_S02oB5QgI2Faj0jIK00bAszEMq_zajtnkZFs88dD8mnfHctzo3eJ1NiSUUEGbA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9bf03ecd45324198897fc3d14fa0aa1d&_e=4NGS2j8SWWmgdf9A_Jdfrabjyn3CjcWfSCFBMqD2e_PnICdt6QKvXhIDjF5XydU4HS4en9F5Pnipj6wZ2MeBP7xZE3IA2Ba5e938siGtCKHj9xZuPcmzVqOChd0glCAqnQUNL-kvCw_PaDH3uNMIusHY0yUo7KMm_r1OMLBaFU3XAIeg_sBQfH0WyAdXcirPve9TtSO9lzZNbiQDmYmD6BDbnCcBCFKKwA3AAgyRzQ-JgrjBwhbXVFCuf0WP2532dLHwV-C7kCK6PxB-45Ung5t0poeqBO7tRYB2TJH5oiwygA3f4ewL-LDm2rgXOqKiDNOdBXvkxOkEwTRPpUNrPgWYiLdNBchkCPYF0OXmRAQDbOEuynyzFDFMbn0tUcf3bH1mpv6O42va0ivqVDNB1Q%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9bf03ecd45324198897fc3d14fa0aa1d&_e=4NGS2j8SWWmgdf9A_Jdfrabjyn3CjcWfSCFBMqD2e_PnICdt6QKvXhIDjF5XydU4HS4en9F5Pnipj6wZ2MeBP7xZE3IA2Ba5e938siGtCKHj9xZuPcmzVqOChd0glCAqnQUNL-kvCw_PaDH3uNMIusHY0yUo7KMm_r1OMLBaFU3XAIeg_sBQfH0WyAdXcirPve9TtSO9lzZNbiQDmYmD6BDbnCcBCFKKwA3AAgyRzQ-JgrjBwhbXVFCuf0WP2532tHxuhAIAEfIXXUWjV2oQyY1yIeZeNCnb6FlEWXbrg5AVpfO3YWrVvdHDvMIdRd4BlxQ6s04OOPmaznw0n3KjMeDKT_qz7ZhsGxxN8I_Uc_LUEqX5Dmu1AqaczeifFxxf-6MELNCZ53mqjRfriyypQg%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Freedom Nation Today
---

name: Stacy, Club for Growth Action
subject: How we’re fighting Biden’s digital dollar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Club for Growth Action and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger._lA)
---
| | Friend, Club for Growth Action is leading the fight to prevent **_any implementation_** of Biden's digital dollar. Our endorsed conservatives, past and current, are leading the fight against Biden’s digital dollar:
---
| | **👏 Current Senate Candidate and****Congressman Alex Mooney** introduced vital legislation in the House, preventing the Federal Reserve from launching a pilot program for a central bank digital currency. **👏 Formerly endorsed conservative****Senator Ted Cruz** also took a stand, introducing similar legislation to defend our financial sovereignty.
**👏****Previously endorsed conservative****Congressman Warren Davidson** condemned central bank digital currencies and leads the fight for economic liberty and privacy in Congress. **👏** In addition, **previously endorsed****Governor Ron DeSantis** **signed into law a bill prohibiting CBDCs in Florida.**
**👏** And last but not least, **Senator Mike Lee** , a strong advocate for economic principles, who introduced legislation **halting CBDC rollouts and preventing Federal Reserve banks from holding CBDCs.**
---
[**STOP BIDEN'S DIGITAL DOLLAR: RUSH IN $11 >>>**](http://trk.libertyledger._7TLNRWMlB5MFRL4EOeA)
---
| | These victories are a testament to what your support has achieved. **When you stand with Club for Growth Action, you stand with conservatives who fight for our values.** But the battle is far from over, and we urgently need your help – **the Federal Reserve and the Biden administration are rapidly putting us on a path towards a****CASHLESS society****. ** **With the July 31st deadline approaching, we must raise crucial funds to elect even more conservative leaders who will defend economic freedom and personal privacy.**[](http://trk.libertyledger._AC7FtBfA) [**Friend, we’re humbly asking for just $11****to help us do that.**](http://trk.libertyledger.-jm1AEHHNmuBCiBUKJ2WIw)** ** Your generous contribution before July 31st will make a significant impact on our mission. Together, we can ensure that our country remains a beacon of liberty and prosperity.** ** Thank you,Stacy French,Vice President of DigitalClub for Growth Action
---
Button
---
| | |
---
**Unfamiliar with Biden’s digital dollar? ** This proposed idea of a central bank digital currency (CBDC) will allow the government to track every single transaction you make — down to the lemonade stand in your neighborhood. Not only will it give them unprecedented access to your financial life, but in the wrong hands, it could even be used to punish people with particular political views by freezing their accounts. **Friend, we need your help to stop them.**
---
[**STOP BIDEN'S DIGITAL DOLLAR >>>**](http://trk.libertyledger._iaw)
---
| | Club for Growth Action is an independent expenditure committee established by the Club for Growth. We want you to become a member of the Club for Growth, the leading free-enterprise advocacy group in the nation.
