name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: You’re invited: Kingdom to the Capitol Tour
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
Fellow American I gave my life to Christ when I was in fifth grade. But fifth graders today are facing a cultural, political, and social climate that is stacked against Christians. Public schools are teaching sex education to fourth graders, telling kindergarteners to choose their gender, and writing curriculum based on critical race theory. As Christians, we have a strong sense of right and wrong, good and bad, true and false. Yet, our nation's children are being shaped by an education system that vehemently disagrees with our beliefs. **_America needs Christians who have the Holy Spirit working in their lives to stand up for what they believe and let the light of truth into our schools, communities, and culture._** That's exactly why **TPUSA Faith** launched **Kingdom to the Capitol** \- a series of live worship events in **_ALL FIFTY state capitals_** to ignite the flame of REVIVAL all across our country. **And, after reaching THOUSANDS with the Gospel and REVIVAL, we are in the FINAL WEEKS of our 2023 tour ... and we'll be roll through the final states in 2024.** [**Will you help TPUSA Faith finish our FINAL EVENTS for the Kingdom to Capitol Tour this year, with your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or more to help us reach as many people as possible before September 1?**](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[Support Kingdom to the Capitol](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
Our educational system should illuminate the world around us, helping us to see things as they truly are... revealing what's right, good, true, and beautiful. TPUSA Faith is on a mission to empower Christians who care about our nation's children and public education to go to school boards, classrooms, and city councils to boldly ask our leaders to do what is right. So far, **Kingdom to the Capitol** has visited almost half of America's capitals. We only have two more weekends, where we will visit six states to finish out this summer. We plan to roll through the rest of America in 2024. It's an ambitious goal. But these important events, empowered by the Holy Spirit and made possible by your generous partnership, are bringing the hope of the Gospel to every state capital in America. God is at work, I've seen it. [**Will you please pray for the success of our REVIVAL tour and support this mission for the glory of God, for the good of our nation's children, and the future of our nation?**](http://trk.readactnews.) I believe this is a season for revival for our nation. These are desperate times in America. Whether we're talking about public education, the spread of socialism, gender ideology, or abortion, you don't have to look far to see the darkness plaguing our country when it drifts from the truth of scripture. With the generous partnership of followers of Jesus - like you - TPUSA Faith will promote these powerful worship events far and wide, fill local church buildings with worshipers, and send an army of believers back into their communities. I pray that by coming together as believers in Christ, we will renew the hope of Christians and bring much-needed revival to our nation. [**As Christians, it often feels like we are being ganged up upon, which is why it's critical that we come together in powerful worship and prayer in EVERY state capital. But we can't do that without you. Will you please make a much-needed gift right now?**](http://trk.readactnews.) Our educational system should be filled with the Spirit as it teaches our children how to discern God's will, how to live in society, and how to be wise. But you and I both know that our current public education system has strayed as far as possible from this purpose. TPUSA Faith is working to engage, equip, and empower Christians to change the trajectory of public education - and our nation - for the future of our children. **Kingdom to the Capitol** is our most ambitious and historic revival tour yet, visiting every single state capital in America with the hope of restoring American Biblical values in schools and communities across our nation. [**Whether the Lord leads you to give $35, $50, $100, or some other amount, I hope you can support our FIFTY worship events during a desperate - and dark - time for America. In order to reach EVERY state capital, and save our nation, it's critical that we have your support today.**](http://trk.readactnews.)
---

---
Charlie KirkTPUSA Faith

name: Kash Patel
subject: The most personal email I’ll ever send you
body:
I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aee6dd652e71457e875acebd538691d2&_e=mXtk6s0RU0Pz7z8_S8ECilyDigmZrWKYrsIiH6AiYK9v2-h9DV1Wdmdke6y_nHq43PFm8aFgaFPiXp4oCKpuXZc5PfpkCPUIpVRGkt73eiOIKZnDleiuKgzuBly01GFrYoaYaudItiCQJSQ_kGDQ6LoR9WyIUgQSVqOtfkHLLDAiZaKy7-x6W2sSjykjkvzDsgcAsvymF_ldcfNBbWbq0CYJRSoYdt3ScACq5L6z43tjYxcGWZ9_zNlmIrT1T-7W)

Hello Friend,

I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

I have always loved my country.

That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, _good or bad_ , it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever ...**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

**My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it _intentionall_ y to get rid of President Trump.**

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees.

As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters.

I set a goal to raise **$45,000** by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal.

[As a personal favor, will you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to support these freedom fighters? Click here to rush your support before the deadline >>>](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aee6dd652e71457e875acebd538691d2&_e=mXtk6s0RU0Pz7z8_S8ECilyDigmZrWKYrsIiH6AiYK9v2-h9DV1Wdmdke6y_nHq43PFm8aFgaFPiXp4oCKpuXZc5PfpkCPUIpVRGkt73eiM5DnG6tbvQvVmvMztoyApvuPmiOZAmcivtjqgbB2WxjJIbXesIXHh6k1x9Fo2mVUWoCz8xXTqdMRDYrrGVEc4W_aZiW3X8tmxBM3hu9BE92coX4OIeh9YNf5AR6dSMoRT6O2Z5dZkpgY8K2jHTzgnS)

Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are **innocent** until proven guilty must join together in this fight.

Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system.

**This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution.**

Due process has been destroyed.

**We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. **

[I am humbly asking for your support. Join me in the fight for justice in defending patriots against abuse of the justice system by clicking here >>>](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aee6dd652e71457e875acebd538691d2&_e=mXtk6s0RU0Pz7z8_S8ECilyDigmZrWKYrsIiH6AiYK9v2-h9DV1Wdmdke6y_nHq43PFm8aFgaFPiXp4oCKpuXZc5PfpkCPUIpVRGkt73eiMCic5V8hYDERSGGEj9zOoEtiKP5YUXAeUdpgvyT6apMGwpx1I-yNognkKJ18kV6OEHusGPTF3UWKNvNL2Yv-SCKrC1vcHcGsbj2YciVeq9_W3_CTT8QXHgmTySo_XAcSNBI8Hcd3V9Qqf_Exsa63no)

Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots.

Whether you're a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that's what Kash Foundation is doing.

**Will you help me reach my goal by donating today? Please click any link below.**

clean_body: I never thought that my own government would spy on me. Hello Friend, I never thought that my own government would spy on me. I have always loved my country. That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, good or bad , it had to be published. When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. But this investigation changed my life forever ... Trump did NOT collude with Russia. My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionall y to get rid of President Trump. It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news. Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began... Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees. As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters. I set a goal to raise $45,000 by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal. Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are innocent until proven guilty must join together in this fight. Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system. This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution. Due process has been destroyed. We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots. Whether you're a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that's what Kash Foundation is doing. Will you help me reach my goal by donating today? Please click any link below. Thank you, Kash Patel P.S. The radical left cannot destroy our reputations with the media like they used to. Now, they are assisted by the two-tier justice system. A legal foundation is needed to help America-first patriots with these struggles. I refuse to watch this sham of justice, but I need your help defending whistleblowers and America-first patriots. Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56cce51563cd40498761ea3d3791278c&_e=Ov3FijoAWjySFq9UHKHg1V7K9IJemwoCcsWs0Omv0ZfYc51IcgUmbdlef6ImKFO3rVvcmiGtMk0zQvfHXDcmUi0GauB4KpvouaIzX4UPFOwoSmTyd6yyN6VoJ1SV6HRLkN7Py92LkTxVpSU9GUYK6nDXv2Rxdv69u4RsuC0ps520zmmBB5LqW1heHv051GP6Hazlm2ekC2pBCgaW8KkYnTIw_HiuWaxJdV9OpuUdj7IVzJ5LkBx-J23ItXLMSzgXMeNJNMFBj4iLMMOG6qHnehsjxfkHVFj6Lc502cowk8G1vzaqaUxXw9FVpA0ZFcJCBoQlg1x7kXJzYGKz6fhFl-RY5ch-hQeMQ1Ikx_YeKnH27JOkQpbQYNWqcudbLI3JbCxiPKlpj6dSwyajYXRkz568EQXUK9ohXbQeaIxVoeM%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56cce51563cd40498761ea3d3791278c&_e=Ov3FijoAWjySFq9UHKHg1V7K9IJemwoCcsWs0Omv0ZfYc51IcgUmbdlef6ImKFO3rVvcmiGtMk0zQvfHXDcmUi0GauB4KpvouaIzX4UPFOwoSmTyd6yyN6VoJ1SV6HRLkN7Py92LkTxVpSU9GUYK6nDXv2Rxdv69u4RsuC0ps520zmmBB5LqW1heHv051GP6Hazlm2ekC2pBCgaW8KkYnTIw_HiuWaxJdV9OpuUdj7IVzJ5LkBx-J23ItXLMSzgXMeNJNMFBj4iLMMOG6qHnekPNuFL6IEQoK5Kq3_9Bvm8JWWz26OPfx65AlqvJfrtb8bgd-vx_aTUuQaTV-ShebSDu7aDYeF1E5ZIibRdL5Z2XkiC263Og3Pvf0akKhA1Ym0gf3Gpy_TTsWyQt4GZIxbHnuYRemgkadAPvMUcBtes%3D)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.

Friend, Jason Aldean recorded a song praising small-town values, and the Radical Left has canceled him for it.

**Why?**

Because they want every small town in America to look like the socialist disasters in California and New York.

name: American Action News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0n48vjonmcfvrvic9b55uf3rr6h7ar79i6lccp0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cth69oj4clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z86jr0fscfvdk97u868ddoor43g8b171sl3fe1ho_rp22sh2s8i66p70cth69oj4clh2bs) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrr9v1qnrk5ub03uno7kr5bl9obr5lelumlq7cr8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cth69oj4clh2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeikrfbuncg3kjrhqafh3ng5o7hdfd9rj82b2nn0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni68ob1c5i6aoh1k8gn48n24hhm9o37c9ie4p35c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs834jish7qbadga9n2cf2g8ck1rkn0v3g2o1jo8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cth69oj4clh2bs)_

subject: your Official Biden Supporter membership has EXPIRED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Poisoned crops and flowers killing wild bees
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1904376?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Tell the EPA to ban _BEE-KILLING_ pesticides before it re-approves them for another 15 YEARS! >>** Picture this, Friend: you’re a round fluffy bumblebee, feeling wind through your fur and under your wings. The world at your size is beautiful – blades of grass like trees, and the actual trees like towering skyscrapers. Vibrant flowers are your personal landing pads, and the pollen you carry helps bring them to life for everyone to enjoy. **But the flowers you land on are _POISONED._ The toxic chemicals you’re exposed to make you uncontrollably TWITCH before becoming PARALYZED and DYING.** Neonic pesticides are KILLING BEES. Populations of vulnerable wild pollinators are plummeting. _**The EPA could ban these toxic chemicals –**_ instead, it might approve them for _**another 15 years!**_ YOU could help prevent over a dozen more years of bees being poisoned by neonics. [**HELP SAVE BEES: Send your message to the EPA before our urgent deadline of 11:59pm TONIGHT! We need 38 more signatures from your city to hit our goal!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1904377?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1904378?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Over the last two and a half decades, **the beloved Western Bumblebee population has dropped 93%** \- neonics are likely no small part of why.
Pollinators like these support **_1 of every 3 bites_ of food that we eat.** We rely on them for a huge range of healthy fruits and veggies that keep us healthy. Along with food crops, tens of thousands of flowering plant species around the world depend on them for survival. [**Tell the EPA to BAN neonics before they WIPE OUT vulnerable bees! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1904379?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1904378?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy Director of Science,
Friends of the Earth**
|

Ohio Issue 1 is bigger than just our state.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67276325/419198462/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230730OHIssue1_N_SB4C_90DO_4_NG_N_logo&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzAyZDhhMS1kMDJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EbKCOAA13pcAF_iZfYl0G9EUYGKwt6N04jIOgspOEpY=) They're attempting to smother democracy right here in Ohio, Peter.

Have no doubt Ohio Issue 1 is about much more than our upcoming vote on reproductive freedom. **_It's an extension of the GOP's attempts to control the balance of power and further their extreme agenda, and we know they'll stop at nothing._**

We've seen it when they stripped away our reproductive rights, despite years of precedent. We see it every time our election maps are redrawn with an edge in their favor. And, Peter, we're seeing it now as the GOP tries to shift public opinion on Democrats' historic progress by pushing to impeach the president.

[**_The only way to protect the rights of every Ohioan–of every American–is to take back the House and re-elect President Biden. body:
Claim your small town proud T-shirt before they turn your town into Chicago.

|

| | | |
Friend, Jason Aldean recorded a song praising small-town values, and the Radical Left has canceled him for it.

**Why?**

Because they want every small town in America to look like the socialist disasters in California and New York.

If you want to help protect small towns, you **NEED** to **[claim your limited edition"Small Town Proud" T-shirt right now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zglh2m02st6bv99qc0fl0fgnd8hhgvlg70eopai8_rp22sh2s8i66p70ctj6cpr4chh2bs "claim your limited edition “Small Town Proud” T-shirt right now.")**

---

The fact of the matter is the Radical Left wants people to forget that there are Americans outside of the big cities that don't support their insane agenda. _**They 're silencing Jason Aldean now, but they will come after you next.**_

**[That's why we're standing up for the forgotten American by giving away this T-shirt to anyone who donates just $35 to help help House Republicans stand up for small town values.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpuk0i9ph6qki6juhjpu8nkeg0je6c2kep3l1q7o_rp22sh2s8i66p70ctj6cpr4chh2bs "That’s why we’re standing up for the forgotten American by giving away this T-shirt to anyone who donates just $35 to help help House Republicans stand up for small town values.")**

name: Virginia House Democrats
subject: We’re officially 100 days away from Election Day here in Virginia.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Meet Our Moment
body:
| | | **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/6X0_gQD9LxlnhImjsyHNGDooHMHgld3rOeRbnt80eAw=/S99uVNbLI9MXSi81pZDIga1zrQJy--K_icO4_4iDiDU=)**
---
Friend -- We're officially 100 days away from Election Day here in Virginia! [Before we get into the stakes of this election, we're just $10,000 away from our July goal - and if even 10% of the people reading this email chipped in before our deadline tomorrow, we'd hit our goal without a problem. So, can you be the donor who puts us over the top by splitting a donation between Meet Our Moment and the Virginia House Democratic Caucus?](https://act.myngp.com/el/6X0_gQD9LxlnhImjsyHNGDooHMHgld3rOeRbnt80eAw=/jbKJW23hV54mO1L8r2Xj_TcSU5Lj0dd3u03SgvVcZYE=?refcode=20230730mom) Our Republican opponents are a disgrace to public office. ❌Just like Governor Youngkin, the Republicans running for the House are proudly anti-abortion. In fact, Geary Higgins (HD-30) said he's "thankful" for the Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe, and Michael Dillender (HD-84) pledged to defund Planned Parenthood; ❌Several echoed Trump's Big Lie. One attended one of the nation's earliest Stop-the-Steal rallies before the deadly Jan. 6th insurrection, another traveled to Detroit to be a poll challenger at the site of a major "Stop the Count" protest, another worked on Trump's legal team to overturn the 2020 election results in Wisconsin; ❌And let's not forget, the House Republicans are led by Speaker Todd Gilbert, who has voted against abortion care over 40 times. And with Glenn Youngkin having raised nearly $6 million in just the second quarter of the year, the stakes got even higher. [So we're turning to you - one of our most engaged and activist supporters in your community: Can we count on you to split a $25 donation between Meet Our Moment and the Virginia House Democratic Caucus before our end-of-month deadline tomorrow? Anything you're able to give will ensure our candidates can enter these final 100 days in the strongest position possible.](https://act.myngp.com/el/6X0_gQD9LxlnhImjsyHNGDooHMHgld3rOeRbnt80eAw=/jbKJW23hV54mO1L8r2Xj_TcSU5Lj0dd3u03SgvVcZYE=?refcode=20230730mom) You know better than anyone that the fight to take back the Virginia House of Delegates is about forging a future where our schools are fully funded, our communities are free of gun violence, and our rights aren't under the constant threat of MAGA extremists. Grateful for your support, Virginia House Democrats

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/6X0_gQD9LxlnhImjsyHNGDooHMHgld3rOeRbnt80eAw=/UmYdjwAzbGfllRbleYkdX9wSb9UK53Ju3xjXGtxWz2g=?refcode=20230730mom) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/6X0_gQD9LxlnhImjsyHNGDooHMHgld3rOeRbnt80eAw=/0THLqR_salTTu1uFnoYsFrjnzeRGr8Lvas4HRr7lnKU=)[](https://act.myngp.com/el/6X0_gQD9LxlnhImjsyHNGDooHMHgld3rOeRbnt80eAw=/Y5knLIewhmxgNS5nquWxCD3D_bx1ZO5GwuhbZUMh5fQ=) | Paid for and authorized by Meet Our Moment

name: Amy Brown
subject: I met my husband in the burn unit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada
body:
And ever since... | | |
---
Friend, The first time I met my husband, he was a patient in the burn unit. From the moment I met him, I knew there was something different about him.
---
[](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=24785ec5b5254e57a37c5ff8687a681e&_e=Ie84ZlWo9wkY8cJZno2BbD2jswlg3rL7MudIKHr_BFA1o5Vp5iCasntC5jaBoNer6JONxfDpbBLoCtGboDxmQXg_fBQTtmAiwfD-Jtk-g28XV_dEXptKn4bTEN21fKjn6JbM4sJZtQzR62UHkR3s-X6p4nN-W6LgVxLziQJeWS2VhNQLaXRuVuAE5gXXbfMON3fdCUjjErd1dBQB_HA_SQ04BUy_43M5rRV9SRYLxN1en0thpIp7cttys1sG4XylQDrhoiVGpSGprxUZZNlUuNJiH_CtB_IXg2C0nf6NjshsD7XtZ7mQh5-bK5b4fXYuubJpHusjjQDnTHLCTfNXbdg9YbQNz1HrKfo0dqcXEzRhfZxtCj6eQ5Vy6wVxNXDkyOi57doWlq5T1IRkAHDZWk5Inn7r5P2mtk6rmJ5h-a9jtN1r90ocmhlNAOEF5OnMkekVt5wfPav1OqrmmPGKQfpUUiUWj1Kx9U1CsDaBPUM%3D)
---
Sam had been severely injured by a roadside bomb that his vehicle ran over while he was serving in Afghanistan. As I got to know him better during his three year long recovery and rehab process, it became clear: **He 's an incredible man whose entire life has been dedicated to serving our country.** We were married soon after we met in the hospital. Getting to know Sam as a Christian, a husband, and a father, I can confidently tell you that he is a man whose heart is completely dedicated to serving God and Country. I'm telling you this because Sam is running for one of the most competitive Senate seats in the country. I want to ask you a favor. name: CRITICAL ELECTION UPDATE
subject: Everything is about to change, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for President
body:
Faith is a central part of my life.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83c65bce286b42d3857136861074460a&_e=DUlknxjRzE-8Lmwq_iJkkEzJTAws4SQvYfQloeZqGBhteeMTVMkf9y_OC77mY8VM9ysrDMBP_HANkr0h6ZdjOtCLSIroDKnTNADS2_U-YKwNs0QmMmVIlxHic97qMT2sbOexKGAfqwIZuEPcgvJ2LHZWRmmYFqINiJopoaWiZyDURtt4UPueNi42hh3-0-R13zPgfzr7UTNGVz2F_SKUvLhN7KIuES23zcGSEJs9wjDoreOFGIVP7oD9KANEfTCJa7DFAQJfXQ2aa_1ERrjZcRgU2L_q-Vm9u74KKGdbHt6uVCcTUVT_kW4h3J8MTmdDe_Ua-aPtnyW_aFSKGefkSnFqDn17PchaczWBVfDwN0QBEZHlmBxq2i_BtgMPVe9Y6nzxUK22-xcfhAfPHWxCWQ%3D%3D)
---

When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church.

That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18.

Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith.

As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 _" For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life."_

---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83c65bce286b42d3857136861074460a&_e=DUlknxjRzE-8Lmwq_iJkkEzJTAws4SQvYfQloeZqGBhteeMTVMkf9y_OC77mY8VM9ysrDMBP_HANkr0h6ZdjOtCLSIroDKnTNADS2_U-YKwNs0QmMmVIlxHic97qMT2sbOexKGAfqwIZuEPcgvJ2LHZWRmmYFqINiJopoaWiZyDURtt4UPueNi42hh3-0-R13zPgfzr7UTNGVz2F_SKUvLhN7KIuES23zcGSEJs9wjDoreOFGIVP7oD9KANEfTCJQBU0ygMVGINo-IZEeadDoGGV-bq8aZRGlU27FQ_DgbsifsP3PjK6i5_RfnZETmVxUrxhtEI3L9axKfPYSproloZ9zd-24VOkmIbmmFtUyjH9wyeJs9gIir63iqx3Izw-0IsYXkH8wjZlMycXymTRAg%3D%3D)
---

Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. _**I was born again.**_

Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, _**in that order.**_

Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people.

That's why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. **[Will you join me in this endeavor?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83c65bce286b42d3857136861074460a&_e=DUlknxjRzE-8Lmwq_iJkkEzJTAws4SQvYfQloeZqGBhteeMTVMkf9y_OC77mY8VM9ysrDMBP_HANkr0h6ZdjOtCLSIroDKnTNADS2_U-YKwNs0QmMmVIlxHic97qMT2sbOexKGAfqwIZuEPcgvJ2LHZWRmmYFqINiJopoaWiZyDURtt4UPueNi42hh3-0-R13zPgfzr7UTNGVz2F_SKUvLhN7KIuES23zcGSEJs9wjDoreOFGIVP7oD9KANEfTCJuRtnCG4JXMSanAoPX0znzhgZdd8q-HJTaTGkLqaPA8Z8kkI5Ct8aY1nufHOeTxQWaiy0YaFpfAq9_p5f0jH32egckhaZTAOWxftsQuXYJ3NI4r-k5CVkf77Q-bzATQ7v4Hs3mZYY_9C_vuer6yGU3A%3D%3D "Will you join me in this endeavor?")**

---
| | [Restore Faith In America](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=83c65bce286b42d3857136861074460a&_e=DUlknxjRzE-8Lmwq_iJkkEzJTAws4SQvYfQloeZqGBhteeMTVMkf9y_OC77mY8VM9ysrDMBP_HANkr0h6ZdjOtCLSIroDKnTNADS2_U-YKwNs0QmMmVIlxHic97qMT2sbOexKGAfqwIZuEPcgvJ2LHZWRmmYFqINiJopoaWiZyDURtt4UPueNi42hh3-0-R13zPgfzr7UTNGVz2F_SKUvLhN7KIuES23zcGSEJs9wjDoreOFGIVP7oD9KANEfTCJc-VsguXa0oRjCChUXfqLTHujJx0ZrrVll17_DfRY9ANZ_YQ_PHYqcVFJtFMcNs7q6HzFkxgm7fdo_lQNrU5DqhUXIfhQ3NgukZ3QzeQd_d747ONweFlCSro70BxlPf9o-LQ5UO-znKwllnZsQeYWnQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: Faith is a central part of my life. | | | | | | When I was younger, like a lot of people, I grew away from my faith and stopped attending church. That all changed when I was invited to attend a Tuesday night service at Hanover College in Indiana at 18. Although church was a requirement growing up, it wasn't until I heard my friends at Hanover College speak about their personal relationships with God - something I had never experienced but felt drawn towards - that I began my own journey to find my faith. As my Freshman year of college was coming to an end I joined some friends on a road trip to a Theological Seminary. I sat on a hillside surrounded by believers amid preaching and music and for the first time in my life, I truly heard the words of John 3:16 " For God so loved the world that he sent his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life." | Once the music stopped I found a volunteer counselor and prayed to receive Jesus Christ as my Lord and Savior. A decision that changed my life forever. I was born again. Since that moment faith has been a central part of my life and today I am not afraid to say I am a Christian, conservative, and a Republican, in that order. Today, America lacks leadership that is guided by its belief in God. Instead, we have leadership that attacks the religious principles our nation was built on and puts their self-interests over those of the American people. That's why I am focused on bringing back humility and faith to our nation's capital. "Will you join me in this endeavor?" | | I know that with the faith of the American people God will heal our land. body:
Claim your small town proud T-shirt before they turn your town into Chicago.

|
---
| | | |
Friend, Jason Aldean recorded a song praising small-town values, and the Radical Left has canceled him for it.

**Why?**

Because they want every small town in America to look like the socialist disasters in California and New York.

If you want to help protect small towns, you **NEED** to **[claim your limited edition"Small Town Proud" T-shirt right now.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2307g1n9vpd51g168h39d24q6faa5eht47m4r20_rp22sh2s8i66p70ctj66ob6clh2bs "claim your limited edition “Small Town Proud” T-shirt right now.")**

body:
Friend, we were so excited. After Sherrod reached out about this critical goal, grassroots support started pouring in from every corner of the country to help us win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue.
---
**But after that initial surge, donations have slowed – and now, we're falling way behind!**
**That's why we're asking YOU to chip in $5 – or as much as you can spare – before tomorrow's midnight deadline so we can turn this around before it's too late. Please, will you help us get back on track?**
**Here's the link one more time:[https://secure.actblue.com/sherrod-brown/July-goal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67278850/419208019/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk367-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGY3NjU2Ny1kYTJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wtYgvEz5laDJQz6MqMTZY1DGthlvWASnDoX_AicDa7U=) **

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Sherrod**
Date: Sat, Jul 29, 2023
Subject: our deadline is just around the corner
| | |
---
Friend – I just set an incredibly ambitious but important goal to raise $100,000 before our end-of-month deadline on Monday. Before I ask you to help me get there, I want to explain why this is so important.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67278854/419208022/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk367-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGY3NjU2Ny1kYTJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wtYgvEz5laDJQz6MqMTZY1DGthlvWASnDoX_AicDa7U=)
Experts from _FiveThirtyEight_ say I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, and _CNN_ reports that Mitch McConnell is personally zeroing in on me as a top target for defeat.
**McConnell, his special interest allies, and the GOP are laser-focused on flipping my seat red because they know – as well as we do – that Ohio could decide Senate control.**
Ohio's last Senate race was _by far_ the most expensive our state has ever seen, costing more than the previous three races combined. So I mean it when I say that in a battleground this competitive, grassroots support from folks like you will be the difference between winning and losing.
**[So what do you say, friend? If you care about winning in Ohio and defending Democrats' Senate majority, will you please chip in $5 – or any amount that's meaningful to you – to help me hit my critical end-of-month goal before our deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67278857/419208026/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk367-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGY3NjU2Ny1kYTJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wtYgvEz5laDJQz6MqMTZY1DGthlvWASnDoX_AicDa7U=)**
I can't thank you enough for being a member of my grassroots team.

With gratitude,
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67278860/419208029/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk367-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGY3NjU2Ny1kYTJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wtYgvEz5laDJQz6MqMTZY1DGthlvWASnDoX_AicDa7U=)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Is there ANYTHING I can say
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
What if I told you now that control of the Senate is going to come down to Arizona — and with it, the fate of everything we’ve worked so hard for over the last several years.
#

Peter -
I am writing to ask if there is ANYTHING I can say to convince you to make your first online $3 contribution to my campaign for Senate before our July fundraising drive ends?
Please let me try:
What if I told you now that control of the Senate is going to come down to Arizona — and with it, the fate of everything we’ve worked so hard for over the last several years.
What if I told you that President Biden needs us to run a strong campaign and win in Arizona, because if we can win here it’s all the more likely that he can win, too.
And what if I told you that our July fundraising has been slow and we really need to close the gap or we, and President Biden, will be a lot more vulnerable going into a critical stretch of this race.
So what do you say? I know $3 may not seem like an election-winning amount, especially in such an important state, but thousands of people are adding their $3 right now and are really hoping you’ll do the same.
Can you?

body:
|

[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=301%2E52803%2EEijjQc)

| | This isn’t my first rodeo, Peter. I’ve worked on enough races that I can confidently give you a couple universal truths for competing in big elections like this one. _1) Fundraising isn’t always fun, but try running a successful campaign without money (spoiler, you can’t)._ _2) If you want to win, you have to hit your goals and deadlines, no two ways about it._ **Angela is giving this race everything she’s got, and I’m all-in on getting her elected.[If you’re with her, will you consider pitching in a quick $25 to help us hit our July End-of-Month goal?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4477?t=10&amount=25&akid=301%2E52803%2EEijjQc)** | | | [Donate](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4477?t=11&amount=25&akid=301%2E52803%2EEijjQc)
---
We’re trailing significantly behind where we should be if we’re going to hit this $25,000 number for July, and while I try not to live and die by every single reporting number, I’m more than a little nervous about where we’re at.
I told Angela that I’m not ready to hit the panic switch just yet though, because we’ve seen this grassroots team come through in the clutch before, and I’m banking on it doing so again.
**[Our deadline is tomorrow night and it would mean the world to Angela to see your name on our donor list, Peter. Can you pitch in $25 to help us clear this pesky July goal?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4477?t=12&amount=25&akid=301%2E52803%2EEijjQc)**

name: Caroline Pratt
subject: Peter : Wanted to make sure you saw this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC
body:
Peter,

We’re right on top of our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and I wanted to make sure you saw the email we sent last week. We’ve launched a series of digital ads about how radical Republican policies are putting our democracy at risk.

The ads are working, and we’d like to keep them going. Can you donate $25 today to help make that happen?
Donate today! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=073023_EOMJul-link1]

Give $25 today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=073023_EOMJul-button1]

Best,
Caroline Pratt
Finance Director, Georgia House Democrats

-------- Begin forwarded message --------

Peter ,
We’ve launched our latest digital ads campaign. And it’s all about preserving voting rights.

As you might know, a raft of legislation – including some laws already passed and signed by Governor Kemp – is allowing GOP-led counties to remove officials from local Election Boards and replace them with their own cronies.

Counties like Ware have already had Election Board members dismissed, simply because they are Democrats. And there are more counties to come.

It’s no coincidence that these ousted Election Board members are also often members of under-represented communities, such as women and people of color. We’re determined to point out this blatant discrimination to voters.

And you can help us do it. Your $25 donation can help us show our ads to at least 10,000 more people, to show Georgia voters how their rights are being systematically taken away from them. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=073023_EOMJul-link2]

Give $25 today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=073023_EOMJul-button2]

Let's keep the momentum going.

Onwards,

Georgia House Democrats

The Georgia House Democratic Caucus is Georgia’s most diverse group of leaders working on the ground in Georgia every day to flip the State House and secure a blue Georgia. To create the change we need, we’ll need all the help we can get. Will you join the movement for a blue Georgia by donating today?

DONATE TODAY! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=073023_EOMJul-button3]

Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC
Georgia House Democratic Caucus
PO Box 18622
Atlanta, GA 31126
United States

name: The Team at the Long Run
subject: It’s a Sunday so we’ll make this quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Friends -
No one wants to be reading emails on a Sunday afternoon. But we are emailing today because we have no other option.
Tomorrow at midnight, July comes to a close and so does our July fundraising drive.
The summer has been tough for our movement, and truthfully we need a strong 24 hours in order to get close to reaching our goals.
So we’ll get straight to the point:
[**Will you please contribute any amount, no matter how big or small, to our movement ahead of our July fundraising deadline? Every single donation will help us continue supporting changemaking candidates across the country.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jul23.p2zS7g&refcode=em230730-1-t1&t=1&akid=4697%2E196590%2EPhwCLF)
It would mean a lot to Mandela and our team if you can contribute today.
Thank you,
The Team at the Long Run

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=4697%2E196590%2EPhwCLF). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=4697%2E196590%2EPhwCLF)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=4&refcode2=4697_196590_PhwCLF&akid=4697%2E196590%2EPhwCLF)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=4697%2E196590%2EPhwCLF)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

In just a few days, campaigns like mine and The Collective PAC will be hustling to close fundraising gaps for our end-of-month deadlines.

**This is a big deal for my Senate campaign.**

I’d be the first Black person elected to the Senate from Delaware. Pundits understand that our race is historic and they’ll use our fundraising numbers as a bellwether of our viability. With experts predicting a tough cycle for Democrats, it’s imperative that we show strength at every single deadline. This is especially true for a historic campaign like ours.

**Here’s why I’m reaching out:** [we pulled the numbers and to be blunt, we are a bit behind. We can close the gap, but I do need to ask you to split $10 today between my campaign and The Collective PAC, before this hole gets worse. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | May I have just a second of your time, Peter? In just a few days, campaigns like mine and The Collective PAC will be hustling to close fundraising gaps for our end-of-month deadlines. This is a big deal for my Senate campaign. I’d be the first Black person elected to the Senate from Delaware. Pundits understand that our race is historic and they’ll use our fundraising numbers as a bellwether of our viability. With experts predicting a tough cycle for Democrats, it’s imperative that we show strength at every single deadline. This is especially true for a historic campaign like ours. Here’s why I’m reaching out: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Lisa Blunt Rochester and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | I know your money is hard-earned, and I don’t make this ask lightly. I’m so grateful for anything you can give. All my best, Lisa The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Team Zak
subject: The House Majority could hinge on this race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
We need to show that we have the grassroots support to beat George Santos and flip NY-03 blue.
#
Hi, Team Zak here with a quick update on our end-of-month goal:
[**We still have a ways to go, so can we count on you to pitch in $11 right now to help us get there?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230730?amount=11&refcode=em20230730&refcode2=346_8507_-Y-nZG&akid=346%2E8507%2E-Y-nZG)
Our primary competitors are able to lend their campaigns a lot of their own money, and it has been predicted that **this district will be home to one of the most expensive races in the country in the general election.**
That’s why it’s crucial that we continue to reach our fundraising goals while also showing that we have the grassroots support to beat George Santos and flip NY-03 blue.
[**If everyone reading this chips in $11, we will reach our end-of-month goal — so please make a donation if you can. The House majority could depend on the outcome of this race!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230730?amount=11&refcode=em20230730&refcode2=346_8507_-Y-nZG&akid=346%2E8507%2E-Y-nZG)
**[Donate $11 now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230730?amount=11&refcode=em20230730&refcode2=346_8507_-Y-nZG&akid=346%2E8507%2E-Y-nZG)**
Thanks,
Team Zak
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=346%2E8507%2E-Y-nZG)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=346%2E8507%2E-Y-nZG)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)
PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: The GOP is desperate to unseat me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Wisconsin is home to some of the most competitive races in the country.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=730%2E35263%2EpSGdRN)
Peter, it’s clear as day that the GOP is desperate to unseat me and flip Wisconsin red. In just a moment, I’m going to explain why. But first, I have to ask: **[Will you be one of 10,000 donors to help our campaign reach tomorrow’s end-of-month goal?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jul23.xghWlz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230730_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=730%2E35263%2EpSGdRN)** Wisconsin is home to some of the most competitive races in the country — including last year’s Senate race, which Republican Ron Johnson won by _just 1%._ Our race next year could be just as close, and the GOP knows this could be their chance to flip one of the two seats they need to take back the Senate majority. That’s why they’re trying to recruit mega-millionaire Republicans with the ability to bankroll their own campaigns to defeat me. National Republicans probably aren’t wrong to think that our race next year will be highly competitive — **but they'd be wrong to underestimate this grassroots team.** I’ve seen firsthand the strength of our team and all that we can accomplish together, and one thing I know for sure is that we won’t back down from a tough fight. **[Peter, would you consider making a donation of any amount before tomorrow’s July fundraising deadline?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jul23.xghWlz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230730_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=730%2E35263%2EpSGdRN)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-jul23.67wLy_&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230730_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=730%2E35263%2EpSGdRN)

name: Stand with Jason Aldean via House Republicans
subject: The Radical Left is trying to cancel small towns!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Claim your small town proud T-shirt before they turn your town into Chicago.

|
---
| | | |
Friend, Jason Aldean recorded a song praising small-town values, and the Radical Left has canceled him for it.

**Why?**

Because they want every small town in America to look like the socialist disasters in California and New York.

If you want to help protect small towns, you **NEED** to **[claim your limited edition"Small Town Proud" T-shirt right now.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5c1600087cf543748c4f31ecf480ece4&_e=HK40RNLDc6wi2hSUMlY3ubmUp2iSMwPlABeAlS_y4hxNF9ou0hl68oOQmVRIZxWbqO7f02ZJNbStGTIXsKiJY0QzJDOYjMl2QjkfVdE337hVGNmR_znvnQRBa0Hk7fQnNrhVrN8uPc7UR_r2p2LWS-bTdMmz5aTDxHCznZojom8n5JzXgAbt3uQp-OnjRJgJGYfhsBL7HcOLY8lFW2qEG8rAAcjl8P8HN-kzQ7jV1qAt3MoglPF73T_Jt_QiSHLz04ASarnp6oNiMkcfUIjxeu3i8Ur21xPwMST14Na7UNPzAQkxe8_1995cfS-OZmULcXPWuz-Op_D62lDTKthSy0IRTWw1V7-RkI8Aqi8cBMsWWSdwiOb-2f-S_rRlLyBgDSwH1LhOpiSeoxt_iC-bYBT693kATDoYVgTuR0i7PVg59hxblgC-5sEHX_i4TIP2FD2oHaEStsIa1uK_VPW8Wg%3D%3D "claim your limited edition “Small Town Proud” T-shirt right now.")**

name: President Trump
subject: Senate Republicans have asked me to reach out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
To my most loyal supporters for their input

Friend - President Trump here.

Senate Republicans have asked me to reach out to **my most loyal supporters for their input. **

_With 2024 right around the corner, we are asking fellow Patriots if you are still with us. _

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: An election update
body:
Another Democrat has engaged in sketchy campaign finance schemes while running for higher office. And, as always, we have you covered on what's going on in your own backyard. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62083048:sQ-hnxDNQ:m:1:2610672541:2413955714F8F36A204A3F115A7AB6D1:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends, The August Primary is Tuesday, so time to get your ballots in (if you haven't voted already). While you're pondering your choices, as always, we have you covered on what's going on in your own backyard. Read on... ** ** **This week 's Newsmaker Interview...** This week's Newsmaker Interview featured Spokane Good Government Alliance (SGGA) Executive Director John Estey, discussing the upcoming elections in the city. With the primary election imminent, Spokane faces a crucial choice between moderate/conservative approaches and liberal/extremist proposals. Mayor Nadine Woodward, who has faced obstacles from the five liberal councilmembers who have controlled the seven-person city council since her election in 2019, this year is being challenged by career politician and former Jay Inslee cabinet member Lisa Brown. Four of the seven city council seats (including City Council President) are also up for election. Estey shed light on SGGA's mission, its key concerns for the 2023 elections, and highlighted leading candidates for the Mayor and City Council President positions. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62083049:sQ-hnxDNQ:m:1:2610672541:2413955714F8F36A204A3F115A7AB6D1:r)**.** **This week 's top story...** The Seattle Times editorial board actually criticized Attorney General Bob Ferguson for attempting to evade Washington's campaign finance laws and concealing the identities of his campaign donors, potentially exceeding legal contribution limits. The state's largest paper called on Ferguson to uphold the spirit of open government and transparency, emphasizing that he should reveal the sources of his dark money transfers. Despite previous highlighting of his actions by Shift, Ferguson has shown no remorse for his actions, raising concerns about his commitment to the law and public disclosure. [**Read this story and more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62083050:sQ-hnxDNQ:m:1:2610672541:2413955714F8F36A204A3F115A7AB6D1:r)**.** **In case you missed it ...**
The Capital Press editorial board criticized Governor Jay Inslee for leading a misleading public relations campaign, blaming private industry for high gas prices in Washington, when in fact his own policies, particularly the carbon-emission allowance auctions including in his cap-and-tax law, are causing the surge. They argued that Inslee is trying to divert attention from the very intended consequences of his carbon tax policy, which was meant to increase fossil fuel prices to reduce consumption. [**Read this story and more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62083051:sQ-hnxDNQ:m:1:2610672541:2413955714F8F36A204A3F115A7AB6D1:r)**.** **This week 's bit of inspiration...** Take a moment to enjoy the beautiful sunset over Fort Casey State Park here in Washington State, courtesy of former U.S. Representative Rod Chandler. | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62083052:sQ-hnxDNQ:m:1:2610672541:2413955714F8F36A204A3F115A7AB6D1:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14258976&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osQ-hnxDNQ).
---

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhu05fgk8c99f7715tci8klmv74gfnlue0a7mpto_rp22sh2s8i66p70ctgm0o36c1h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

before our end-of-month deadline because unfortunately, we're still short

name: Replace Sinema
subject: It’s so hot that CACTI are dying
body:

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Please give me a chance to explain.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
The only way we can stay in these fights is if we're in them together.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=391%2E791427%2EhQ6vY_)

Hey team, it's Ilhan.
I'm writing today to ask you to make a $3 contribution to our people-powered campaign for Congress. I'll explain more in just a moment, but if that's all you need to hear, please use this link:
**[https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/July-Deadline](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july23.iXCXH5&refcode=em230730-1-t2&t=2&akid=391%2E791427%2EhQ6vY_)**
Here's the situation:
Tomorrow at midnight, we're closing the books on our July fundraising, and have some important goals to reach before then to ensure our campaign has the resources it needs to win and continue our movement's struggle for justice.
But what do we mean when we say that?
We mean continuing to fight for Medicare for All, and making health care a human right.
We mean continuing to fight for a Green New Deal, and combating the disastrous effects of the climate crisis here at home and all across the planet.
We mean continuing to fight for labor rights, so that working people nationwide get the wages, benefits, and conditions on the job that they deserve.
We mean continuing to fight for an end to endless wars, and giving a voice to the voiceless all around the globe who have been killed, injured, displaced, or made to suffer for the inhumanity of our foreign policy.
We mean continuing to fight back against a rejuvenated right wing and a political establishment who seek to silence the voices of all who disagree with them — and who will do and spend whatever it takes to maintain the status quo.
We mean continuing to fight for all that and so much more.
But the _only way_ we can stay in these fights is if we're in them together.
As you know, this campaign is funded by lots of lots of small-dollar, grassroots donations from regular people all across the country. No super PACs, no billionaires. Just a movement standing together and showing they're a part of a fight for something larger than themselves — $5, $25, or $50 at a time.
The truth is that if we're going to win again in 2024, it's going to take a lot of resources. So that is why I'm asking you today:,

clean_body: The only way we can stay in these fights is if we're in them together. Hey team, it's Ilhan. I'm writing today to ask you to make a $3 contribution to our people-powered campaign for Congress. I'll explain more in just a moment, but if that's all you need to hear, please use this link: Here's the situation: Tomorrow at midnight, we're closing the books on our July fundraising, and have some important goals to reach before then to ensure our campaign has the resources it needs to win and continue our movement's struggle for justice. But what do we mean when we say that? We mean continuing to fight for Medicare for All, and making health care a human right. We mean continuing to fight for a Green New Deal, and combating the disastrous effects of the climate crisis here at home and all across the planet. We mean continuing to fight for labor rights, so that working people nationwide get the wages, benefits, and conditions on the job that they deserve. We mean continuing to fight for an end to endless wars, and giving a voice to the voiceless all around the globe who have been killed, injured, displaced, or made to suffer for the inhumanity of our foreign policy. We mean continuing to fight back against a rejuvenated right wing and a political establishment who seek to silence the voices of all who disagree with them — and who will do and spend whatever it takes to maintain the status quo. We mean continuing to fight for all that and so much more. But the only way we can stay in these fights is if we're in them together. As you know, this campaign is funded by lots of lots of small-dollar, grassroots donations from regular people all across the country. No super PACs, no billionaires. Just a movement standing together and showing they're a part of a fight for something larger than themselves — $5, $25, or $50 at a time. name: Team Alex Padilla
subject: You deserve an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Democrats are defending more seats, including multiple seats in states that Donald Trump won in 2020.
#

$5.
That’s what we’re asking you to donate to Alex Padilla today, but first, you deserve an explanation for why your $5 is so important.
In 2022, Alex mobilized folks across the country to support Democratic candidates, like Mark Kelly and Catherine Cortez Masto.
Now, as Co-Chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee, he’s gearing up to once again try to defend our Senate majority, but Democrats are defending more seats, including multiple seats in states that Donald Trump won in 2020.
That means that any signs of vulnerability now could invite more spending from the GOP and their billionaire donors. **It would be a huge problem and would put our Senate majority at risk.**
So our job is to make clear that Alex is prepared to support Democrats no matter what comes our way. Every donation sends a powerful message that we’re prepared to fight back and hold the Senate for Democrats.
$5 might not seem like the kind of money that can make a difference in the fight for the U.S. Senate, but that’s the good news: **it’s not just your $5.**
Before you opened this email, someone already chipped in $5, and someone else will add their $5 by the time you’re done reading. When we all do our part, it adds up fast.
**That’s why your donation today is so important. Can you join everybody else who is pitching in right now by donating $5 or any amount you can?**
[**Please make a $5donation to our campaign today to keep Alex Padilla in the Senate. Our July fundraising deadline is tomorrow, so this is a very important moment for grassroots support.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-july23.J7FMSH&refcode=em230730-1-30&t=1&akid=1445%2E159979%2E3Db0bS)**

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m at my wits’ end

|
---
| | |
I’m at my wits’ end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don’t do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump’s Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I’m also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL’s that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I’m one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can’t beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663831%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RGtUqIp0yYQQLer7KTG28w&sysid=1 "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I’m going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663832%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9Vd8CClyJXkUgE1kKmAZJA&sysid=1 "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden’s plan to destroy our nation.

I’m humbly asking you, as a warrior who’s fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663833%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JDwTdkiWRAL8ofzcTRfFKA&sysid=1 "DONATE TODAY")
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663833%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JDwTdkiWRAL8ofzcTRfFKA&sysid=1 "DONATE TODAY")

name: Ben Staton, Courier Newsroom
subject: Hi, Peter 👋🏻 it’s Ben (Courier Newsroom’s Finance Director).
body:
I’ll be honest: we have our work cut out for us.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1304%2E120351%2EDNnOMi)
Hi, Peter 👋🏻 it’s Ben (Courier Newsroom’s Finance Director).
I’m sending you a quick message because we only have about **24 hours** left to reach our July fundraising goal.
It’s my job to crunch the numbers and come up with a game plan for how we can raise the remaining $6,000 we need to ensure our news teams have the resources they need to debunk misinformation and cover important local news stories.
**I’ve been combing through our supporter records, and here's what we currently have on file for you:**
**_Peter's Official Supporter Record_** **Courier Supporter Status:** **Not active yet!*** **Suggested Donation: $5** **[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230730?refcode=em20230730&amount=5&refcode2=1304_120351_DNnOMi&akid=1304%2E120351%2EDNnOMi)**
_*This data reflects donations made online with this email address. If you've made a previous contribution through another payment method, you may not see it reflected above — but know that the Courier Team is grateful for your support._
---
**I’ll be honest: we have our work cut out for us.** The 2024 election cycle is gaining speed. Right-wing groups like Moms for Liberty are moving into our communities and pushing their extreme agenda. And bad actors like Donald Trump are spreading misinformation left and right.
By chipping in today, you’ll play a key role in powering the important work our newsrooms are doing and help our reporters deliver trustworthy, accessible news to readers across the country.
**We have just 24 hours to reach our July fundraising goal, and we’re counting on supporters like you.****[Will you make your first $5 contribution now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230730?refcode=em20230730&amount=5&refcode2=1304_120351_DNnOMi&akid=1304%2E120351%2EDNnOMi)**
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230730?refcode=em20230730&amount=5&refcode2=1304_120351_DNnOMi&akid=1304%2E120351%2EDNnOMi)**
Thank you,
Ben Staton
_Finance Director_
_Courier Newsroom_
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1304_120351_DNnOMi&akid=1304%2E120351%2EDNnOMi)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1304%2E120351%2EDNnOMi)

Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Sharing some Sunday morning reflections with you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I feel so much hope when I think about the progress we have made together since GIFFORDS was founded ten years ago
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july23.pfB_59&refcode=em230730-1-15&t=1&akid=6230%2E3935704%2EdeHBtK)
---
Hi friends, it’s Gabby Giffords.
While I was enjoying my coffee this morning, I found my thoughts drifting to all of you and the movement for gun safety that we’ve created. I feel so much hope when I think about the progress we have made together since GIFFORDS was founded ten years ago, and I hope you do too.
Hundreds of thousands of people have stepped up and contributed to GIFFORDS since our founding. And each contribution, no matter how big or small, has made a huge impact on our movement.
In the past ten years, GIFFORDS has helped pass over 525 gun safety laws at the state level. Last year, we passed the most significant federal gun safety legislation in nearly three decades. This progress is real, and it did not happen overnight. But there’s so much work to do. We can only keep moving forward through the sustained grassroots support of people like you.
That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. Our July fundraising drive comes to a close tomorrow at midnight, and my team tells me that we’re still short of our goals.
[**So please, will you chip in $3 or any amount that makes sense for you to GIFFORDS PAC right away? Time is running out, and I’m worried we won’t get where we need to be before the month ends.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july23.pfB_59&refcode=em230730-1-15&t=2&akid=6230%2E3935704%2EdeHBtK)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-july23.np0YAl&amount=3&t=21&akid=6230%2E3935704%2EdeHBtK)**

---
****
Thank you. Never underestimate how important your $3 is to GIFFORDS PAC and our movement to end gun violence.
With courage,
Gabby Giffords

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

#

body:
This election affordability is on the line for the everyday hardworking Virginian families.

| Peter,

Hi, it’s Brigid with Freedom Virginia. I’m reaching out with important information on early voting in Virginia.

The first day of early voting in Virginia begins on _**September 22, 2023!**_

This election affordability is on the line for the everyday hardworking Virginian families, and it is up to us to vote for affordability by electing economic freedom champions.
