name: Your America
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29394%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YnxYR0kfhJlJhQ95vIexVg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29305%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b4yzPQByUMEX1J9j5uZz3g&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c29305%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b4yzPQByUMEX1J9j5uZz3g&sysid=1) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Letitia James
subject: I hate doing this, but I have to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | |
---
Peter, asking for money is my _least favorite_ part of running a campaign, but some days, there's just no way around it.
**Today is one of those days.

But right now, we have an exciting opportunity – until the end of the month, an incredibly generous group of donors has offered to MATCH 250 donations – but with only _one day_ left in this offer, we still have 101 match opportunities left.**
[**So even though it's not my favorite thing to do, I have to ask: Will you chip in now to activate your 2023 Membership and have your donation DOUBLED? If we fall short, we _will_ be leaving money on the table.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67289328/419247987/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1141-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmIzMDI3NS1lYTJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Y-Z3m_t10XN8iGh5e_TpvgZp3-rXjtVdPQXYbjC9JU=)

But now, I urgently need your help to continue our critical work. Failing to hit my 250 membership donations goal and leaving match funds on the table is simply not an option – not when we have so many big fights ahead of us.

**So please, can I count on you to donate $5 right**** now to activate your membership and have your gift for progress MATCHED?**

Thank you for being such a vital part of this team.

Letitia
| With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families?

Peter – did you see Seth’s message?

Earlier this month, Republicans passed a dangerous bill that restricts the ability of women in the military to access abortion. And now, they just launched a new attack against our campaign. The NRCC will do whatever it takes to take back their slim House majority, and we need to stop them if we want to put an end to their harmful tactics.

[Our July fundraising deadline is Monday night, and we don’t have a moment to waste this summer. Will you chip in right now to help us reach our $7,500 goal and end the month strong?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67290182/419251136/-1711477341?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20230730_FR_eom1.3_0_1MO_teammagaziner_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODMwMzQ5ZC1lYzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ovnNks5pE1nJjPgDs6cn-IWqH6fVhYC85kb4pDxXk3g=)

* * *
**_Read Seth’s Message Below:_**

Peter,

Earlier this month, House Republicans passed an extreme bill that makes it hard for women serving in the military to access abortion care and attacks LGBTQ+ service members and their families.

It’s outrageous that extreme Republicans seek to undermine our national defense to pass dangerous and partisan attacks on Americans’ rights, and it’s more clear than ever that we need to take back the House next year to put a stop to their dangerous agenda.

**We’re up against our next fundraising deadline on Monday at midnight, and my team tells me we need to raise another $7,500 to stay on track with our funding benchmarks.**

You’ll often hear about a summer slump in politics — when fundraising and energy drops during the summer. We need to fight back against the summer slump and make sure we can keep building our campaign ahead of our next competitive race in 2024.

body:
Will you help us? | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67290194/419251204/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWU2YjNiMS1lYzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LH0_1s3y5ScjnDffPVcSoAMx5b6ws5gP0I0ZltztBZc=&emci=7b7a121e-6c2d-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=c5e6b3b1-ec2e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=15529135) | When our team reached out yesterday about the major end-of-month fundraising deadline, we received an uptick in support. To all who contributed, thank you so much. **[As one of just a few races that will determine the outcome of 2024, we need your support! Consider making a $5 monthly recurring contribution today ahead of our critical July deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67290195/419251205/974063209?recurring=1&refcode=E3529-20230729-EOM2-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWU2YjNiMS1lYzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LH0_1s3y5ScjnDffPVcSoAMx5b6ws5gP0I0ZltztBZc=)** | [DONATE $5 MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67290196/419251206/974063209?recurring=1&refcode=E3529-20230729-EOM2-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWU2YjNiMS1lYzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LH0_1s3y5ScjnDffPVcSoAMx5b6ws5gP0I0ZltztBZc=)
---
As we begin to build the infrastructure to win in 2024, we know we have our work cut out for us. Not just to KEEP the gains Democrats have made, but to finally break the tide of extremism that has taken over the Republican Party.
While the GOP has been concerned with gutting Medicaid and Social Security, ignoring calls for gun safety legislation, and removing reproductive rights state by state, Democrats like Jahana have been busy fighting for food assistance and expanding access to health care and education.
**Jahana is building on the work she has done in 2019 to bring even more wins here in Connecticut, and across America. **
But that work requires year-round organizing, conversations with voters all over the state, and of course, money. Your contribution will go towards supporting and growing our reach across the state.
[**So,****friend******,** can you donate $25 to our end-of-month goal? clean_body: Will you help us? | | When our team reached out yesterday about the major end-of-month fundraising deadline, we received an uptick in support. To all who contributed, thank you so much. = | = As we begin to build the infrastructure to win in 2024, we know we have our work cut out for us. Not just to KEEP the gains Democrats have made, but to finally break the tide of extremism that has taken over the Republican Party. While the GOP has been concerned with gutting Medicaid and Social Security, ignoring calls for gun safety legislation, and removing reproductive rights state by state, Democrats like Jahana have been busy fighting for food assistance and expanding access to health care and education. Jahana is building on the work she has done in 2019 to bring even more wins here in Connecticut, and across America. But that work requires year-round organizing, conversations with voters all over the state, and of course, money. body:
| | **In 2022, over half of the 500 candidates endorsed by extremist group Moms for Liberty won their respective school board races, including many in New Jersey. Now, they are working to expand their influence and target more races this November.**

**We can’t and won’t let them win.** These MAGA-aligned groups have funding, and they are going to pour it into our local school board elections. But most voters agree with our anti-censorship message. If we want to keep partisan culture wars out of our schools and protect our children’s education, we need to make sure they hear that message. That means investing in our local races NOW.

[The candidate filing deadline is the end of this month, and we have set a fundraising goal of $50k. With your help, we could get $500 to 100 candidates so they have the basic resources they need to win their elections. name: Team Katie Porter
subject: What your $16.80 contribution does
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Our goal is to reach all 21,980,768 registered voters in California—but we need your help.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=27147%2E3422442%2Ese6377)
Derek, there are three numbers you should know:
**
21,980,768**
**
1,000**
**
$16.80**
**There are 21,980,768 registered voters in California**—and our campaign’s goal is to reach as many of them as we can, including rural voters, first-time voters, Republicans, and independents.
One of the most effective ways to reach voters is through sending texts. In fact, recent research shows that 98% of texts are opened—compared to under 20% of emails being opened. But sending texts isn’t free.
**The cost of texting 1,000 voters at a time is just $16.80.**
Polls show that when voters learn about Katie’s career standing up to special interests and the most powerful corporations to deliver for California families, we win. We just need your help to share her values and experience with voters across our state.
**[Can you make a donation of $16.80 today to help us contact 1,000 registered California voters?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230730-1?amount=16.80&refcode=EMAJ30_1_TEX_20230730_V1_F&refcode2=27147_3422442_se6377&akid=27147%2E3422442%2Ese6377)**

Thanks for your support,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ30_1_TEX_20230730_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=27147_3422442_se6377&akid=27147%2E3422442%2Ese6377)**

| | Friend,

---
I had an incredible time at my rally in the battleground state of Pennsylvania.

---
**_Pennsylvania is where our Founding Fathers declared American Independence._**
---
_And in 2024, Pennsylvania may very well be the tipping-point state where the American people declare our victory and our triumph over tyranny.
_
---
_Who would’ve thought that we’d ever witness a U.S. President order the ARREST of his leading opponent right in the middle of a presidential election for doing NOTHING wrong?_

---
But sadly, that is the current state of our nation under Crooked Joe’s tyranny.

---
Not only is Crooked Joe the most corrupt president in history, he is also the most INCOMPETENT.

---
Under Biden, millions of illegal aliens have trespassed across our borders, the Middle Class is being decimated by horrific inflation, hardworking Americans are getting brutalized by the Green New Deal crusade, savage criminals are being set loose in Democrat-run cities while innocent Republicans are being viciously persecuted, men are competing in Women’s Sports, and the worst president of all time is stumbling us to the brink of nuclear war.
---
But all of that ends when we win a crushing victory on November 5, 2024.

---
While my primary opponents are choosing to attack _ME_ – in the midst of the worst witch hunt in history – I am focused on the REAL MISSION of winning back the White House and FIRING the Crook who is decimating our once great country.
---
_I will continue to travel from battleground state to battleground state and do whatever it takes to win the 2024 election and SAVE AMERICA._

---

clean_body: This could truly be the tipping-point state of 2024.| | | | | Friend, I had an incredible time at my rally in the battleground state of Pennsylvania. Pennsylvania is where our Founding Fathers declared American Independence. And in 2024, Pennsylvania may very well be the tipping-point state where the American people declare our victory and our triumph over tyranny. Who would’ve thought that we’d ever witness a U.S. President order the ARREST of his leading opponent right in the middle of a presidential election for doing NOTHING wrong? But sadly, that is the current state of our nation under Crooked Joe’s tyranny. Not only is Crooked Joe the most corrupt president in history, he is also the most INCOMPETENT. Under Biden, millions of illegal aliens have trespassed across our borders, the Middle Class is being decimated by horrific inflation, hardworking Americans are getting brutalized by the Green New Deal crusade, savage criminals are being set loose in Democrat-run cities while innocent Republicans are being viciously persecuted, men are competing in Women’s Sports, and the worst president of all time is stumbling us to the brink of nuclear war. But all of that ends when we win a crushing victory on November 5, 2024. While my primary opponents are choosing to attack ME – in the midst of the worst witch hunt in history – I am focused on the REAL MISSION of winning back the White House and FIRING the Crook who is decimating our once great country. I will continue to travel from battleground state to battleground state and do whatever it takes to win the 2024 election and SAVE AMERICA. | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

**[Please chip in if you can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67290697/419253383/2043242937?refcode=em-7.30.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjFlNTQxOC1lZTJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yJG3XDBAddn5ooD9UrXKmDr520Jzbh2iVjBBzUSp7hk=)**

[**I checked ActBlue, and unfortunately, I’m still 4,302 gifts short of my goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67290706/419253387/1662333042?refcode=20230730_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTE5ODNmNi1lZDJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NVyNQiX0VYWUVk9_XfCSNb9Chod5Zdsu7H3UsnEffC4=) [_**So I’m reaching out to my supporters who haven’t donated yet to ask you to donate $15 to help us reach our target. name: Team Cori
subject: Top lawmakers’ ties to slavery.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Our government profited off the enslavement of Black people. | |
---
Peter, **Last week, Florida changed its school curriculum to require students be taught lies about Black history, including that enslaved people benefited from slavery.** Florida’s governor Ron DeSantis and Fox News hosts have defended this move, trying to argue that enslaved people learned useful skills. **Cori Bush responded on Twitter, stating:**
> _“Chattel slavery wasn’t an innocent jobs program—it was a crime against humanity. Black people did not benefit from being owned, dehumanized, raped, beaten, terrorized, and killed for generations. You know who did benefit from these atrocities? The United States government.”_
**For centuries, the government condoned and profited off the enslavement of Black people. clean_body: Our government profited off the enslavement of Black people. | | Peter, Last week, Florida changed its school curriculum to require students be taught lies about Black history, including that enslaved people benefited from slavery. Florida’s governor Ron DeSantis and Fox News hosts have defended this move, trying to argue that enslaved people learned useful skills. Cori Bush responded on Twitter, stating: “Chattel slavery wasn’t an innocent jobs program—it was a crime against humanity. Black people did not benefit from being owned, dehumanized, raped, beaten, terrorized, and killed for generations. You know who did benefit from these atrocities? clean_body: Fighting for human rights for all people, with no exceptions: | | | Friend, I’m a justice seeker who fights against oppressions of all forms, and we need more Democrats in Congress to join me in standing up for human rights for all people—including Palestinians. Unfortunately, AIPAC and its affiliated PACs spent over $40 million in last year’s political races to defeat progressive Democratic candidates who are sympathetic to Palestinians’ human rights. AIPAC claims to be bipartisan, but they hosted Donald Trump at their annual conference and endorsed insurrectionist Republicans who voted to overturn the will of the American people in 2020’s election. Last year, pro-Trump billionaires donated millions to AIPAC’s network of PACs in order to defeat progressives in Democratic primaries and attack Democrats in general elections. AIPAC has proven they’re not only anti-Palestinian, but also anti-democracy and anti-progressive. | Together, we’re building a stronger movement in Congress to end U.S. complicity in Israel’s human rights abuses against Palestinians. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Jul 29, 2023 Subject: Sign now to tell Democratic candidates: Reject support from anti-Palestinian AIPAC and its network of PACs To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Because of my advocacy for Palestinian rights, pro-apartheid groups like AIPAC have targeted me—and other colleagues who speak up for human rights. They want to maintain the unjust status quo, and they’re threatened by the shift in U.S. public opinion in support of Palestinian liberation. To stifle our movement’s growing power, AIPAC and its affiliated PACs spent over $40 million in last year’s political races to defeat progressive Democratic candidates who are sympathetic to Palestinians’ human rights. They bully my colleagues to go silent or support rhetoric that dehumanizes Palestinians. Pro-Trump billionaires donated millions to these PACs in order to shape the Democratic Party in primaries and attack Democrats in general elections. AIPAC also hosted Donald Trump at their annual conference, and the group keeps endorsing insurrectionist Republicans who voted to overturn the will of the American people in 2020’s election. Clearly, AIPAC is not only anti-Palestinian, but also anti-democracy and anti-progressive. It is out of alignment with many of us who are fighting for working families. Democratic candidates should refuse financial support or endorsements from pro-apartheid groups like AIPAC or its connected PACs. Democratic voters have shown in recent polls that they sympathize with Palestinians and do not want their taxpayer dollars to support the Israeli government’s human rights abuses. Like all human beings, Palestinians deserve to live and thrive. When pro-apartheid organizations and Members of Congress try to silence me or other progressive women of color speaking up for Palestinians’ rights, they’re trying to maintain the unjust status quo that treats the Palestinian people as less than human. As the far-right apartheid government in Israel is escalating attacks on Palestinians—backed by billions of U.S. taxpayer dollars—we need more Democrats who are willing to join me in taking on the status quo and standing up for human rights for all people, including Palestinians. Thank you for taking action in solidarity with oppressed people. Together, we’re fighting for human rights for all people, with no exceptions. In service, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Team – With less than [**24 hours to go before our end-of-month deadline**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67291662/419257025/-1207523720?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2023.07.30_b1_tl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWRmYWJkYy1mMTJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3VwCfcVPeGojyVaB6VXzCNLqMuCKwJhGJinAhWFSzOQ=), we wanted to give the 30,000 foot view of the campaign to highlight why [**your grassroots support is so vital right now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67291663/419257026/-1207523720?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2023.07.30_b1_tl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWRmYWJkYy1mMTJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3VwCfcVPeGojyVaB6VXzCNLqMuCKwJhGJinAhWFSzOQ=) → | _**July 2023 Race Update: Ohio’s First Congressional District**_
1. [**Extreme Republicans are hopping in the race to challenge Greg.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67291664/419257027/-1207523720?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2023.07.30_b1_tl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWRmYWJkYy1mMTJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3VwCfcVPeGojyVaB6VXzCNLqMuCKwJhGJinAhWFSzOQ=) Our first Republican challenger jumped in the race last week – and he’s the same level of chaos and extremism that we defeated last year.

2. [**The momentum is on our side, but that means we’re more of a target.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67291665/419257028/-1207523720?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2023.07.30_b1_tl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWRmYWJkYy1mMTJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3VwCfcVPeGojyVaB6VXzCNLqMuCKwJhGJinAhWFSzOQ=) Our race was just upgraded from “Toss Up” to “Lean Democrat”, showcasing the power and strength of this grassroots team. But now, Republicans are going to fight harder than ever before to flip this seat back to red.

3. [**With so much at stake, we can’t take our foot off the gas.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67291666/419257029/-1207523720?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2023.07.30_b1_tl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWRmYWJkYy1mMTJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3VwCfcVPeGojyVaB6VXzCNLqMuCKwJhGJinAhWFSzOQ=)The future of reproductive freedom, gun violence prevention, and democracy itself hinges on what happens here in OH-01 – because we know a Democratic House Majority runs through the district. And with so much on the line, there’s no room to slow down.

---
**As you can tell, our race is heating up.** That’s why we need to kick off August in the strongest position possible.

[**Your grassroots support is so uniquely important this month, so please: Is there any amount you can contribute to our campaign before the month ends? But now, Republicans are going to fight harder than ever before to flip this seat back to red. 3. future of reproductive freedom, gun violence prevention, and democracy itself hinges on what happens here in OH-01 – because we know a Democratic House Majority runs through the district. It may not seem like a lot, but small grassroots donations can make a powerful difference in sustaining a reelection campaign — especially when folks chip in this early in the race.

**And with MAGA Republicans already targeting our district, they’ll be looking extra, extra close on what we can raise.**

I’ve been making some waves in Congress— the kind of waves that the GOP doesn’t like. The kind of waves that pulls back the curtain on who the MAGA Republicans are really working for.

Believe me when I say that a donation of just $1 makes such a difference in a campaign like this. It helps us hit our fundraising goals and keep a seat like mine safe.

Despite how it's often portrayed by politicians and pundits wanting to score political points, the economy and our environment aren't at odds with each other.

The work I've done as Washington's Commissioner of Public Lands is proof of how, when we work together to tackle our problems with proper planning and strategy, every Washingtonian benefits.

I know we can address our greatest environmental and economic challenges at the same time. _**I did it with the Washington State Department of Natural Resources by cleaning up our forests and using the dead wood to create sustainable timber, reforesting millions of acres, signing a lease for the biggest solar plant in our state's history, and more – creating jobs, putting more money in more families' pockets, and boosting local economies.**_

Now, I'm ready to create solutions as Washington's next Governor. Together, I know we can solve our community's greatest problems. By addressing our housing crisis and rising costs, protecting our land and water, and expanding healthcare access, we can deliver a brighter, more prosperous future for us all. [_**So, Peter, can I count on you to join me in working together to solve Washington's challenges by contributing $10 or whatever you can afford to my July fundraising deadline? With less than 48 hours, there's no time to spare.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67291977/419258657/-165497492?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20230730-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmMwZTA1NDctZjIyZS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uEu-EM_5t2481vyiklKf7m5g7ZT_651PN2FXjb_z6sI=)

Friends,
In less than 24 hours, we face our July fundraising deadline and we need your help.
We have set a goal to reach 250 individual grassroots donations before midnight tomorrow and can’t get there without your support.
So what do you say?
[**Can you please contribute to Robert’s reelection campaign before his July end-of-month deadline tomorrow? Every single donation will put us one step closer to hitting our goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67292062/419258811/1180538877?refcode2=e24efc25-f22e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&refcode=em230730-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjRlZmMyNS1mMjJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aCBifHqRCxe11oNtmVrsqUb6krnJRoqjXjuPEXbr_0U=)

Every donation will ensure we have the infrastructure to reelect Robert and do all we can to flip the House Blue.
Thank you in advance for your contribution!
\- Team Robert

The Biden-appointed Special Counsel has brought NEW BOGUS CHARGES against me in the same witch hunt known as the Documents Hoax.
The Deep State isn't just trying to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as an innocent man. They're trying to jail me for the _**equivalent of 5 LIFETIMES**_.

They are trying to intimidate YOU out of choosing a political outsider who puts the needs and interests of OUR country FIRST.
But they've severely underestimated our movement.
**You see, they can keep racking up false charges and false charges until they 're ready to JAIL me for _1,000 YEARS_ - and even then, I will NOT, UNDER ANY CIRCUMSTANCES, SURRENDER OUR MISSION TO SAVE AMERICA.**
They cannot break me. They cannot bribe me. And they cannot buy me.
Because I know that if they can get away with doing this to a former president like me, NOTHING - absolutely nothing - is stopping them from doing something equally as sinister to a private citizen like YOU.
If you are doing poorly right now due to the sinister people running our country, please don't even think about donating.

| | Throughout this email, we’ll walk you through exactly what Georgia Republicans have done this year to silence voters and tilt elections in their favor — and how Fair Fight is fighting back. Starting with the latest: **This month Republican Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger announced a plan to cancel over 191,000 Georgians’ voter registrations in August, ahead of the 2024 election cycle — disproportionately impacting voters of color. ** Fair Fight is fighting back to make sure voters can prevent their registration from being canceled, or get themselves back on the rolls if they’re purged, and we’ve set a goal of raising 200 donations from across the country by tomorrow at midnight to sustain this work. That goal isn’t just a random number — it’s what we’ve determined we need to stay on track towards our July target, and the rest of our 2023 targets to protect the freedom to vote. [_**Donate right away to become one of the 200 donors we need in the next 36 hours, so that Fair Fight can continue our full-scale efforts to counteract Georgia Republicans’ voter suppression attempts.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67292421/419260026/1781144800?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230730_f_stopkemp1_v1s2&ms=bsc_emm_ff_20230730_f_stopkemp1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTIyODg5Mi1mMjJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nzMPHcARkDd9_QIO6X_Q4IQLrwn3Ere8pjzpYn6toQ=) | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67292423/419260027/1781144800?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230730_f_stopkemp1_v1s2&ms=bsc_emm_ff_20230730_f_stopkemp1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTIyODg5Mi1mMjJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nzMPHcARkDd9_QIO6X_Q4IQLrwn3Ere8pjzpYn6toQ=)

This assault on our democracy is just the latest we’ve seen from Governor Brian Kemp’s administration this year. This past May, Kemp signed three laws to take over county Boards of Elections (BOEs) aiming to remove lawfully-appointed Black BOE members and Democrats from their ranks, and replace them with Republican chairs.
He also signed SB 222 to criminalize election officials and deny them additional funding for elections, and SB 92 to create a state commission to target and remove democratically-elected district attorneys and subvert the will of Georgia voters in the process.
**Make no mistake — each of these efforts is a calculated attempt to swing the 2024 election cycle in Republicans’ favor.**
[_**Make a donation right away to become one of the 200 donors we need to keep up our efforts to stop extremist Republicans’ voter suppression attempts in Georgia and protect the freedom to vote for elections to come.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67292429/419260030/1781144800?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230730_f_stopkemp1_v1s2&ms=bsc_emm_ff_20230730_f_stopkemp1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTIyODg5Mi1mMjJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nzMPHcARkDd9_QIO6X_Q4IQLrwn3Ere8pjzpYn6toQ=)

name: Urgent Response Needed (via team Waltz)
subject: Deadline in 24 hours
body:
I’m reaching out to my most loyal supporters with an urgent ask| | | Team Waltz here with a dire deadline that needs your attention,

We won’t beat around the bush, **July has been our slowest month for fundraising this year,** and it’s severely impacting our reelection campaign.

It’s not too late to get back on track - we still have 24 hours until the end of July deadline and we need to show up in force.

**[Will you chip in to Col. Mike Waltz’s campaign today to supercharge our numbers and put us back on schedule?](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=046deac616274b849740dd2ec4db1e28&_e=05WcVlNC5h0JloxEgTtEbzlku8MoHYAAFfUFGR51lYa60unPX54CtTyBROB_SyRV-_atK7YL3UF_Dts0X5u4YS6UXAoX-DvfBIcXCL9vEULoZqHeaat1tEzorQTn4dp4kTK5wPlTP9p07ErDkzipDyaLfystm3L6igt3xYoH3lMADzVF0TzMgSTahdHHlW6-bhz2IAbw5rsU1Fd5_nmFrrbMH4WVNQmQQMaiE18b1sDtT50De3rj5O993YvFmeUGGTDrO7uaXgq3cipBxMPvKmybRBUD22anfU5uUCGihTudRYo25U22z5T8jU52oHbasn_uNLHKpWN3qubBLT_-2Y7BeYtvyEWgrNQuZLeh_54%3D)**

---
[_**CHIP IN TODAY**_](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=046deac616274b849740dd2ec4db1e28&_e=05WcVlNC5h0JloxEgTtEbzlku8MoHYAAFfUFGR51lYa60unPX54CtTyBROB_SyRV-_atK7YL3UF_Dts0X5u4YS6UXAoX-DvfBIcXCL9vEULoZqHeaat1tEzorQTn4dp4kTK5wPlTP9p07ErDkzipDyaLfystm3L6igt3xYoH3lMADzVF0TzMgSTahdHHlW6-bhz2IAbw5rsU1Fd5_nmFrodlzewHM8LmAU0ZNpNIDnLTSE-vQ0navkMMT8qrtjtR6747bygTUhHxssFIkEiNGLYv4SyCM_ow87JyXRLZ5QeXL6pRyWr_GP-Xr0HwvQ7e63513glG6ayx90z_BbmkSCQgWnRwh93M5XeSFMMnMLw%3D)

Falling behind on our fundraising goals would be a disastrous scenario for our campaign. If we show any sign of weakness this far out from election day, we’ll be easily crushed by the radical-left billionaires in Washington.

name: Colin Allred
subject: personally asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Hi, friend, it's Colin, and I had to reach out one more time before our end-of-month deadline because unfortunately, we're still short of our $100,000 goal.
Our ability to defeat Ted Cruz depends on reaching critical fundraising goals like this one. 2018 was the most expensive Senate race Texas has ever seen, and Democrats came within 2.6% of defeating Ted Cruz.
And listen: A new poll says 14% of Texas voters are undecided – so we need to be able to reach each and every voter to win this race.
Please, friend, I'm personally asking: Will you chip in $20, or whatever you can spare, and split a donation between my campaign and Serve America before my July fundraising deadline? Every dollar helps in our fight to defeat Ted Cruz →
Here's the best link to make your gift: secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thank you so much for believing in this campaign enough to support it. I know we can win this race together.
Colin

clean_body: Hi, friend, it's Colin, and I had to reach out one more time before our end-of-month deadline because unfortunately, we're still short of our $100,000 goal. Our ability to defeat Ted Cruz depends on reaching critical fundraising goals like this one. 2018 was the most expensive Senate race Texas has ever seen, and Democrats came within 2.6% of defeating Ted Cruz. And listen: A new poll says 14% of Texas voters are undecided – so we need to be able to reach each and every voter to win this race. Please, friend, I'm personally asking: Will you chip in $20, or whatever you can spare, and split a donation between my campaign and Serve America before my July fundraising deadline? Every dollar helps in our fight to defeat Ted Cruz → Here's the best link to make your gift: secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [] Thank you so much for believing in this campaign enough to support it. I know we can win this race together. Colin Sent from my iPhone. Please excuse any typos. name: Barbra Streisand
subject: Repairing the world
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
This is Barbra Streisand and I’m reaching out today to ask for your help. | | |
---
Hi, Peter. It’s Barbra Streisand. I have always been moved by the Jewish tradition of ‘Tikkun Olam,’ meaning “repairing the world.” I truly believe that President Biden and Vice President Harris are the perfect people to bring our country together to make that possible, Peter. So I’m reaching out today to ask you to join me in supporting them. name: Vivek
subject: If you agree with just one of these principles...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Somewhere along the way, America forgot it was founded on truth. The politicians and media don't want you to be reminded of these facts.
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWN1jtxDoN)
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62077973:WN1jtxDoN:m:1:2532013465:24C5CAC6757A5A61DC5DDE0DC37F39FE:r)

Fellow American,

**TRUTH.** There's only one. Not yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic political climate where spin is all the Administrative state knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to say them:

|
**God** is real.
There are **two** genders.
Human flourishing requires **fossil fuels**.
**Reverse racism** is racism.
An open border is **no border**.
**Parents** determine the education of their children.
The **nuclear family** is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
**Capitalism** lifts people up from poverty.
There are three branches of the U.S. government, **not four**.
The **U.S. Constitution** is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.
| [** CHIP IN IF YOU BELIEVE IN THE TRUTH **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62077973:WN1jtxDoN:m:1:2532013465:24C5CAC6757A5A61DC5DDE0DC37F39FE:r)
---

America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. **Without these truths, our standing as a nation would mean nothing.**

If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, _**[I need you on my team.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62077973:WN1jtxDoN:m:1:2532013465:24C5CAC6757A5A61DC5DDE0DC37F39FE:r)**_

This is about more than a campaign. It is a movement to revive this great nation. **[Will you join me today by chipping in $1 or more?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62077973:WN1jtxDoN:m:1:2532013465:24C5CAC6757A5A61DC5DDE0DC37F39FE:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62077973:WN1jtxDoN:m:1:2532013465:24C5CAC6757A5A61DC5DDE0DC37F39FE:r)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** STAND WITH THE TRUTH **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62077973:WN1jtxDoN:m:1:2532013465:24C5CAC6757A5A61DC5DDE0DC37F39FE:r)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62077973:WN1jtxDoN:m:1:2532013465:24C5CAC6757A5A61DC5DDE0DC37F39FE:r)

---

clean_body: Somewhere along the way, America forgot it was founded on truth. The politicians and media don't want you to be reminded of these facts. | Fellow American, TRUTH. There's only one. Not yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic political climate where spin is all the Administrative state knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to say them: | God is real. There are two genders. Human flourishing requires fossil fuels. Reverse racism is racism. An open border is no border. Parents determine the education of their children. The nuclear family is the greatest form of governance known to mankind. Capitalism lifts people up from poverty. There are three branches of the U.S. government, not four. The U.S. Constitution is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history. | America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. Without these truths, our standing as a nation would mean nothing. If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, This is about more than a campaign. It is a movement to revive this great nation. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Kash Patel
subject: The most personal email I’ll ever send you
body:
I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuj620r2ave970g79vs65p32s2lm4430fhf86u18_rp22sh2s8i66p70ctgm9o34c9h2bs)

Hello Friend,

I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

I have always loved my country.

That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, _good or bad_ , it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever ...**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

**My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it _intentionall_ y to get rid of President Trump.**

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees.

As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters.

I set a goal to raise **$45,000** by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal.

[As a personal favor, will you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to support these freedom fighters? Click here to rush your support before the deadline >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpgs29vfs1s4h16aqe626fdlbu8b4t75ko4a0p70_rp22sh2s8i66p70ctgm9o34c9h2bs)

Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are **innocent** until proven guilty must join together in this fight.

Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system.

**This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution.**

Due process has been destroyed.

**We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. **

[I am humbly asking for your support. Join me in the fight for justice in defending patriots against abuse of the justice system by clicking here >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1c4n1dk7cr4rvhhq26v144s7erc7v1b7ujthiu0_rp22sh2s8i66p70ctgm9o34c9h2bs)

Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots.

Whether you're a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that's what Kash Foundation is doing.

**Will you help me reach my goal by donating today? Please click any link below.**

[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf0ul3g182at92m8e8en718bdg6fd8u51g34qpqo_rp22sh2s8i66p70ctgm9o34c9h2bs)
[Donate $35 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z25ttqiuam9522of4upfm1lr42qg8tnb3n8o5m70_rp22sh2s8i66p70ctgm9o34c9h2bs)
[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zudljlcprtp6ti8t4mrlvmn2r7d0t73upt3desfo_rp22sh2s8i66p70ctgm9o34c9h2bs)
[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc8q273u8t66e8n2hmajc825r567tn8j535qv9m8_rp22sh2s8i66p70ctgm9o34c9h2bs)
[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpo1mdc75jc5ltcrvg8jpk4va3qu3kk0a7p8it0o_rp22sh2s8i66p70ctgm9o34c9h2bs)
[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr0veb5qdv2gihc0crfmiv26s3qk8bboc9g7vfcg_rp22sh2s8i66p70ctgm9o34c9h2bs)
[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1ftrlshmbvkmvjdirva636u17isc97079c2kudg_rp22sh2s8i66p70ctgm9o34c9h2bs)
[Donate $2,500 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkuo6h4faipss0v955vu6g2ifi6g9anmr695cpgg_rp22sh2s8i66p70ctgm9o34c9h2bs)
[Donate Any Amount >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhabqbv6eig5gnk22u94pfiud4aprstuctt7quc0_rp22sh2s8i66p70ctgm9o34c9h2bs)

Thank you,

Kash Patel

**P.S. The radical left cannot destroy our reputations with the media like they used to. Now, they are assisted by the two-tier justice system. A legal foundation is needed to help America-first patriots with these struggles.**

I refuse to watch this sham of justice, but I need your help defending whistleblowers and America-first patriots.

[Will you help me raise $45,000 before the end of the week to support the Kash Foundation? Click here to send $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9qulfd1lahb6eqcce3rb9mda7ric0clnlploq90_rp22sh2s8i66p70ctgm9o34c9h2bs)

name: Team Keith Potts for Senate
subject: A behind-the-scenes peek into our work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keith Potts for Senate
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230730_em_fr_b1_TKP_react [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230730_em_fr_b1_TKP_react]
Friend, last time you heard from Keith, he was telling you how much he loves traveling up and down the state to meet our residents (if you missed it, we attached it here at the bottom).
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230730_em_fr_b1_TKP_react [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230730_em_fr_b1_TKP_react]
While we've been having a blast getting to know people across Indiana, we'll be honest – traveling for Team KP is a lot easier said than done.
We're working hard to afford actual travel costs, pay for our hardworking staff, and – because we can't show up empty-handed – campaign materials like yard signs and literature.
Friend, this gets expensive really quickly , and we'd hate to miss out on telling people about Keith's plan for the future.
Our End of Month Fundraising Goal is the perfect opportunity to show your support and help us continue to meet Hoosiers across the state. But the deadline is approaching FAST. Will you chip in any amount today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230730_em_fr_b1_TKP_react]
REACH OUR GOAL [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230730_em_fr_b1_TKP_react]
Thank you,
Team Keith Potts for Senate
---------- Begin Forwarded message ---------
From: Councillor Keith Potts <info@keithpotts.com>
Date: Sat, July 29, 2023
Subject: This is a big deal, Friend
To: < dpwillis67@gmail.com >
Friend, my team and I have been busy attending events and meeting Hoosiers across the state!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230730_em_fr_b1_TKP_react [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230730_em_fr_b1_TKP_react]
This is easily one of my favorite things to do – I love getting to know our residents and hearing their thoughts on how folks in Washington should be doing their job.
I've heard from a lot of people, and one common theme keeps presenting itself: Indiana needs change.
While there's a lot to celebrate about our state, those things often get outshined by the GOP's attack on our freedoms – freedoms to vote, to make our own medical decisions, and to feel safe in our communities.
That's why I'm fighting to bring my people-first vision to Washington – one that focuses on helping our working families, keeping our neighborhoods safe, and protecting our democracy.
But if we're even going to make it to Election Day, contributions from our friends and neighbors are absolutely essential. Our End of Month Fundraising Deadline is the perfect opportunity to show your support – will you chip in toward our $7,882 goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230730_em_fr_b1_TKP_react]
CHIP IN TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230730_em_fr_b1_TKP_react]
Thank you,
Keith Potts
Keith Potts was first elected in 2019 to represent District 2 on the Indianapolis City-County Council.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230730_em_fr_b1_TKP_react [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230730_em_fr_b1_TKP_react]
Keith’s political work has been centered on issue-based campaigns and progressive candidates, with a particular focus on protecting women’s rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and the environment.
He is an arts advocate, having graduated in 2012 from the Boston Conservatory of Music with a Bachelor of Fine Arts degree. He works with local non-profit arts organizations, teaching after-school music classes, directing, and performing with organizations like the Phoenix Theatre, Indy Shakes, Indianapolis Chamber Orchestra, Actors Theatre of Indiana, and Civic Theatre. Keith currently lives on the north side of Indianapolis with his husband, Dr. Bryan Dodd, and their rescue dog, Mak.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to

body:
We need your help before the deadline.
#
Peter,
We’re closing the books on our July fundraising tomorrow at midnight and we haven’t met our goal yet. But here’s the good news: we’re within striking distance. We can definitely get there if grassroots supporters like _you_ join us and **[make a contribution to keep the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67294862/419268867/-1035601772?refcode=dd_em_230730_1_b&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmFhYWRiNC1mOTJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bHkL01ozuz3ccpE04TnA3z4uGVARNzU7QM11nAYqnm8=)**

Just last week, Senator Durbin led the Judiciary Committee in marking up and voting to pass historic Supreme Court ethics reform. And just like he’s done for his entire career, we know he will keep showing up and doing his part to push for more progress.
**[Your donation right now will support Senator Durbin’s work to protect the Democratic Senate majority. we’re still short of our goal

| Hi, Peter, it's Colin, and I had to reach out one more time before our end-of-month deadline because unfortunately, we're still short of our $100,000 goal.

Our ability to defeat Ted Cruz depends on reaching critical fundraising goals like this one. 2018 was the most expensive Senate race Texas has ever seen, and Democrats came within 2.6% of defeating Ted Cruz.

**And listen: A new poll says 14% of Texas voters are undecided – so we need to be able to reach each and every voter to win this race.**

**Please, Peter, I'm personally asking: Will you chip in $5, or whatever you can spare, and split a donation between my campaign and Upset the Setup before my July fundraising deadline? Every dollar helps in our fight to defeat Ted Cruz →**

We’ll get right to it: Our grassroots fundraising has taken a major hit this month.**[Tomorrow is our critical July fundraising deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67295235/419270564/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.30_b2_eshq_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGViMGU4OS1mYTJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jsXuKoO9wBaJhHY9DoRuKn7IvlDXnT_u2qLJnQi9v1g=)** and we’re still running**$2,700 behind** where we need to be.

**We’re no strangers to competitive elections, so we know that staying on track with fundraising is absolutely essential to our path to victory next fall.** And with Washington Republicans gearing up to spend millions of dollars against Emilia — we can’t afford to waste a single second when it comes to building up the resources we need to fight back.

Bottom line: If we don't close our fundraising gap by the end of the month, we run the risk of having to scale back our campaign.

[**So can we count on you to pitch in before the end of the month to help us close out July in the strongest position possible? http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2307-q3-wn-stein?refcode=230730-email-stein [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2307-q3-wn-stein?refcode=230730-email-stein]

Peter-
This is the most competitive and consequential gubernatorial race in 2024, and the polls are proving it.
Recent polling has us in a DEAD HEAT with our far-right opponent Mark Robinson.
This poll tells us what we already knew — statewide races in North Carolina are won on razor-thin margins, and this race will come down to every last vote.
Peter, North Carolina is a deep purple state. We’ll have to out-organize, out-work, and out-raise the GOP to keep the Governor’s Office blue.
We WILL NOT go back.
Josh Stein needs YOUR help to take on Republicans’ big money machine — and he’s proud to be powered by grassroots donors like you in the fight to hold this seat. Can you split a contribution of any size to our campaign and Wiley Nickel today to say you’re with him? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2307-q3-wn-stein?refcode=230730-email-stein]

Derek, want proof that this campaign is truly a grassroots operation?
**Our average contribution amount is $35. And we’re proud of it.**
Adam’s campaign for the Senate is powered by small-dollar donors. Donors like Sharon in Los Angeles, who pitched in $25 on the day this campaign launched, or Robert in San Jose, who chipped in $3 when Adam was censured by MAGA Republicans in Congress.
Each donation of $5, $50, or $35 is a sign that people stand with Adam in his efforts to protect our democracy and keep MAGA extremism at bay in the halls of power.

body:
The day before the anniversary of the Supreme Court’s disastrous Dobbs decision, I woke up to Fox News and Lauren Boebert attacking my sister and my 81-year-old father.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67296483/419274796/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTYwMzQzNi1mYzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pqao-PRM_KTZ4MHX9PTlSVFwRzZqDFQwQNFL1zpuGV0=&emci=5358bf3f-fb2e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=19603436-fc2e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67296484/419274797/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTYwMzQzNi1mYzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pqao-PRM_KTZ4MHX9PTlSVFwRzZqDFQwQNFL1zpuGV0=&emci=5358bf3f-fb2e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=19603436-fc2e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
The day before the anniversary of the Supreme Court’s disastrous _Dobbs_ decision, I woke up to Fox News and Lauren Boebert attacking my sister and my 81-year-old father.
For decades, Dad was an OB-GYN. He delivered thousands of babies and wrote books on how to get pregnant and to navigate menopause. Dad provided women with full access to all kinds of reproductive health care, including abortions, in the years right after _Roe_ – and he has now had to watch as women’s reproductive rights are gutted in the aftermath of _Dobbs_.
Dad and his clinic faced many threats over the years. It’s no exaggeration to say that he put his own safety – and that of his family – at risk in order to protect the rights of women to make their own medical decisions.
But I’m not sure he ever expected to see a sitting member of Congress attacking him – or my sister who followed in his footsteps – in a national news outlet. **It’s disgusting. These kinds of personal attacks against my family have no place in our politics and do nothing to serve the people of Western and Southern Colorado.**
If Lauren Boebert wants to have a conversation about reproductive rights in this country, I am more than happy to have that debate. We can talk about how I support _freedom_ and _liberty_ – and how she supports big government intruding into the lives of women. We can talk about how Boebert supports a national ban on abortion – with no exceptions for rape, incest, or the life of the mother. And we can talk about how Lauren Boebert is so extreme, she even wants to ban the pill that’s been used by women for decades.
I am willing to talk all day about Lauren Boebert’s fringe view that the government should be dictating women’s medical decisions. **But what I won’t accept is Lauren Boebert and Fox News attacking my father and my sister.**
I am _incredibly_ proud of my father. He provided health care to women when they needed it during some of the happiest – and most devastating – moments of their lives. Before retirement, he would drive two hours to Planned Parenthood and help teach the next generation of health care providers, like my sister. And no one – not Fox News, and especially not Lauren Boebert – is going to stop my family from continuing to stand up for a woman’s right to choose.
**Lauren Boebert is scared. Last year, I came just 546 votes shy of defeating her and ending her political career once and for all. I’m ready to finish the job in 2024, but these are the kinds of ugly attacks that I’m already up against.**
[**Please, if you can afford to, will you give $5 or more right now to my campaign to help me finally defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024? Our race was the closest in the entire country in 2022. But I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on grassroots donors like you if I’m going to hold Boebert accountable and win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67296485/419274798/1610638071?refcode=em20230730pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=19603436-fc2e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTYwMzQzNi1mYzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pqao-PRM_KTZ4MHX9PTlSVFwRzZqDFQwQNFL1zpuGV0=)

name: Engel HQ
subject: How bad is Juan Ciscomani?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Kirsten’s opponent, Juan Ciscomani, tries to pretend he’s a bipartisan champion. But when he actually takes votes in Congress, his real allegiances become clear.
In the last month, Ciscomani has voted to:
🩺 Repeal a Department of Defense policy that protects access to reproductive care for service members
🏡 Cut funding for projects that provide housing and services to the LGBTQ+ community
📚 Ban books about “radical” gender ideology
🎤 Eliminate Diversity, Equality, and Inclusion officers from the Department of Defense and Armed Forces
📝 Prohibit any teaching about racism — or race in general — in the Department of Defense
🏳️🌈 And prevent anyone on the Department of Defense from displaying a Pride flag
These votes aren't about national security or the best interests of our district. They're about ridiculous "culture war" issues perpetuated by the far right.
Kirsten will actually be a voice for her constituents. She's the leader we need fighting for us — for our reproductive rights, our livelihoods, and our communities.
We have a major fundraising deadline TOMORROW. Will you donate in the next 48 hours so we can defeat Juan Ciscomani, flip AZ-06 blue, and elect Kirsten to Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_073023_EOM_D_act]

She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.

name: =?utf-8?B?QSBmZXcgaGlnaGxpZ2h0cyBmcm9tIE5pa2tp4oCZcyBidXN5IHllYXI=?=
subject: A few highlights from Nikki’s busy year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Team, have you seen what Nikki’s been up to in Congress? From sponsoring and co-sponsoring over 100 bills to leading the fight to get the 2023 Farm Bill across the finish line —**Nikki has kept her foot on the gas to meet this moment with the urgency it deserves.** Some highlights from her busy year (so far!) include: ✅ Advocating for union members by leading a letter to the U.S. Department of Energy urging them to prioritize federal grants for projects sustaining union jobs. ✅Introducing her first bill in Congress, _the Leap Act_ , bipartisan legislation that will provide a tax credit of $1,500 for small businesses that hire pre-apprentices or apprentices into their workforce ✅ Advancing more than $86 million in funding for local community projects throughout Central and Southern Illinois within the House Committee on Appropriations ✅ Launching the Farm Bill 101 initiative to highlight and bring awareness to programs in the 2023 Farm Bill that will benefit farmers and families ✅ Working across the aisle to improve our communities and the lives of residents throughout Central and Southern Illinois. **[Team, right now, there’s a lot at stake, and we need to keep committed legislators like Nikki in Congress. Can you contribute today to power our efforts to re-elect Nikki in 2024? Your support will ensure our team can go the distance.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67297132/419277031/2096641691?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230730_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Zjk2Y2JkYS1mZTJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yiyUEJa35zHVSKVXrqkb1Qqi_5y7KqyELuc-wbsAq4A=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67297134/419277033/-930160167?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230730_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Zjk2Y2JkYS1mZTJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yiyUEJa35zHVSKVXrqkb1Qqi_5y7KqyELuc-wbsAq4A=)

body:
I just got word that we're $6,362 away from our critical July goal.

---
| Sorry to email again, Peter, but it's important. **I just got word that we're $6,362 away from our critical July goal.**

I believe we can make up the difference before midnight tonight – but only if people like you chip in right now.

In 2022, Nevada decided control of the Senate, and political analysts say that history could repeat itself in 2024. That's why hitting this goal is so important. So please, this is the last call:

name: James Carville
subject: Peter, I’ll give it to you straight
body:
I needed to reach out directly:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6989d1f7-4c5c-48cf-a9cd-79d41def5d04/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcc63a56a-94f1-441e-aed4-55f30c3f9282/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We’ve got a BIG problem in Nevada, Peter. Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate just launched his campaign to defeat Sen. Jacky Rosen – and according to analysts at FiveThirtyEight, this race is likely to decide Senate control. The GOP is going ALL IN on Jacky as a top target for defeat. I just got word that she needs to raise $10,000 by midnight to keep her reelection campaign on track to fight back against the GOP’s attacks – but she’s nowhere near close. [So I’ve got to ask you, Peter: Will you rush $10 or more right now – split between Jacky’s campaign and Blue Amp Action – to make sure Jacky wins Nevada’s battleground race and defends our Demo](https://default.salsalabs.org/T28ad484b-cb78-4447-97db-ec19aa00fade/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [DONATE NOW >>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta9cd0830-6421-4e22-a0c6-f3c4a8375ed3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Look, I’ll give it to you straight: Democrats barely won Nevada’s Senate race last year. After McConnell and his cronies flooded the race with over $55 million, his extremist candidate came within 7,928 votes of flipping that seat red – which is less than a single percentage point. Now, Jacky’s race is shaping up to be neck and neck, too. With The Washington Post calling her one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot this election AND a recent poll showing her already TWO POINTS DOWN, it’s going to be a tough race to win. Unless folks like you come through with the grassroots support Jacky needs to pull ahead, Democrats will likely lose Nevada AND the Senate. Facts are facts. [That’s why I’m urgently asking you to rush a split donation of $10 or more right now to make sure Jacky can keep both Nevada and the Senate blue.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta2e220ec-8982-4715-9992-6b76aa02b8a6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2d9a2d22-087e-4250-958c-0f9e4433ff69/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Indiana Dems
subject: Indiana deserves better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
**** Peter, The most recent rankings are out [from CNBC](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67297559/419278097/-281796467?refcode=230729-Better&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjQ4ODVmNy1mZjJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MbfoqKjz3NZOrUpUAVvx04ogCeiJ37K68SrbL2Mp2vs=&emci=b75ae9cb-602d-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=f24885f7-ff2e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535), and sadly our state isn’t getting the best grades. We’ve had 20 years of Republican administrations, and they’ve left working families behind. Indiana gets a D+ for education, a D+ for workforce, and D- for quality of life and healthcare access. While wages rise in other states, too many workers in Indiana are being squeezed by policies that favor the wealthy over regular Hoosiers. [**This year, we can expand our bench and protect our Democratic mayors in communities across our state. Make a donation to our movement before midnight to help restore balance to Indiana.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67297560/419278098/405560545?refcode=230729-Better&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjQ4ODVmNy1mZjJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MbfoqKjz3NZOrUpUAVvx04ogCeiJ37K68SrbL2Mp2vs=) Recent Republican policies like restricting choice for women and passing permitless carry only make our communities less hospitable to families and businesses. We can do better. Indiana should strive to be in the top five of states, not at the bottom. With more Democratic leaders in office, we can begin to tip the scales back in favor of working people. [**Hoosiers across all 92 counties deserve an honest conversation about the last 20 years in 2024. Chip in today to make sure we have the resources needed to do just that. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67297561/419278099/405560545?refcode=230729-Better&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjQ4ODVmNy1mZjJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MbfoqKjz3NZOrUpUAVvx04ogCeiJ37K68SrbL2Mp2vs=) Thanks, Indiana Dems | | | [Chip in! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67297562/419278100/405560545?refcode=230729-Better&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjQ4ODVmNy1mZjJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MbfoqKjz3NZOrUpUAVvx04ogCeiJ37K68SrbL2Mp2vs=)
