| | For months, our country has seen the reality of a Republican-controlled House of Representatives. _It's been full of chaos and cruelty._ We've seen brinksmanship on basic government funding bills. We've seen proposals to further rip away our reproductive freedoms and roll back our country's climate progress. **We've seen a party defined by its most extreme and dangerous leaders — people who openly promote ideas that would dismantle our democracy.** Watching this chaos in the House, I've been grateful that our Democratic Senate majority is there to keep the GOP House in check – for now. But we held the Senate by the narrowest of margins last year, and the 2024 map is shaping up to be one of our toughest election years. **But I have faith in our grassroots movement. Time and again you have joined me on the front lines, pushing back against Republican extremism.** [**Will you join our movement once again with a donation before tomorrow night's fundraising deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67297597/419278246/-2044921950?refcode=2023-07-30-eom-mcconnell&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=09e7751b-002f-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWU3NzUxYi0wMDJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sHdtWoGJGiUwCum6Tjy6VtBg7J7g0K0YHFohcCRWOsU=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67297598/419278247/-2044921950?refcode=2023-07-30-eom-mcconnell&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=09e7751b-002f-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWU3NzUxYi0wMDJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sHdtWoGJGiUwCum6Tjy6VtBg7J7g0K0YHFohcCRWOsU=) **If Republicans retake the Senate, they'll do everything in their power to promote the same dysfunction and extremism that's defined the House in 2023.** We have seen firsthand what a Republican-controlled Senate can do. Senate Republicans will move mountains to cut taxes for the rich and line the pockets of CEOs and shareholders, while working families are left to make tough decisions between paying rent and buying groceries. We know what a Republican Senate will do, because we've seen it before. I'm not about to let far-right Republicans achieve their goals of imposing their extremist policies on every household in America. It's critical that we protect and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate, but I can't do it without you. [**Will you help us expand our Democratic majority and chip in $3 before our end-of-month deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67297599/419278248/-2044921950?refcode=2023-07-30-eom-mcconnell&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=09e7751b-002f-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWU3NzUxYi0wMDJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sHdtWoGJGiUwCum6Tjy6VtBg7J7g0K0YHFohcCRWOsU=) clean_body: | | | | For months, our country has seen the reality of a Republican-controlled House of Representatives. It's been full of chaos and cruelty. We've seen brinksmanship on basic government funding bills. We've seen proposals to further rip away our reproductive freedoms and roll back our country's climate progress. We've seen a party defined by its most extreme and dangerous leaders — people who openly promote ideas that would dismantle our democracy. Watching this chaos in the House, I've been grateful that our Democratic Senate majority is there to keep the GOP House in check – for now. But we held the Senate by the narrowest of margins last year, and the 2024 map is shaping up to be one of our toughest election years. But I have faith in our grassroots movement. Time and again you have joined me on the front lines, pushing back against Republican extremism. = = If Republicans retake the Senate, they'll do everything in their power to promote the same dysfunction and extremism that's defined the House in 2023. We have seen firsthand what a Republican-controlled Senate can do. Senate Republicans will move mountains to cut taxes for the rich and line the pockets of CEOs and shareholders, while working families are left to make tough decisions between paying rent and buying groceries. We know what a Republican Senate will do, because we've seen it before. I'm not about to let far-right Republicans achieve their goals of imposing their extremist policies on every household in America. It's critical that we protect and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate, but I can't do it without you. = More soon, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. name: Susan Swecker
subject: We’re running out of time!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Funding our Take Back the Legislature program will be critical to our efforts to win back the majority this November. We had hoped to achieve this by the end of July but we’re running out of time fast. The ENTIRE Virginia legislature is up in the air this November. Regardless of which party takes control, it will be by a razor thin margin. Which means we need to be as impactful and intentional as possible when it comes to this election.

|
---
Derek, Funding our Take Back the Legislature program will be critical to our efforts to win back the majority this November. We had hoped to achieve this by the end of July but we’re running out of time fast. [Will you please consider making a donation right now and help take back the Virginia legislature?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67297832/419278937/800907059?refcode=dpva-em-073023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWJiN2M4Mi0wMTJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tBCmR1-H5iGVuT9InbqzMP4OCwbAjCnxlCCBw91A5cE=) We have until midnight tomorrow. Our Take Back the Legislature (or TBTL) program focuses on using digital targeting to mobilize Virginia voters in the most vulnerable districts in our Commonwealth. body:
This will be a short one. **** This will be a short one.

**I’m proud to run a grassroots-funded, people-centered campaign, and with PA-04 being home to Montgomery County – one of (if not _the_) most important counties for Democrats in Pennsylvania – expect to see heavy spending from deep-pocketed special interests and mega-donors looking to flip the suburbs. _Your support now is incredibly meaningful in helping us be as prepared as possible for 2024._**

name: Colin Allred
subject: Derek, this race is personal
body:
| | | Friend, I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because this fight is personal for me. I'd love to take a moment to explain why.

I'm a fourth-generation Texan. I'm the proud son of a single mom who taught in public schools and sometimes worked a second job just to make ends meet.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67298289/419280438/-424153699?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk862-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTBlMWFlNy0wMjJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4uW5Zu0O2Rz97RxmaXuYyrrEKJUDm8FBHzlnw2OP5iI=)
Growing up, my world was pretty small. I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people – whether it was as Superman or a firefighter.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67298294/419280443/-424153699?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk862-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTBlMWFlNy0wMjJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4uW5Zu0O2Rz97RxmaXuYyrrEKJUDm8FBHzlnw2OP5iI=)
After playing football at Baylor University and in the NFL, I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney, specializing in voting rights. I've watched this fundamental right be attacked and eroded my whole life – right here in Texas we have some of the most restrictive voter laws in the country, and it's no secret that these laws target Black and brown voters.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67298299/419280448/-424153699?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk862-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTBlMWFlNy0wMjJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4uW5Zu0O2Rz97RxmaXuYyrrEKJUDm8FBHzlnw2OP5iI=)
**It was one of the great honors of my life that one of my heroes and a voting rights and American giant, Congressman John Lewis, joined me on the campaign trail in 2018. I beat the odds – and an 11-term GOP incumbent – to win that race and help Democrats flip the House. Now I'm ready to do it again and replace Ted Cruz in the U.S. Senate – but I need your help.[That's why I'm asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Chrissy Houlahan's today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67298304/419280453/-424153699?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk862-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTBlMWFlNy0wMjJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4uW5Zu0O2Rz97RxmaXuYyrrEKJUDm8FBHzlnw2OP5iI=)**
We've all watched for 10 years as Ted Cruz has failed the people of Texas repeatedly. He's bowed down to Donald Trump, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories about the 2020 elections, cheered on the rioters that stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6 and abandoned our state while Texans froze in the dark. To add insult to injury, after we passed critical voting rights legislation in the House, he spearheaded the effort to kill it in the Senate.
**Time and time again, Ted Cruz has made it clear he will always put Ted Cruz first. That's not me. I'm running for Senate to be a voice for all Texans, for families like yours and mine, and I hope you'll help me get there, friend. Because the truth is, unseating Ted Cruz won't be easy. It's possible, if we all work together and amass a grassroots movement like Texas has never seen, but I need you with me.**
**[So please, will you split a donation of $5, $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and Chrissy Houlahan's to help me defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar makes a difference in our battleground race, and I truly appreciate it →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67298308/419280458/-424153699?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk862-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTBlMWFlNy0wMjJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4uW5Zu0O2Rz97RxmaXuYyrrEKJUDm8FBHzlnw2OP5iI=)**
Thanks for reading my story – and for being on my team. I can't tell you what it means to have you with me in this fight from the very beginning.

Colin Allred
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67298312/419280462/-424153699?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk862-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTBlMWFlNy0wMjJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4uW5Zu0O2Rz97RxmaXuYyrrEKJUDm8FBHzlnw2OP5iI=)
---
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333

If you'd like to pause emails for the next few weeks, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67298317/419280466/-1727112621?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTBlMWFlNy0wMjJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4uW5Zu0O2Rz97RxmaXuYyrrEKJUDm8FBHzlnw2OP5iI=&emci=d9728dd0-c02c-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=be0e1ae7-022f-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=21278485). If you'd like to receive fewer emails like this one, or if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/5A7dcVDqPECR0EWykGJMlQ2?unsubscribedata=w6IDIFa3hmQXbABcXYRy2J5gxdx7MYEdzDuMATXYJYRKqPRmj5hVkH7y0Ve6rVSLdLvGS%2Bn86SGStvO877i2r8x1CzJpaM6vBlOJlCX8h9WOrziKaWHzBTrJva2yYT25upkJm8tw5phBhStyVPpeY%2BrEDTA%2FcfYUlgn%2B6LL8CKwZH24hjeIC0ULgtt9iUvUBpk7EHudfpTh%2Fu1%2FCuSFEkAJnKL3gH9H3wGISge3v4qM06u0oqShhqNmrT8gfcnbDdepxjgenf3d3JBC0GJEQ4KHt5jFKQ2npdQUq7RZLZjARyA%2BGB7BSF2%2BSVpdozZqkuuOZozlloJWJz5i6jfEQI6%2FsZ2EDqnGLcjIslqOeh0p15ThULqj7jIRhYiD7YfVnTHLgtoQCHBBp3x6aHtX%2BBzPHFY3wGzvv5nRX%2BVDu9YkhA%2Bo2b1Hoo%2BdVLinpqubP) Chrissy is a former Captain in the United States Air Force. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or Department of the Air Force. |

name: Wilson HQ
subject: We needed you to see this, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA

The stakes are HIGH.

I’ll get right to it - this is one of the most important Senate races of 2024, and right now, we’re falling behind on our end of month goal.

My Democrat opponents are making waves and raising millions.

We’re a top target for the radical Left, and if we fall behind now, they could be able to sneak ahead of us.

**I’m not about to let them get away with it.**

subject: we’re seeing the effects of climate change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kroemer for Congress
body:
Now more than ever, we need to elect leaders that will treat climate change as the serious threat it is to our state.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67298943/419282238/215820969?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230730-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWQ2MjJlNTYtMDMyZi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o92g99lbkFqQUr86WUUnrQp-oW3n86rnya18-g0XVJw=)
---
| Peter,

All around the world – and right here in Arizona – we’ve been seeing the effects of climate change.

Temperatures in our state have continued to rise and break records, including the highest daily temperature and the warmest low temperature, as well as the most consecutive days above 110 degrees.

Now more than ever, we need to elect leaders that will treat climate change as the serious threat it is to our state. Our state is struggling to keep up with the ongoing threats of climate change, and leaders like David Schweikert are not doing enough to combat these threats.

[_**Will you chip in $5 or more to our Defeat Schweikert Fund today to join our team as we work to flip this seat from red to blue and fight for real, lasting change in AZ-01? clean_body: Now more than ever, we need to elect leaders that will treat climate change as the serious threat it is to our state. | = | Peter, All around the world – and right here in Arizona – we’ve been seeing the effects of climate change. Temperatures in our state have continued to rise and break records, including the highest daily temperature and the warmest low temperature, as well as the most consecutive days above 110 degrees. Now more than ever, we need to elect leaders that will treat climate change as the serious threat it is to our state. name: Paco Fabian, Deputy Director, Our Revolution
subject: We’re racing against the clock in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis —

You’ve heard from Diane, our National Movement Coordinator, about all our work on the Ohio abortion fight. We are working so hard and devoting resources in this fight because if f the extremists are successful in Ohio, they will use this as a play book and keep up these dirty tricks to limit our rights however they want.

We can’t let the far right and their billionaire dark money cronies dismantle our rights. In the courts, in the states, in Congress — they are working overtime and that means we need to fight back twice as hard. Before the end of the month can you pitch in a few bucks to help us win this fight in Ohio? We need to raise $5,000 by Monday at midnight to show anti-abortion extremists and their corporate cronies that we’re not backing down. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8949?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230730_FR_oh_0_3MO_pacofabian_na_na_ohturnout&t=1008&akid=4498%2E5885482%2EZwk1R_)

CHIP IN NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8949?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230730_FR_oh_0_3MO_pacofabian_na_na_ohturnout&t=1009&akid=4498%2E5885482%2EZwk1R_)

Begin forwarded message from Diane Morgan:

Peter Willis,

Last week I told you about the work Our Revolution is doing in my home state of Ohio ahead of next month’s ballot measure. To recap: ahead of a crucial November vote to protect abortion rights in the state, a vocal minority are trying to change the state constitution, making it harder for voters to have their voices heard.

If you know our team of grassroots volunteers, you know we’re fighting back. But we need an outpouring from our top grassroots supporters if we’re going to beat back the well-funded and well-organized opposition. Can you chip in $5 or more today to stop this state by state attack on our rights?? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8949?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230730_FR_oh_0_3MO_pacofabian_na_na_ohturnout&t=1010&akid=4498%2E5885482%2EZwk1R_)

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.
CHIP IN $10 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9277?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230730_FR_oh_0_3MO_pacofabian_na_na_ohturnout&t=1011&akid=4498%2E5885482%2EZwk1R_)
CHIP IN $27 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9278?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230730_FR_oh_0_3MO_pacofabian_na_na_ohturnout&t=1012&akid=4498%2E5885482%2EZwk1R_)
CHIP IN $50 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9279?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230730_FR_oh_0_3MO_pacofabian_na_na_ohturnout&t=1013&akid=4498%2E5885482%2EZwk1R_)
CHIP IN $100 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9280?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230730_FR_oh_0_3MO_pacofabian_na_na_ohturnout&t=1014&akid=4498%2E5885482%2EZwk1R_)

CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8949?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230730_FR_oh_0_3MO_pacofabian_na_na_ohturnout&t=1016&akid=4498%2E5885482%2EZwk1R_)
Every night across the country, Our Revolution volunteers are on the phone with Ohio voters to make sure they know to show up on August 8th and vote NO on Issue One. We’ve made thousands of calls and we’re just getting started.

Every phone bank costs about $750 and we need to call every night between now and Election Day to make sure voters know what’s at stake. That’s almost $7,000 between now and August 8th. We can’t afford to rest until we’ve beat this measure, but the phone bills add up. Can you chip in a few dollars to help us make sure that we’ve talked to every voter we can in Ohio? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8949?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230730_FR_oh_0_3MO_pacofabian_na_na_ohturnout&t=1017&akid=4498%2E5885482%2EZwk1R_)

Thank you for your support,

Diane Morgan
Our Revolution Mobilization Coordinator

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Peter Willis — You’ve heard from Diane, our National Movement Coordinator, about all our work on the Ohio abortion fight. We are working so hard and devoting resources in this fight because if f the extremists are successful in Ohio, they will use this as a play book and keep up these dirty tricks to limit our rights however they want. We can’t let the far right and their billionaire dark money cronies dismantle our rights. In the courts, in the states, in Congress — they are working overtime and that means we need to fight back twice as hard. Before the end of the month can you pitch in a few bucks to help us win this fight in Ohio? We need to raise $5,000 by Monday at midnight to show anti-abortion extremists and their corporate cronies that we’re not backing down. () CHIP IN NOW » () Begin forwarded message from Diane Morgan: Peter Willis, Last week I told you about the work Our Revolution is doing in my home state of Ohio ahead of next month’s ballot measure. To recap: ahead of a crucial November vote to protect abortion rights in the state, a vocal minority are trying to change the state constitution, making it harder for voters to have their voices heard. If you know our team of grassroots volunteers, you know we’re fighting back. But we need an outpouring from our top grassroots supporters if we’re going to beat back the well-funded and well-organized opposition. Can you chip in $5 or more today to stop this state by state attack on our rights?? () If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately. CHIP IN $10 NOW » () CHIP IN $27 NOW » () CHIP IN $50 NOW » () CHIP IN $100 NOW » () CHIP IN $250 NOW » () CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT » () Every night across the country, Our Revolution volunteers are on the phone with Ohio voters to make sure they know to show up on August 8th and vote NO on Issue One. We’ve made thousands of calls and we’re just getting started. Every phone bank costs about $750 and we need to call every night between now and Election Day to make sure voters know what’s at stake. That’s almost $7,000 between now and August 8th. We can’t afford to rest until we’ve beat this measure, but the phone bills add up. Can you chip in a few dollars to help us make sure that we’ve talked to every voter we can in Ohio? () Thank you for your support, Diane Morgan Our Revolution Mobilization Coordinator [ ]Support Our Revolution → [ ][IMG] [ ][IMG] [ ][IMG] Our Revolution is a national grassroots network of local groups dedicated to organizing a political revolution powerful enough to challenge the structural forces that threaten our survival as a society. | Peter,

I know you hear a lot from other campaigns about their urgent fundraising deadlines and how vital it is that they reach the goals they set.

_**I believe it’s essential that when making these asks, we provide some much-needed context.**_

My team and I are constantly strategizing and planning for the future. Our monthly fundraising goals are at the center of these discussions; what we can and can’t do to secure our victory depends on if we reach our goals. We don’t set our goals arbitrarily; we shape our path to winning with intent.

_**So when you hear from me or my team about how critical reaching our fundraising goal is, know that we are being genuine.**_ We appreciate your support too much to be anything less than 100% honest about where our campaign is headed.

[_**With that in mind, we’re nearing the end of July, and I need your support to ensure we reach our goal for the month. Anything you can contribute will make an immediate impact in charting a path back to victory.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67299557/419284297/1394220554?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230730-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzM2NWM3NGEtMDUyZi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aszrD-14Lc1Kbbj05suIxxBmEXw-ui38GbAXUvX3S1I=)

clean_body: I know you hear a lot from other campaigns about their urgent fundraising deadlines and how vital it is that they reach the goals they set. | = | Peter, I know you hear a lot from other campaigns about their urgent fundraising deadlines and how vital it is that they reach the goals they set. I believe it’s essential that when making these asks, we provide some much-needed context. My team and I are constantly strategizing and planning for the future. Our monthly fundraising goals are at the center of these discussions; what we can and can’t do to secure our victory depends on if we reach our goals. We don’t set our goals arbitrarily; we shape our path to winning with intent. So when you hear from me or my team about how critical reaching our fundraising goal is, know that we are being genuine. We appreciate your support too much to be anything less than 100% honest about where our campaign is headed. = | | | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = I appreciate your engagement, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. clean_body: “What does that even mean!?” | | | | Hey Peter, Last week, Mark reached out about our strategy for upcoming end-of-quarter fundraising deadlines with the Federal Elections Commission. We shared that we want to earn the support of 100 grassroots donors before midnight this month — and in August and September to ensure our momentum cannot be ignored. So, here's a quick update: we've made great progress in the last few days, and we're over halfway there! = = = More soon, Nick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Mark Hatton [info@nickmelvoin.com] Date: Mon, July 27, 2023 at 9:22 AM Subject: Keeping it 💯! To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter – This is our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of the quarter, and if we want to have a strong showing, we need to stay on top of these goals well before the FEC's big quarterly filing deadlines. I can hear you saying to yourself, "Mark, what does that even mean!?" We have to tell the FEC exactly how much money we raised every three months. They are going to publish that number. Those numbers will shape the race to come. In a field of 17 candidates, it's absolutely crucial that we show strong grassroots support to stand out from the crowd. We've set a goal to bring in** at least100 grassroots donations each month this quarter. That way, we'll show broad support for sending a new generation of leaders, like Nick, to Washington. = = Back with more updates soon. Mark Team Nick Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289 |

Families around here are struggling to make ends meet. But Michelle Steel has done nothing to help us get ahead. Instead, she goes to Washington and falls right in line with the extreme MAGA caucus.

From pushing for anti-choice legislation and opposing contraception and same-sex marriage to choosing the gun lobby over our children – **Michelle Steel is out of step with our community. And we deserve so much better.**

I won’t settle for this extreme MAGA Republican nonsense – not when working families like mine are struggling here in CA-45. I know what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck and I know what it’s like to worry about paying for healthcare and housing.

That’s why I’ve fought to deliver real results for working people on the Garden Grove City Council. We’ve invested in infrastructure, revitalized our parks, supported small businesses, tackled substance use, addressed homelessness, and so much more.

**I’m running to bring this record of leadership and public service to D.C. And unlike Michelle Steel, I will NEVER forget to serve the community that I call home.**

[If you’re with me, please pitch in before our critical end-of-month deadline on Monday at midnight. Together, we can beat Michelle Steel, flip CA-45 blue, and bring real leadership to Congress. We still need to raise about $10,000:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67300048/419285713/764484201?contactdata=lrPD3blvXjZkS8PF33p7YLDYIf11DWqh4w1ZIZ6zdFFFd9gHCeN/O3pccaJrPM2jdMGGkhykud+9Lg9I5wt8TfVx+sB0m1UE1GNKhoKg8i0=&amount=10&refcode=KBN_EM_FR_WL_230730_1_4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2Y5MmIyMWItMDcyZi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UN3X2oU2_Q1F2volcrZnCt_60ZxTCCfnSVSJE-W3dOM=)

| **Democrat Kim Bernice Nguyen is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation.** The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant, Kim's story is the quintessential California tale of sacrifice, hard work, and dedication to community. Now, she's running for Congress to reduce prescription drug costs, increase housing affordability, invest in working families, and strengthen our democracy.

clean_body: | | In just a second, I’m going to ask you to = before our July 31st fundraising deadline. But first, I wanted to take a moment to talk about why this race is so important – and why I’m the right candidate for CA-45. | | = Families around here are struggling to make ends meet. But Michelle Steel has done nothing to help us get ahead. Instead, she goes to Washington and falls right in line with the extreme MAGA caucus. From pushing for anti-choice legislation and opposing contraception and same-sex marriage to choosing the gun lobby over our children – Michelle Steel is out of step with our community. And we deserve so much better. I won’t settle for this extreme MAGA Republican nonsense – not when working families like mine are struggling here in CA-45. I know what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck and I know what it’s like to worry about paying for healthcare and housing. That’s why I’ve fought to deliver real results for working people on the Garden Grove City Council. We’ve invested in infrastructure, revitalized our parks, supported small businesses, tackled substance use, addressed homelessness, and so much more. I’m running to bring this record of leadership and public service to D.C. And unlike Michelle Steel, I will NEVER forget to serve the community that I call home. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = CA-45 is our home – and it’s worth fighting for. Thanks for being a part of this grassroots movement. Let’s get to work. – Kim | | | = | Democrat Kim Bernice Nguyen is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation.** The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant, Kim's story is the quintessential California tale of sacrifice, hard work, and dedication to community. At just 25, she became the youngest person ever elected to the Garden Grove City Council. Now, she's running for Congress to reduce prescription drug costs, increase housing affordability, invest in working families, and strengthen our democracy. | Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress Kim Nguyen for Congress 3843 S. name: Team AOC
subject: Can Alexandria count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
**Our July fundraising deadline is rapidly approaching tomorrow at midnight, and we’re still $17,353 away from our $340,000 goal.[Can you chip in $5 right now to help close the gap?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230730.KuccH-&refcode=em20230730-4721-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4721%2E2526796%2Eiq83jU)**
Other members of Congress might just call up a wealthy donor or a couple of big money corporate PACs to collect some big checks, but not Alexandria.
This is a **100% people-funded campaign** fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you, _and she wouldn’t have it any other way._
**[Please make your first $5 donation today to help us hit our $340,000 July goal by tomorrow at midnight. If enough folks pitch in whatever they can afford to this email, we’ll reach our goal in no time!](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230730.KuccH-&refcode=em20230730-4721-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4721%2E2526796%2Eiq83jU)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230730.KuccH-&refcode=em20230730-4721-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4721%2E2526796%2Eiq83jU)**
Change comes from all of us coming together and doing what we can — not from one singular person or leader.
While Alexandria joins striking workers on the picket lines, speaks out against attacks on human rights here and abroad, and works to pass bold, progressive legislation in Congress, she relies on this movement to make her work possible from month to month.
Thank you for any amount you can contribute to re-elect Alexandria and support our multi-racial, multi-generational, working-class movement.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230730?refcode=em20230730-4721-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=22&refcode2=4721_2526796_iq83jU&akid=4721%2E2526796%2Eiq83jU)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230730-4721-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=23&akid=4721%2E2526796%2Eiq83jU)**
---|---

---|---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

subject: Electing a Medicaid expansion advocate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greta Martin for AG
body:
Nearly 70 years later, Mississippi is still one of ten states that refuses to expand Medicaid coverage to meet updated poverty thresholds

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67300690/419287209/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_230730MA_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzQ1NTEzMTYtMDgyZi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5Yfa9jdhgRbBQyvyoRPW0JoLQKWPW7ThL7BmNoHh-TA=) Peter,

Today is the anniversary of Medicaid’s creation when it was signed into law by President Lyndon B. Johnson in 1965. Medicaid aimed to ensure healthcare coverage for low-income individuals and expanded care to millions, including children, mothers, and people with disabilities.

**Nearly 70 years later, Mississippi is still one of ten states that refuses to expand Medicaid coverage to meet updated poverty thresholds.** And as long as our leaders refuse to act, hospitals across the state will continue to be forced to shut their doors, and Mississippians will continue to suffer.

Greta’s been a continued advocate for people in our complicated state systems, and she remains outspoken about our need to expand Medicaid and healthcare access in every part of Mississippi. Now, she’s ready to advocate for Mississippians as our Attorney General, but she needs your support to get there.

[We can’t wait any longer for our leaders to act – we need to make a change. clean_body: Nearly 70 years later, Mississippi is still one of ten states that refuses to expand Medicaid coverage to meet updated poverty thresholds = Peter, Today is the anniversary of Medicaid’s creation when it was signed into law by President Lyndon B. Johnson in 1965. Medicaid aimed to ensure healthcare coverage for low-income individuals and expanded care to millions, including children, mothers, and people with disabilities. Nearly 70 years later, Mississippi is still one of ten states that refuses to expand Medicaid coverage to meet updated poverty thresholds. And as long as our leaders refuse to act, hospitals across the state will continue to be forced to shut their doors, and Mississippians will continue to suffer. Greta’s been a continued advocate for people in our complicated state systems, and she remains outspoken about our need to expand Medicaid and healthcare access in every part of Mississippi. Now, she’s ready to advocate for Mississippians as our Attorney General, but she needs your support to get there. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = – Greta for AG HQ Greta Kemp Martin was born, raised, and educated in Mississippi. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Three things the GOP has been up to lately
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Instead of getting to work for the American people, Republican House members have been advancing their out-of-touch agenda | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67326848/419315248/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ15R_GOP_E_20230730_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGNjYjU3My0yYTJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MtQZ_-5XSqaofNCsGlKp33DP613Yh2q60djjjfR3t3A=&emci=66ae8f03-b02c-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=54ccb573-2a2f-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
There are plenty of real issues where we need our government to take action. Like child care. And housing. And climate change. But instead of getting to work for the American people, Republican House members have been advancing their out-of-touch agenda. Here are just a few of their recent big ideas:
* Handing more tax breaks to giant corporations — just weeks after they tried to cut vital programs like Meals on Wheels in the name of “fiscal responsibility.”
* Making it illegal to get mifepristone — a medication used for one of the most common methods of abortion — in the mail, anywhere in the country.
* Restricting the right to vote nationwide with the harshest anti-voting rights bill in decades.

I’ve got four words for them: **Not on my watch.** **I’m pushing back against MAGA Republicans to protect our basic freedoms and put our government on the side of working people, not just the rich and powerful. And I’m running for re-election to stay in the fight. But I can’t do it alone.** [**If it makes sense for you right now, can you chip in $20 or any amount to power this re-election campaign, fight back against the GOP’s extremist agenda, and make our government work for working people?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67326850/419315250/-1332346508?amount=20&refcode=EMZ15R_GOP_E_20230730_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGNjYjU3My0yYTJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MtQZ_-5XSqaofNCsGlKp33DP613Yh2q60djjjfR3t3A=) Side by side, we can hold the line against GOP extremism. We’ll fight to retake the House from the Republican wrecking-ball crew, protect and expand our Senate majority, and hold onto the White House. But we won’t stop there. We’ll keep fighting to push our country forward and deliver the big, bold action that working families need — from universal child care to affordable housing to building on our progress against the climate crisis. [**I’m running for re-election to get all this done — and much more. And I’m asking if you can make a donation to help strengthen our campaign and power this fight. Any amount makes a real difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67326851/419315252/-1332346508?refcode=EMZ15R_GOP_E_20230730_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGNjYjU3My0yYTJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MtQZ_-5XSqaofNCsGlKp33DP613Yh2q60djjjfR3t3A=) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: He’s saying the quiet part out loud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
DeSantis isn’t even trying to hide his dangerous agenda |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67301137/419288495/-1162166188?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzA0ZGM5Zi0wOTJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cjy6VhXNbjORqOCII6nZFkMX-QgHYc8SrtlOzAvpiAw=)
Friend, **Have you seen what’s been coming out of the DeSantis camp this month?** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67301138/419288496/1975272244?refcode=E3488-20230730-DeSantisEOM-Image-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzA0ZGM5Zi0wOTJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cjy6VhXNbjORqOCII6nZFkMX-QgHYc8SrtlOzAvpiAw=) Friend, DeSantis is saying the quiet part out loud with his whole chest: If he wins in 2024, he’ll come for LGBTQ+ Americans, accurate and appropriate racial history in schools, and more. **Just take a look at what he’s done to Florida in the last year alone.** | [DEFEAT DESANTIS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67301139/419288497/1975272244?&refcode=E3488-20230730-DeSantisEOM-SB-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzA0ZGM5Zi0wOTJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cjy6VhXNbjORqOCII6nZFkMX-QgHYc8SrtlOzAvpiAw=)
---
DeSantis can point fingers at Trump all he wants, but like our twice-impeached former president, DeSantis is catering exclusively to and emboldening hate group extremists — **just like Trump did in the months leading up to January 6.**
Listen, we don’t plan to let DeSantis — or his bigoted agenda — _anywhere_ near the White House. **But here’s the thing:** Grassroots fundraising this year has been a lot slower than in the 2019 or 2021 off-years, and even back in 2020, we elected President Biden by a margin that’s way too close for comfort.
Given the stakes, we absolutely _cannot_ afford to stall out before we’ve had the chance to build a winning foundation for 2024. | | Today is the 58th anniversary of Medicare, which for the last few generations has supported aging Americans as they leave the workforce.

National programs like Medicare and Social Security were created with the understanding that hard-working Americans deserve support in retirement – but with the future of those national programs in constant jeopardy, it’s up to state governments to pick up the slack.

I’m committed to making Washington a state where everyone can thrive, but I can’t do it without your help. While others have been spending their time raising big money and transferring dark money to fund their campaigns, I’ve been focused on passing legislation that tackles Washington’s biggest challenges, from expanding affordable housing to securing reproductive freedom to improving public safety.

I know we need to do more to make Washington safe, affordable and prosperous, and that includes making things like retirement savings a policy priority.

[If you’re with me, I hope you’ll contribute before tomorrow’s deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67301247/419288825/-1267275108?amount=10&source=MM_EM_FR_90DO_230730_1_3&refcode2=2fe700e7-092f-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&contactdata=j/OBCL/GdYN7j1mglhnQDwwSUFpG+mHDOfTUOXeIBqfSo/2HMLFJAn3G4c26a1dY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmU3MDBlNy0wOTJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5y6tW-eV7viB3kYzhleiVgkdKfit6pTt0596EdTQkP0=)

clean_body: | | Today is the 58th anniversary of Medicare, which for the last few generations has supported aging Americans as they leave the workforce. National programs like Medicare and Social Security were created with the understanding that hard-working Americans deserve support in retirement – but with the future of those national programs in constant jeopardy, it’s up to state governments to pick up the slack. I’m committed to making Washington a state where everyone can thrive, but I can’t do it without your help. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = While others have been spending their time raising big money and transferring dark money to fund their campaigns, I’ve been focused on passing legislation that tackles Washington’s biggest challenges, from expanding affordable housing to securing reproductive freedom to improving public safety. I know we need to do more to make Washington safe, affordable and prosperous, and that includes making things like retirement savings a policy priority. = Thank you! Mark | Mark Mullet is running for Governor to make Washington safe, affordable and prosperous. | | ---|---|--- | = ** Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet Mullet for Governor (D) PO Box 2072 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Brandon Presley
subject: I can’t believe we fell short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67301752/419289979/-1470085607?refcode=ea.0e93984c-0b2f-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ms=ea.0e93984c-0b2f-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU5Mzk4NGMtMGIyZi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5ja6tODxjp3NnuU9VXxTpaOrHAuBEmlHqaLqTBFBIXU=) Peter, I _hate_ to email you like this over the weekend, but you’re one of our top supporters in your area, and I wanted you to know what’s happening.

**Last night, we fell short of our $40,000 online fundraising goal.**

I won’t sugarcoat it: Every missed goal in the homestretch to November is a missed opportunity to invest in Get-Out-The-Vote resources. It means more budget cuts. Fewer staff. And less time on the airwaves.

The dreaded “summer slump” is a real thing. And we didn't let that stop us from aiming high and pushing forward on our fundraising projections.

We’re no quitters. We _WILL_ defeat Tate Reeves come hell or high water. And I know I can count on you every step of the way.

So here’s the deal: [We may have missed our mark, but if we can raise another $5,000 before midnight tomorrow, we can still make up this shortfall and stay on track to defeat Tate Reeves. Can you rush your first donation to kick August off on a strong foot?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67301756/419289983/-1470085607?refcode=ea.0e93984c-0b2f-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ms=ea.0e93984c-0b2f-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU5Mzk4NGMtMGIyZi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5ja6tODxjp3NnuU9VXxTpaOrHAuBEmlHqaLqTBFBIXU=)

**We're just 100 days out from the election.** The polls have us neck and neck with Reeves. And this race is being called one of the most competitive in 2023.

In other words, we can't afford to drop the ball again, Peter.

[So, what do you say? Would you be able to donate before tomorrow night to help us hit our new goal and give us the surge of grassroots energy we need to win?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67301758/419289985/-1470085607?refcode=ea.0e93984c-0b2f-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ms=ea.0e93984c-0b2f-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU5Mzk4NGMtMGIyZi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5ja6tODxjp3NnuU9VXxTpaOrHAuBEmlHqaLqTBFBIXU=) | **[DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67301760/419289987/-1470085607?amount=10&refcode=ea.0e93984c-0b2f-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ms=ea.0e93984c-0b2f-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU5Mzk4NGMtMGIyZi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5ja6tODxjp3NnuU9VXxTpaOrHAuBEmlHqaLqTBFBIXU=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, I hate to email you like this over the weekend, but you’re one of our top supporters in your area, and I wanted you to know what’s happening. Last night, we fell short of our $40,000 online fundraising goal. I won’t sugarcoat it: Every missed goal in the homestretch to November is a missed opportunity to invest in Get-Out-The-Vote resources. It means more budget cuts. Fewer staff. And less time on the airwaves. The dreaded “summer slump” is a real thing. And we didn't let that stop us from aiming high and pushing forward on our fundraising projections. We’re no quitters. We WILL defeat Tate Reeves come hell or high water. And I know I can count on you every step of the way. So here’s the deal: = We're just 100 days out from the election. The polls have us neck and neck with Reeves. And this race is being called one of the most competitive in 2023. In other words, we can't afford to drop the ball again, Peter. = | = = = Thanks for your support, Brandon Presley | | Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. name: Lombardo, Joe (Personal)
subject: One more day
body:
| | |
---
| Peter,
Joe here - in just a minute, I'm going to tell you why I decided to continue my public service as Governor and why I know we still have a lot of work to do in order to keep Nevada the greatest state in the Union.
But first, in case you hadn't seen, my team is coming up on our very first internal fundraising deadline since the end of the legislative session - so if you're in a rush, [can I ask you to send in support and help us meet our goals for this Monday deadline before you click away? >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kQKw8whfMpe8RVJYGyzkdHtxpWIpm6w7nATjv3gpGXfYiFilvTOXoqd6Ittkm_DQelr0pINpLURWU6UM9txVZyvZ1Z4WOPb9T528Rsor0auwHs1-McGzRliwk19Z1NPTJi-KaQsGuhsyWeWqld0rV_BRuxid0Nq6nna2rpge6jB3aOqqbNnJ_Gudrlok7wcNbqsWmqT-x0hkfq3uQXQxt_yHauPyR9mb&c=RnVnTUXd-gabkXo78eCrY9BBSpMwSWEjWCIUzI3wCIiiqF2GAzQq4w==&ch=OivKYBYcthFkrXR4OEucXyvj9EBZbKRVWepmk5IoXzCf30AY06MSXg==)

| | [DONATE HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kQKw8whfMpe8RVJYGyzkdHtxpWIpm6w7nATjv3gpGXfYiFilvTOXoqd6Ittkm_DQelr0pINpLURWU6UM9txVZyvZ1Z4WOPb9T528Rsor0auwHs1-McGzRliwk19Z1NPTJi-KaQsGuhsyWeWqld0rV_BRuxid0Nq6nna2rpge6jB3aOqqbNnJ_Gudrlok7wcNbqsWmqT-x0hkfq3uQXQxt_yHauPyR9mb&c=RnVnTUXd-gabkXo78eCrY9BBSpMwSWEjWCIUzI3wCIiiqF2GAzQq4w==&ch=OivKYBYcthFkrXR4OEucXyvj9EBZbKRVWepmk5IoXzCf30AY06MSXg==)
---
| Peter, I ran for Governor of Nevada to save the state I had helped protect for over 30 years as a law enforcement officer.
Under one-party Democrat rule, we were heading in the WRONG direction. Our small businesses were shutting down because of Big Government orders. Folks were getting hit with sky-high taxes. Soft-on-crime policies were making it harder for law enforcement officers like my team and me to even do our jobs. We were heading in the trajectory of far-left states like California...
I couldn't sit back on the sidelines and watch it happen. Instead, I answered the call to Keep Nevada Safe and get our state turned around by following the Nevada Way - with your support, [FIRST NAME], that's exactly what we did. We ENDED those dark days of total Democrat rule!
And now, we've already been making huge strides to undo the damage. But our work is far from over. Our next mission is to support principled Republicans so they can join me in Carson City and give us even more backup as we fight for Nevada's future.
Peter, reaching our first internal fundraising goal will go a long way toward making that happen. But we're still a little behind right now, though, so I'm going to make one final ask of you today:
[Will you please rush in any support you can so we can meet this critical first deadline? >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kQKw8whfMpe8RVJYGyzkdHtxpWIpm6w7nATjv3gpGXfYiFilvTOXoqd6Ittkm_DQelr0pINpLURWU6UM9txVZyvZ1Z4WOPb9T528Rsor0auwHs1-McGzRliwk19Z1NPTJi-KaQsGuhsyWeWqld0rV_BRuxid0Nq6nna2rpge6jB3aOqqbNnJ_Gudrlok7wcNbqsWmqT-x0hkfq3uQXQxt_yHauPyR9mb&c=RnVnTUXd-gabkXo78eCrY9BBSpMwSWEjWCIUzI3wCIiiqF2GAzQq4w==&ch=OivKYBYcthFkrXR4OEucXyvj9EBZbKRVWepmk5IoXzCf30AY06MSXg==)

clean_body: | | | | Peter, Joe here - in just a minute, I'm going to tell you why I decided to continue my public service as Governor and why I know we still have a lot of work to do in order to keep Nevada the greatest state in the Union. But first, in case you hadn't seen, my team is coming up on our very first internal fundraising deadline since the end of the legislative session - so if you're in a rush, == | | == | Peter, I ran for Governor of Nevada to save the state I had helped protect for over 30 years as a law enforcement officer. Under one-party Democrat rule, we were heading in the WRONG direction. Our small businesses were shutting down because of Big Government orders. Folks were getting hit with sky-high taxes. Soft-on-crime policies were making it harder for law enforcement officers like my team and me to even do our jobs. We were heading in the trajectory of far-left states like California... I couldn't sit back on the sidelines and watch it happen. Instead, I answered the call to Keep Nevada Safe and get our state turned around by following the Nevada Way - with your support, [FIRST NAME], that's exactly what we did. We ENDED those dark days of total Democrat rule! And now, we've already been making huge strides to undo the damage. But our work is far from over. Our next mission is to support principled Republicans so they can join me in Carson City and give us even more backup as we fight for Nevada's future. Peter, reaching our first internal fundraising goal will go a long way toward making that happen. But we're still a little behind right now, though, so I'm going to make one final ask of you today: == | | == | Thank you, -Joe | | Lombardo for Governor | == | == == == | | | | | | | Lombardo for Governor | P.O. Box 371176, Las Vegas, NV 89137 | | == Sent by mailto:info@joelombardofornv.com

Democrats are working day in and day out for the American people, including several bills lately, like:
– **The Child Care for Working Families Act** , which**** would make child care more accessible and affordable.
– **The Women’s Health Protection Act** , legislation that would restore and protect every woman’s right to make her own health care decisions everywhere in this country.
– **The Freedom to Vote Act** , a bill that would safeguard our democracy and protect every American’s fundamental right to make their voice heard at the ballot box.
But if we're going to deliver progress for the American people, we need to make early investments to defend and expand our narrow Senate majority. **So it's absolutely critical that supporters like you chip in to help put Democrats ****in the best possible position to ****win big on Election Day.**

name: Tiernan Donohue
subject: I have to ask today, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=389%2E552475%2EH5wGit)
Hey Peter, it’s Tiernan, Bob’s campaign manager.
You probably have a lot of emails to sift through, but I want you to know I only reach out when it’s really important. [**I hope you’ll let me explain why we need your support to reach our $50,000 end-of-month goal before midnight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230730-2?refcode=em20230730-2&refcode2=389_552475_H5wGit&akid=389%2E552475%2EH5wGit)
These goals aren’t just numbers, they are benchmarks for our budget that we look to to know we’re on track.
Running a battleground Senate campaign is expensive. And running a campaign in a state that’s a TOP target for Mitch McConnell and national Republicans is even more expensive.

In 2022, nearly $400 million was spent on the U.S. Senate race in Pennsylvania. This cycle, national Republicans could spend even more to run attack ads against Bob, and we need to have the resources to push back.
The bottom line is that if we lose in Pennsylvania next year, we could lose our Democratic Senate majority.
[**Our race will be one of the most competitive and expensive elections of 2024, so we have to hit the ground running now to win. Will you donate $5 or more to help us hit our critical $50,000 goal before midnight?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230730-2?refcode=em20230730-2&refcode2=389_552475_H5wGit&akid=389%2E552475%2EH5wGit)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230730-2?amount=5&refcode=em20230730-2&refcode2=389_552475_H5wGit&akid=389%2E552475%2EH5wGit)**
I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important, so thank you. We couldn’t do this without you.
Tiernan
Campaign Manager, Bob Casey for Senate

| Peter,

Sorry to interrupt your Sunday, but my July fundraising deadline is tomorrow, and Republicans are already running attack ads and billboards against me, so I can’t afford to slow down for even a day.

My team and I are working overtime to defend this toss-up seat again, but Republicans are preparing to spend big to defeat me. They know flipping this seat is their only opportunity to maintain their narrow House majority.

clean_body: My team and I are working overtime to defend this toss-up seat again, but Republicans are preparing to spend big to defeat me. | = | Peter, Sorry to interrupt your Sunday, but my July fundraising deadline is tomorrow, and Republicans are already running attack ads and billboards against me, so I can’t afford to slow down for even a day. My team and I are working overtime to defend this toss-up seat again, but Republicans are preparing to spend big to defeat me. They know flipping this seat is their only opportunity to maintain their narrow House majority. That’s why it’s absolutely imperative that we defend this seat from whatever MAGA puppet they want to replace me.= | | | = | = | = | = | = Gratefully, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Our July fundraising deadline is tomorrow and I need your help.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67303066/419293051/-1917331050?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1YWZhMDNiLTBlMmYtZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BVwiMTFWD52iq0yNaS44KHlXCYKfF3Jppfp8fr7P4MI=&emci=ace42dd7-6b2d-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=65afa03b-0e2f-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)

name: TammyBaldwin.com
subject: Did you see what The Hill said?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| The Hill named Tammy’s Senate seat as one of the 5 most likely to flip in 2024.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=732%2E35263%2EIkSCTc)
In case you missed it, Peter: **_The Hill_ named Tammy’s Senate seat as one of the 5 most likely to flip in 2024. [Rush a donation before tomorrow’s end-of-month deadline to help defend Tammy’s battleground seat →](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jul23.xghWlz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230730_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=732%2E35263%2EIkSCTc)** | [DONATE NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jul23.xghWlz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230730_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=732%2E35263%2EIkSCTc)
---
Now that _The Hill_ has added Tammy to their top 5 most likely seats to flip rankings, Republicans will be even more eager to target this race and flip Tammy’s seat — no matter what it takes.
They’re already hard at work recruiting wealthy self-funders who can reach right into their own deep pockets to power their own campaigns.
That’s why reaching each and every one of our fundraising goals — _including tomorrow night’s end-of-month goal_ — is so fundamentally important to defending Tammy against the GOP attacks that are soon to start flooding in.
**[Will you pitch in any amount you can spare to help us reach our 10,000 grassroots donor goal before Monday night? Your contribution, no matter the amount, will go a long way toward reelecting Tammy and helping Democrats hold onto the Senate.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jul23.xghWlz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230730_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=732%2E35263%2EIkSCTc)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](ttps://secure.winred.com/vivek-2024/july-tied-poll-video-r?sid=ITE&mid=7373638&sc=20230730_VIVEK_E_ITE_TIED-POLL-VIDEO_REV_ETS&utm_source=rev&utm_campaign=tiedpollvideo&utm_medium=email)

body:

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67306620/419295016/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230730EOM_EOM_TW_FULL_6_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDlhOWM5MC0xMTJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8hdS8XDYawy2Z0EeC6EFCA5UWdJmhz6lOPh3eOi7GXE=)
---
Okay, despite the subject line, this email is not _directly_ about Ron DeSantis. But his campaign is an example of why we’re diligently working to make all of our budget goals, and why [**we need supporters like you, to chip in by tomorrow’s end-of-month deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67306621/419295017/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230730EOM_EOM_TW_FULL_6_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDlhOWM5MC0xMTJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8hdS8XDYawy2Z0EeC6EFCA5UWdJmhz6lOPh3eOi7GXE=)

Just two months after launching, DeSantis’s presidential campaign — what was supposed to be a powerful juggernaut that could credibly threaten Donald Trump for the GOP nomination, — recently announced that they’re laying off a _third_ of their staff.

**Look, this is what happens when a campaign doesn’t responsibly allocate resources and runs out of grassroots support too soon.** (It also doesn’t help when your campaign is focused too relentlessly on attacking the LGBTQ community and stifling public education, but that’s a separate issue...)

The truth is, it’s never too early to be properly pacing out one’s fundraising for the next election. We’ve been aiming to do that all throughout 2023 — but this month has so far been slower than expected.

[**Will you pitch in to help us turn things around in the next two days and raise $3,791 more? Jennifer is coming off her closest election yet for VA-10, and we need to hit all of our goals this summer to prepare for the inevitable GOP attacks and remind voters of her strong record on job creation, improving transit, and fighting for our fundamental rights.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67306622/419295018/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230730EOM_EOM_TW_FULL_6_NG_N_L2&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDlhOWM5MC0xMTJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8hdS8XDYawy2Z0EeC6EFCA5UWdJmhz6lOPh3eOi7GXE=) clean_body: Jennifer stands ready to fight them. = Okay, despite the subject line, this email is not directly about Ron DeSantis. But his campaign is an example of why we’re diligently working to make all of our budget goals, and why = Just two months after launching, DeSantis’s presidential campaign — what was supposed to be a powerful juggernaut that could credibly threaten Donald Trump for the GOP nomination, — recently announced that they’re laying off a third of their staff. Look, this is what happens when a campaign doesn’t responsibly allocate resources and runs out of grassroots support too soon. (It also doesn’t help when your campaign is focused too relentlessly on attacking the LGBTQ community and stifling public education, but that’s a separate issue...) The truth is, it’s never too early to be properly pacing out one’s fundraising for the next election. We’ve been aiming to do that all throughout 2023 — but this month has so far been slower than expected. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = We don’t plan to be anything like Ron DeSantis — ideologically or operationally. Thanks for your help! — Team Wexton | Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America. **=** Paid for by Wexton for Congress Wexton for Congress PO Box 650550 Sterling, VA 20165 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
A lot can change in 100 days. A lot more can change with your help.

| |
---
Peter, it’s official: **We’re 100 days away from the 2023 November elections!** So, we have a couple of requests for you:
1. **Make your plan to vote.** Whether it’s by mail, early in-person, or at your precinct on election day
2. **Research who is on your ballot.** No matter where you live in the United States, there might be Democrats on your ballot, even in the most remote precincts in the country. Don’t sit this election out just because you don’t think you’ve got any Democrats to vote for.
3. **Chip in to help United Rural Democrats keep up the fight.** We need your help in these final 100 days. [**Can United Rural Democrats count on you to make sure that we have the resources we need in our final 100 days to keep Democratic momentum going?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67306991/419295273/1646350971?refcode=urd-em-230730-100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWQyODgzMjUtMTIyZi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_BQsoDL4zXKeeNoTng_gIFbQ0YSwRnacXmIG2Oolzf0=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark?=
subject: ⭐ Help Select Better Candidates! (and more!) Don't delay! ⭐
body:
You can help shape what candidates get elected! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=655486a441&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| | |
**The "Ohio Liberator Caucus"**

---
| If the Ohio Liberty Movement is going to be relevant, we must learn to love our freedom more than we love a candidate. In the 2022 primary election, we gave Joe Blystone and Jim Renacci more votes than Mike DeWine, but we lost because our votes were split. The**"Ohio Liberator Caucus** " will address this by bringing together delegates from Ohio's Liberty Groups to vote on endorsements prior to the 2024 primary. We will promote our slate card of endorsements to other like-minded Ohioans to create a voting bloc of people with our values. We can't afford another primary like 2022 because our freedom is at stake, and for 2024 the **Ohio Liberator Caucus (OLC) **is our best option.

* * *
---
| The plan for the OLC is to have a male & female delegate from each of the 33 Ohio Senate districts, totaling 66 delegates. They will meet in late 2023 to decide endorsements on candidates for: US President, US Senate, US House, Ohio Supreme Court, Ohio Senate, Ohio House, and Ohio Republican State Central Committee. **To make the OLC successful, we need a team to help with organizing the event in the areas of planning, logistics, candidate review, fundraising, and more.**

If you would be willing to consider participating in this first-of-its-kind event in Ohio, please send an email to **[GFIOhio@proton.me](mailto:GFIOhio@proton.me?subject=Ohio%20Liberator%20Caucus)** with your indication of interest & contact information.

Let us know if you have any questions or need more information.

---
|
---
| |
**The "Ohio Precinct Strategy"**

---
|
[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6ce24c269d&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| For months, a growing team of people has been building a statewide, structured organization to help grassroots, tax-paying, God-fearing, hard-working Ohioans take back control of the Ohio Republican Party using "The Precinct Strategy". This a call for leaders, team members, and most importantly CANDIDATES (to run for all 88 Ohio County GOP Central Committees).

_**This is TIME SENSITIVE. You must register to run by the middle of December!**_

If you are interested in learning more, or participating in your county, please go to the [Ohio Precinct Strategy and be sure to register](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b2ca8130b6&e=5c740fa3e2 "Ohio Precinct Strategy"), or send an email to **[GFIOhio@proton.me](mailto:GFIOhio@proton.me?subject=Ohio%20Liberator%20Caucus).**

---
|
---
| |
**An app to connect our movement!
The "GFI _connect_ " App!**

---
| [](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d0d027487f&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| Today, people are busy. They need efficiency & convenience. We realized that using traditional communication methods to keep grassroots Ohioans aware of what's going on politically & governmentally was neither. For this purpose, a custom app is efficient, convenient, and more!
**GFI _connect_** is the only app exclusively designed to unite hard-working, tax-paying, God-fearing, grassroots Ohioans against the corrupt Insiders of Ohio's major political parties who ignore us.

With **GFI _connect_** our goal is to tie together Ohioans into a powerful, consolidated, voting bloc that can't be ignored because our numbers will be able to sway elections, whether on issues or of candidates.

The days of party operatives telling us who to vote for & how to vote is over!

[The beta-test version of **GFI _connect_** is available for download at the Google Play Store.](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=17dfa39923&e=5c740fa3e2)

The Apple version will be available soon (we hope). When? That's up at Apple. They have **GFI _connect_** "under review".

---
|
---
|
---
| **How Can You Help GFI?**
You can help GFI by inviting your friends & family to become part of our **network**. You can forward them this email and ask them to:

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=82b2d6d72d&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| If you want to text an invite to someone, just cut and paste this into a text (or email):

I'm a part of the Grassroots Freedom Initiative (GFI) network. Please accept my invitation to join me.

Together, through GFI, people like us across Ohio are building the largest, off-grid, network of Ohio patriots. Just click the link below to get started!

Thanks!

[http://eepurl.com/h1wIZ5](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e938c5a2af&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| Thank you for being a GFI **person** as part of the GFI **network**. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here!

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
GFIOhio@proton.me
614-499-0599 (c)**
---
| | _Copyright © 2023 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
The Grassroots Freedom Initiative4240 Hobbs Landing Dr WDublin, OH 43017-6025
[Add us to your address book](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=ef733a06df) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=ef733a06df).

If you are interested in learning more, or participating in your county, please go to the "Ohio Precinct Strategy", or send an email to mailto:GFIOhio@proton.me?subject=Ohio%20Liberator%20Caucus. | | | An app to connect our movement! The "GFI connect " App! | | Today, people are busy. They need efficiency & convenience. We realized that using traditional communication methods to keep grassroots Ohioans aware of what's going on politically & governmentally was neither. For this purpose, a custom app is efficient, convenient, and more! GFI connect is the only app exclusively designed to unite hard-working, tax-paying, God-fearing, grassroots Ohioans against the corrupt Insiders of Ohio's major political parties who ignore us. With GFI connect our goal is to tie together Ohioans into a powerful, consolidated, voting bloc that can't be ignored because our numbers will be able to sway elections, whether on issues or of candidates. The days of party operatives telling us who to vote for & how to vote is over! The Apple version will be available soon (we hope). When? That's up at Apple. They have GFI connect "under review". | | | How Can You Help GFI? You can help GFI by inviting your friends & family to become part of our network. You can forward them this email and ask them to: | "Join Us!" | If you want to text an invite to someone, just cut and paste this into a text (or email): I'm a part of the Grassroots Freedom Initiative (GFI) network. Please accept my invitation to join me. Together, through GFI, people like us across Ohio are building the largest, off-grid, network of Ohio patriots. Just click the link below to get started! Thanks! | Thank you for being a GFI person as part of the GFI network. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here! Best regards, Mark Pukita A GFI Person GFIOhio@proton.me 614-499-0599 (c) | | Copyright © 2023 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved.

Peter,

Right now, Emerge is working tirelessly to equip bold Democratic women with the training and support they need to transform politics for good. We’ve trained more than 5,500 Democratic women in 45 states and counting – and over 1,200 Emerge alums are in office right now!
**But at this critical moment when abortion access, voting rights, and essential services are ALL under attack, we need MORE women leaders at every level to fight back! **That’s why Emerge is ramping up our recruitment and training programs to help Black, Brown, and Indigenous women and women of color, as well as LGBTQ+, young, and unmarried women run for office and win! **We’re the ONLY organization laser-focused on this critical work, and we need your help. **
**[We urgently need to raise $25,000 before our next big deadline on July 31, and right now, we’re falling short! clean_body: | | | Peter, Right now, Emerge is working tirelessly to equip bold Democratic women with the training and support they need to transform politics for good. We’ve trained more than 5,500 Democratic women in 45 states and counting – and over 1,200 Emerge alums are in office right now! But at this critical moment when abortion access, voting rights, and essential services are ALL under attack, we need MORE women leaders at every level to fight back! That’s why Emerge is ramping up our recruitment and training programs to help Black, Brown, and Indigenous women and women of color, as well as LGBTQ+, young, and unmarried women run for office and win! We’re the ONLY organization laser-focused on this critical work, and we need your help. = | | = From our boot camps to our signature training program , Emerge provides women withbattle-tested tools and strategies to beat the odds stacked against them, turbo-charge their campaigns, and take charge of the direction of our country. Our reach ensures that Emerge women get on-the-ground support at every step of their candidacy – so they can continue to break glass ceilings and change the face of politics state by state. Because that’s what it’s going to take to safeguard our rights for generations to come. But with GOP extremists clinging to power and cranking out their regressive laws, we MUST increase our programs to empower more Democratic women to run in every state and rise to higher office. That’s why hitting our end-of-month goal is so important, Peter, and we’re counting on you to chip in to help us get there. = If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately. | | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for stepping up today, Team Emerge | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
