clean_body: Together, we can build a promising future for Alaskans and solidify our new role as a purple state. | | | | | | Hi folks, Here's a quick update on the status of our work to build a prosperous and flourishing Alaska. We’re preparing to build on our successes from the last election, but we need all hands on deck to help make it happen. With just another day until the end of the month, we’re still more than $3,000 short of our July fundraising goal. Your contribution will enable us to combat extremism here in Alaska, build a promising future for our Alaskans, and solidify our new role as a purple state. | Thanks! – Team Build Alaska’s Future | | Help us continue to build Alaska's future by to support our work. | | | Copyright © 2022 Build Alaska's Future Action Fund, All rights reserved. subject: New Episode of Chris Farrell's On Watch Podcast feat. Tara Rodas!
body: Tara Rodas was a federal employee for more than 20 years. While serving at the Pomona Fairplex Emergency Intake Site in Pomona, California, Tara volunteered to help place Unaccompanied Children with Sponsors in the United States. [Action] CHRIS FARRELL'S ON WATCH PODCAST US Govt Child Trafficking -- Whistleblower Tara Rodas Exposes the Evil [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64391&L=29904&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1yNnFUOHJqRVNyOCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1hY3Rpb24rYWxlcnQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=6d743df2a3fc9f1325013f18ddc9047467d3cd39759f3204d4166c20ae67536a] Tara Rodas was a federal employee for more than 20 years. While serving at the Pomona Fairplex Emergency Intake Site in Pomona, California, Tara volunteered to help place Unaccompanied Children with Sponsors in the United States. Tara saw, firsthand, how lack of transparency, lack of oversight, flawed policies, and deficiencies in HHS’ Unaccompanied Children Program resulted in children being placed with suspicious Sponsors and suspected trafficking rings throughout the United States. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67325717/419311150/-4707655?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzc0Mzk0Yi0yNDJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ghfWxKQmRo9GBNaeYcWi4Hd8_sx9J6sJFJVaE59iks=&emci=3c9bae8e-6d2d-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=ac74394b-242f-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364) Team — we’re facing a big fundraising deadline tomorrow, and in a moment I’m going to ask you to [_**pitch in and help us catch up to our fundraising goal.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67325718/419311151/1017531204?refcode=email_073023_EOM2-bio&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzc0Mzk0Yi0yNDJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ghfWxKQmRo9GBNaeYcWi4Hd8_sx9J6sJFJVaE59iks=) But first I want to tell you a bit about how we got here, and why your support now counts for so much: The fact is, when I talk to my colleagues in Congress, I don’t encounter a lot of people who walked the path that I did to get there. I was born into a working class family here in Colorado – my mom was a hairdresser, and my dad worked in construction. When my mom was prescribed opioids after a back injury, kicking off a decades-long battle with addiction, things for our family were hard. But with the support of some incredible teachers — and because my community invested in high-quality, public education — I became the first person in my family to graduate from high school and college. I got to work for my community, and eventually won a hard-fought race to serve in the Colorado legislature, working to ensure that future Coloradoans could enjoy the same opportunities I did. And after ten years representing JeffCo in the State House and Senate, I ran for Congress here in CO-07 to bring the fight to Washington. **I ran for Congress to deliver for the families whose needs are so often going overlooked in the halls of Congress — and I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished together these first few months. But we’ve got a LONG way to go, and I have no plans to slow down.** [_**If we’re going to keep up the fight to lift up working-class families, combat our nation’s opioid epidemic, and protect basic freedoms like the freedom to choose, then we need to win this next election, friend. Can you chip in $20 before our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline tomorrow to help my team continue to reach voters in communities across CO-07?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67325719/419311152/1017531204?refcode=email_073023_EOM2-bio&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzc0Mzk0Yi0yNDJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ghfWxKQmRo9GBNaeYcWi4Hd8_sx9J6sJFJVaE59iks=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67325720/419311153/1017531204?refcode=email_073023_EOM2-bio&amount=10&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzc0Mzk0Yi0yNDJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ghfWxKQmRo9GBNaeYcWi4Hd8_sx9J6sJFJVaE59iks=)

Will Hurd stood out among the other 2024 candidates this week as he called out Donald Trump for his criminal actions and Ron DeSantis for doubling down on Florida's out-of-touch curriculum on slavery. [**TEXT RON TO 94398**](sms:94398?&body=RON)
Governor Ron DeSantis has never backed down from a tough fight. He's a native Floridian with blue-collar roots, played baseball at Yale, and graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. He served in the Navy as a JAG officer in Iraq, worked as a federal prosecutor, and worked in the halls of Congress. As governor, he has kept Florida free, taken on woke corporations, and stood up to the liberal media.

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=390%2E552475%2EtXxUID)
Peter, I just talked with our finance director, Taylor. She told me that we’re close to reaching our end-of-month goal, but there is still a chance we could come up just shy.
I know you hear this from my team a lot, but we really can’t afford to fall short. Mitch McConnell and the GOP are already coming for this seat, and I’m counting on you to make sure we can meet our goal and end July strong.
**[Can you chip in before tomorrow night to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal? This is going to be one of the most competitive and expensive elections in the country, and anything you can give will make a difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230730-1?refcode=em20230730-1&refcode2=390_552475_tXxUID&akid=390%2E552475%2EtXxUID)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230730-1?refcode=em20230730-1&refcode2=390_552475_tXxUID&akid=390%2E552475%2EtXxUID)**
Peter, I’m no stranger to tough fights. I’ve been fighting for Pennsylvania my whole career, and I won’t stop now. There’s still more work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results for working families and children across our Commonwealth.
But I can’t win this re-election fight without you on my side, which is why I’m asking for your support.
**[If you can chip in a few dollars right now, it’ll help us reach our goal and keep us on the path to victory next November. Can I count on you?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230730-1?refcode=em20230730-1&refcode2=390_552475_tXxUID&akid=390%2E552475%2EtXxUID)**

Thank you,
Bob Casey

Your support today means we can reach more voters, mobilize more supporters, and fight back harder against the negative attacks that will come. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = It means so much to me to have folks like you on this team. —Jon | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

name: Colin Allred
subject: tough news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50650?t=6&akid=9569%2E878179%2EsjaU8D) Friend, I was just having my coffee when my finance director sent me our latest fundraising numbers.

**I'm not going to lie – July has been really tough for fundraising.**

And here's the thing: Ted Cruz's GOP mega donors are more laser-focused on this race than ever. They're pouring _millions_ into his war chest to make sure Ted continues to protect their interests in the Senate.

Unlike Ted Cruz, I'm running in this race to protect the interests of ALL Texans, not special interest groups. I’m running to defend our fundamental right to vote, improve affordable health care, and build a Texas we can be proud of.

**And if folks like you help power this campaign all the way through Election Day, I know we'll have what it takes to stand up to Cruz and his allies.**

[So, listen, I need to raise $55,000 today to stay on track. Please: Can you give just $10 now to me and the Voter Protection Project to make sure we can retire Ted Cruz for good? Every dollar you give brings us closer to giving Texans a senator that speaks for us in the Senate – not shady mega donors →](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50650?t=7&akid=9569%2E878179%2EsjaU8D) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50651?t=8&akid=9569%2E878179%2EsjaU8D)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50652?t=9&akid=9569%2E878179%2EsjaU8D)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50653?t=10&akid=9569%2E878179%2EsjaU8D)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50654?t=11&akid=9569%2E878179%2EsjaU8D)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50650?t=12&akid=9569%2E878179%2EsjaU8D)
Thank you for being a part of this movement. Let's do this,

Colin Allred
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9569%2E878179%2EsjaU8D). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9569%2E878179%2EsjaU8D).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=9569%2E878179%2EsjaU8D) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=9569%2E878179%2EsjaU8D). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=9569%2E878179%2EsjaU8D)

Peter, When Democrats held on to the U.S. Senate in 2022, I knew that in the next election, America would be at a crossroads.

_We could give into more years of far Left control..._

**... or we could STPE UP for the America we want.**

If we take back just **three seats** we can take back our majority. It’s so close I can taste it - but we have a lot of time before decision day in 2024.

_And even though Election Day may seem lightyears away, we have a critical goal we have to get to RIGHT NOW._

**Our FIRST end-of-month deadline of the campaign is TOMORROW NIGHT at MIDNIGHT, and we urgently need your help.**

_Can you pitch in now to help us meet this FIRST major milestone of this campaign?_[](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=8fcf46d7de814144a4a33d7404c8b122&_e=CxwlA_E8UGAWnZi4UUynqS7dKVBLfLg1PlArEasLuDXbIdstZwlKAD5v6NZz3Z7H-wtBDBfea-GhNmtEbt67mfm9sunUZ8ItdqyfHLf5wc0yfLsSU3kIorfcbu_azJ914K3UNcnDWBMP9SrXo6sjUM0Qx-EizABbznDmSvL41v1EDd7UPUSHyQRE8cW3NnO8FUrlYq77LliptmYb2ADMq-s4WusJKo2N8fkaza3Du0wr82mrPLHO8AwBPxmgzVV9liPzufyI7Y0KDwIZ1ZpX0jTBw55YUlk4LV2rt3TRO-FHfwuJB9N_UTRm5JyJor2zki-IIVNsLCgCh380StoFVmzRUrM6k85_s7s6Hrppunc%3D) **[HELP MAKE A DIFFERENCE - CHIP IN HERE>>>](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=8fcf46d7de814144a4a33d7404c8b122&_e=CxwlA_E8UGAWnZi4UUynqS7dKVBLfLg1PlArEasLuDXbIdstZwlKAD5v6NZz3Z7HvB6zMoOfQ2r5y0oR2AtmHOfM-9_rGI3LLhDsglBdQm2xL1vgKAInuEg4B_XyNuIJDMmbyY7DyD1IMyTeo0nsaQML_R5jO3duq5QCzvjx8GwpJkpRIwyL8jV6sUIBH68X_ruz3afW2eQKqcMgsz5EHkEydQVw31oi_GN2vepgZP0Gh-yoe7VL-1DFrmF2-QQxxjFxjDre4yCcfSFBORSQHleKP8YukipNEljDrlcqUM39DJEg-BxJlgF7cq6tevgUOmppk4jdJQRtfH7R9C4ElavsZ3BUEzeoUIHOvlYLt5srGuI6spDsBpVmmIYk639q)**

All the experts agree: Virginia is in play for 2024, but if we’re going to win, we need our team to step up like they never have before.

_That means your role on our team is more important than ever, Peter._

The future of our movement depends on grassroots conservative leaders like you. I know this race is just as important to you as it is to my team and me.

[That’s why I’m email you today, to humbly ask that if you’re with me like you were with me last year, can you chip in just a few dollars today?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=8fcf46d7de814144a4a33d7404c8b122&_e=CxwlA_E8UGAWnZi4UUynqS7dKVBLfLg1PlArEasLuDXbIdstZwlKAD5v6NZz3Z7HvB6zMoOfQ2r5y0oR2AtmHOfM-9_rGI3LLhDsglBdQm2xL1vgKAInuEg4B_XyNuIJDMmbyY7DyD1IMyTeo0nsaQML_R5jO3duq5QCzvjx8GwpJkpRIwyL8jV6sUIBH68X_ruz3afW2eQKqcMgsz5EHkEydQVw31oi_GN2vepgZP14JbfDh0B6j2c8exTyk9boOd6C24kSReqFT5mu5ec3-0ZO05_XDzfaJyhrBWKUifqMd1PK89T0NqG_BiyOgRUhJWbBei2SCq4wIs1ZduGQHnfQE6iSwWTiztyDXnYREgZgHsxi-UwoKDPrQHxPMvbT)

name: Darcy Draeger
subject: an update on our numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
| | **New Jersey’s school board candidate filing deadline is TOMORROW, and we need 8 more supporters from your area to help us try to reach our $50k goal!**

Ever since starting Districts for Democracy, we’ve found that Democrats, Independents, and Republicans all oppose censorship in our public schools, even when it comes to teaching what some call “controversial topics” like race, climate change, and civics.

Further, [voters across parties say students should be exposed to multiple points of view](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67326700/419314696/2006461168?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230730_FR_EOM_0_Darcy_NA_NA_EOM.6&refcode2=3f34310e-292f-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjM0MzEwZS0yOTJmLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wMAwQ0Gt_V3GfpSzCIGIiqK2Vh9gCjX-_Vh5HKDzCLc=&emci=b4420d06-742d-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=3f34310e-292f-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294), even ones they disagree with.

Unfortunately, this isn’t always enough. MAGA groups have extensive funding, and they are working in every corner of the nation to elect candidates who will do serious harm to not only our kids _but our democracy_. If we don’t stand together and invest in our local races now, it may end up being too late.

[Our end-of-month deadline is tomorrow, and we need to fight harder than ever before if we want to preserve educational excellence in our schools. name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Did masks work?
body:
More important info | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/did-masks-work?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

Did masks work? Do they work still for preventing airborne diseases. I want you to watch [this critical video](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=f04d71d41f&e=9828080a05) all the way through, and then make a determination yourself based on the evidence. [Click](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=ec4a1cee5d&e=9828080a05) the thumbnail below and see this critical discussion with qualified doctors:
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=0a40547644&e=9828080a05 "The REAL Efficacy of Masks")
---
| As I said yesterday, health freedom actually matters. Why must we never forget what big tech, big pharma and big government tried to do to us the past several years? Because they'll try it again!

Lord John Dalberg-Acton was an English Catholic historian, politician, and writer. He once famously wrote the following, "Power tends to corrupt, and absolute power corrupts absolutely." The same can be applied to our media, our public health officials, and certainly our government. This [critical video](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=74f1cfc91e&e=9828080a05) pushes back against the tyranny of so-called "experts." Please share it with family and friends. The efficacy of masking is absolutely in question when it comes to preventing diseases like COVID-19. You are not a conspiracy theorist for questioning it. [Please watch this.](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=7f1a5eb1f4&e=9828080a05)

Have a great weekend and continue to stay vigilant on these issues.

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor
---
|

SOS America PAC is working hard to get Miami Mayor Francis Suarez on the GOP Presidential debate stage in August...

...but to qualify, **he needs 40,000 individual donors giving at least a dollar.**

Whether or not you support Mayor Suarez, **we think the GOP will benefit _tremendously_ from hearing from a bold, young conservative mayor who won 80% of the vote in a major city** during his reelection campaign.

Mayor Suarez has **slashed the number of homeless** people in Miami...while creating a **massive economic and population boom**...while **slashing bureaucracy** and restoring power to the people.

That’s a record and a story that **deserves to be heard by the American people** in this primary.

We’re not asking for you to cast your vote for Mayor Suarez...we’re just asking for you to **give him a fighting chance to make his case to Republican primary voters** on the debate stage.

Friend, We've accomplished a _lot_ in the Senate thanks to Democratic supporters like you. Here are just a few highlights: ✔️We took on Big Pharma and finally made it possible for Medicare to negotiate lower prices for prescription drugs. ✔️We made the largest investment in fighting climate change in our nation’s history. ✔️We took critical measures to safeguard our democracy by passing the Electoral Count Reform Act. Still, our work is far from complete. From protecting the right to vote to increasing access to affordable child care, there is still so much more to be done -- and that’s why I’m asking for your support. **Since I’ll be on the ballot next year it’s critical to hit my midnight fundraising goal so we can ensure we have the resources we need to keep the Senate blue. body:
In 2024, we choose an America about community or an America about chaos. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67328188/419320239/1330220391?&refcode=E3551-20230729-Swalwell-Image-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3ZDZhMTFkLTM0MmYtZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VlnBUDw1AleffpnQVryBTSri2JkFfwaC1oks6NPWyfM=) Peter, Week after week, my MAGA colleagues continue to embarrass themselves. And this week won’t be much different as Jim Jordan plans to haul in the FBI to testify on his own extremist agenda items. Look, my plan to continue fighting MAGA clowns like Jim Jordan is simple. We must first continue to _**discredit**_ any of these conspiracy theories and grievances that lie at the heart of their agenda. Second, we must also _**defend**_ any claims they make against the Biden administration and the work Democrats are doing for everyday Americans. And then finally, we can continue to _**deliver**_ on the issues Americans are most concerned about. We must first continue to discredit any of these conspiracy theories and grievances that lie at the heart of their agenda. Second, we must also defend any claims they make against the Biden administration and the work Democrats are doing for everyday Americans. And then finally, we can continue to deliver on the issues Americans are most concerned about. = While my vision may be easier said than done, our country has the chance to go one of two paths in 2024.
